 279:     def submit(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Tuple[bool, str, Optional[str]]:
 280:         try:
 281:             task = self._build_task(raw_data)
 282:         except ValueError as exc:
 283:             return False, "", str(exc)
 284: 
 285:         existing_task_id = self.queue_adapter.check_duplicate(task)
 286:         if existing_task_id:
 287:             self.logger.info(
 288:                 "duplicate task ignored: incoming=%s existing=%s",
 289:                 task.task_id,
 290:                 existing_task_id,
 291:             )
 292:             return True, existing_task_id, None
 293: 
 294:         self._persist_task(task)
 295:         self.queue_adapter.remember_dedup(task, ttl_seconds=self.dedup_ttl_seconds)
 296:         self._enqueue_task(self._initial_queue_for_task(task), task)
 297: 
 298:         with self.lock:
 299:             self.stats["received"] += 1
 300: 
 301:         self.logger.info(
 302:             "task received: task_id=%s type=%s queued=%s",
 303:             task.task_id,
 304:             task.task_type.value,
 305:             self._initial_queue_for_task(task),
 306:         )
 307:         return True, task.task_id, None
 308: 
 309:     def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 310:         queue_sizes = self.queue_adapter.get_queue_sizes()
 311:         queued_total = (
 312:             int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0))
 313:             + int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0))
 314:             + int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0))
 315:         )
 316:         task_status_counts = self.get_task_status_counts()
 317: 
 318:         with self.lock:
 319:             running = sum(self.active_workers.values())
 320:             stats = dict(self.stats)
 321:             active_workers = dict(self.active_workers)
 322:         active_task_count = (
 323:             int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PENDING.value, 0))
 324:             + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.ASSIGNED.value, 0))
 325:             + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING.value, 0))
 326:             + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value, 0))
 327:             + int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value, 0))
 328:         )
 329:         status_metrics = {
 330:             "total": int(task_status_counts.get("total", 0)),
 331:             "completed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.COMPLETED.value, 0)),
 332:             "failed": int(task_status_counts.get(TaskStatus.FAILED.value, 0)),
 333:             "active": int(active_task_count),
 334:             "zombie": int(stats["zombie_reclaimed"]),
 335:             "retried": int(stats["retried"]),
 336:             "received": int(stats["received"]),
 337:         }
 338: 
 339:         return {
 340:             "status": "online",
 341:             "is_busy": running > 0 or queued_total > 0,
 342:             "total_queue_size": queued_total + running,
 343:             "queue_sizes": queue_sizes,
 344:             "queues": {
 345:                 "download": int(queue_sizes.get("download", 0)),
 346:                 "process": int(queue_sizes.get("process", 0)),
 347:                 "upload": int(queue_sizes.get("upload", 0)),
 348:                 "pending": queued_total,
 349:                 "processing": active_workers.get("process", 0),
 350:                 "completed": stats["completed"],
 351:                 "failed": stats["failed"],
 352:                 "retried": stats["retried"],
 353:                 "received": stats["received"],
 354:                 "active": active_task_count,
 355:                 "total": int(task_status_counts.get("total", 0)),
 356:                 "zombie_reclaimed": stats["zombie_reclaimed"],
 357:                 "zombie": stats["zombie_reclaimed"],
 358:             },
 359:             "workers": active_workers,
 360:             "status_metrics": status_metrics,
 361:             "task_status_counts": task_status_counts,
 362:             "uptime_seconds": int(max(0, time.time() - self.booted_at)),
 363:             "timestamp": time.time(),
 364:         }
 365: 
 366:     def get_resources(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 367:         return self.resource_monitor.get_current()
 368: 
 369:     def get_resources_history(self, minutes: int = 60) -> list:
 370:         return self.resource_monitor.get_history(minutes=minutes)
 371: 
 372:     def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
 373:         task = self.registry.get(task_id)
 374:         if task is None:
 375:             return None
 376:         return task.to_dict()
 377: 
 378:     def get_task_status_counts(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
 379:         counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
 380:         for status in self._queryable_statuses():
 381:             counts[status.value] = int(self.registry.count_by_status(status))
 382:         counts["total"] = sum(counts.values())
 383:         return counts
 384: 
 385:     def list_tasks(
 386:         self,
 387:         status: Optional[str] = None,
 388:         limit: int = 20,
 389:         offset: int = 0,
 390:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 391:         size = max(1, min(200, int(limit)))
 392:         start = max(0, int(offset))
 393:         target_statuses = self._resolve_status_filter(status)
 394:         read_limit = min(5000, start + size)
 395: 
 396:         if len(target_statuses) == 1:
 397:             selected = target_statuses[0]
 398:             total = int(self.registry.count_by_status(selected))
 399:             tasks = self.registry.list_by_status(selected, limit=max(1, read_limit))
 400:         else:
 401:             total = 0
 402:             merged: Dict[str, UnifiedTask] = {}
 403:             for st in target_statuses:
 404:                 total += int(self.registry.count_by_status(st))
 405:                 for task in self.registry.list_by_status(st, limit=max(1, read_limit)):
 406:                     merged[task.task_id] = task
 407:             tasks = list(merged.values())
 408:             tasks.sort(key=lambda item: item.created_at, reverse=True)
 409: 
 410:         selected_tasks = tasks[start : start + size]
 411:         return {
 412:             "total": total,
 413:             "limit": size,
 414:             "offset": start,
 415:             "tasks": [item.to_dict() for item in selected_tasks],
 416:         }
 417: 
 418:     def cancel_task(self, task_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
 419:         task = self.registry.get(task_id)

=== lines 497-637 ===
 497:     def _run_download_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 498:         self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING)
 499:         task.stage_checkpoint = "download"
 500:         task.current_stage = 0
 501:         self._persist_task(task)
 502:         self.logger.info("task downloading started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
 503: 
 504:         try:
 505:             if not self._needs_download(task):
 506:                 self._enqueue_task("process", task)
 507:                 return
 508: 
 509:             self._prepare_video_download_context(task)
 510:             source_path = self._download_source_video(task)
 511:             task.source_path = source_path
 512:             task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
 513:             task.metadata["source_path"] = source_path
 514:             task.metadata["downloaded_from"] = task.source_url or ""
 515:             self._write_forum_post_info_snapshot(task)
 516:             task.error_message = None
 517:             self._persist_task(task)
 518: 
 519:             self._enqueue_task("process", task)
 520:             self.logger.info(
 521:                 "task downloading completed: task_id=%s source_path=%s",
 522:                 task.task_id,
 523:                 source_path,
 524:             )
 525:         except Exception as exc:
 526:             self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING)
 527: 
 528:     def _run_process_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 529:         self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.PROCESSING)
 530:         task.stage_checkpoint = "process"
 531:         self._persist_task(task)
 532:         self.logger.info("task processing started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
 533: 
 534:         try:
 535:             if task.task_type in {TaskType.TTS, TaskType.VOICE_CLONE}:
 536:                 result = self._process_tts_like(task)
 537:             else:
 538:                 result = self._process_video_like(task)
 539:             if task.task_type == TaskType.VIDEO:
 540:                 result = self._apply_video_output_naming(task, result)
 541: 
 542:             task.result = result
 543:             task.output_path = result.get("output_path")
 544:             if task.output_path and task.output_path not in task.output_files:
 545:                 task.output_files.append(task.output_path)
 546:             task.error_message = None
 547:             self._persist_task(task)
 548: 
 549:             if task.output_path and Path(task.output_path).exists():
 550:                 self._enqueue_task("upload", task)
 551:                 return
 552:             self._complete_task(task)
 553:         except Exception as exc:
 554:             self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.PROCESSING)
 555: 
 556:     def _run_upload_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 557:         self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.UPLOADING)
 558:         task.stage_checkpoint = "upload"
 559:         self._persist_task(task)
 560:         self.logger.info("task uploading started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
 561:         started = time.perf_counter()
 562: 
 563:         try:
 564:             upload_result = self._upload_output(task)
 565:             upload_result["duration_ms"] = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
 566:             result = dict(task.result or {})
 567:             result["upload"] = upload_result
 568:             task.result = result
 569:             task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
 570:             task.metadata["upload_duration_ms"] = upload_result["duration_ms"]
 571:             task.error_message = None
 572:             self._persist_task(task)
 573:             self._complete_task(task)
 574:         except Exception as exc:
 575:             self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.UPLOADING)
 576: 
 577:     def _dequeue_stage_task(self, stage: str) -> Optional[UnifiedTask]:
 578:         pop_map = {
 579:             "download": self.queue_adapter.pop_download,
 580:             "process": self.queue_adapter.pop_process,
 581:             "upload": self.queue_adapter.pop_upload,
 582:         }
 583:         pop_fn = pop_map.get(stage)
 584:         if pop_fn is None:
 585:             return None
 586: 
 587:         while not self.stop_event.is_set():
 588:             queued_task = pop_fn(timeout=1.0)
 589:             if queued_task is None:
 590:                 return None
 591:             task = self.registry.get(queued_task.task_id)
 592:             if task is None:
 593:                 self._persist_task(queued_task)
 594:                 task = queued_task
 595:             if task.status in {TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED}:
 596:                 self.logger.info(
 597:                     "skip task from %s queue due to terminal status: task_id=%s status=%s",
 598:                     stage,
 599:                     task.task_id,
 600:                     task.status.value,
 601:                 )
 602:                 continue
 603:             target_queue = self._target_queue_for_task(task)
 604:             if target_queue != stage:
 605:                 self.logger.info(
 606:                     "reroute stale queued task: task_id=%s popped=%s target=%s status=%s",
 607:                     task.task_id,
 608:                     stage,
 609:                     target_queue,
 610:                     task.status.value,
 611:                 )
 612:                 self._enqueue_task(target_queue, task)
 613:                 continue
 614:             return task
 615:         return None
 616: 
 617:     def _enqueue_task(self, queue_name: str, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 618:         if queue_name == "download":
 619:             self.queue_adapter.push_download(task)
 620:             return
 621:         if queue_name == "upload":
 622:             self.queue_adapter.push_upload(task)
 623:             return
 624:         self.queue_adapter.push_process(task)
 625: 
 626:     def _spawn_workers(self, stage: str, count: int, target: Any) -> None:
 627:         for idx in range(count):
 628:             thread = Thread(
 629:                 target=target,
 630:                 name=f"worker-{stage}-{idx + 1}",
 631:                 daemon=True,
 632:             )
 633:             thread.start()
 634:             self.worker_threads.append(thread)
 635:

 530:         task.stage_checkpoint = "process"

 534:         try:
 535:             if task.task_type in {TaskType.TTS, TaskType.VOICE_CLONE}:
 536:                 result = self._process_tts_like(task)

 540:                 result = self._apply_video_output_naming(task, result)
 541: 
 542:             task.result = result

 545:                 task.output_files.append(task.output_path)

 577:     def _dequeue_stage_task(self, stage: str) -> Optional[UnifiedTask]:
 578:         pop_map = {
 579:             "download": self.queue_adapter.pop_download,
 580:             "process": self.queue_adapter.pop_process,
 581:             "upload": self.queue_adapter.pop_upload,
 582:         }
 583:         pop_fn = pop_map.get(stage)
 584:         if pop_fn is None:
 585:             return None
 586: 
 587:         while not self.stop_event.is_set():
 588:             queued_task = pop_fn(timeout=1.0)
 589:             if queued_task is None:
 590:                 return None
 591:             task = self.registry.get(queued_task.task_id)
 592:             if task is None:
 593:                 self._persist_task(queued_task)
 594:                 task = queued_task
 595:             if task.status in {TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED}:
 596:                 self.logger.info(
 597:                     "skip task from %s queue due to terminal status: task_id=%s status=%s",
 598:                     stage,
 599:                     task.task_id,
 600:                     task.status.value,
 601:                 )
 602:                 continue
 603:             target_queue = self._target_queue_for_task(task)
 604:             if target_queue != stage:
 605:                 self.logger.info(

 609:                     target_queue,
 610:                     task.status.value,
 611:                 )
 612:                 self._enqueue_task(target_queue, task)
 613:                 continue
 614:             return task
 615:         return None

 617:     def _enqueue_task(self, queue_name: str, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 618:         if queue_name == "download":
 619:             self.queue_adapter.push_download(task)
 620:             return
 621:         if queue_name == "upload":
 622:             self.queue_adapter.push_upload(task)
 623:             return
 624:         self.queue_adapter.push_process(task)

 626:     def _spawn_workers(self, stage: str, count: int, target: Any) -> None:
 627:         for idx in range(count):
 628:             thread = Thread(
 629:                 target=target,
 630:                 name=f"worker-{stage}-{idx + 1}",
 631:                 daemon=True,
 632:             )
 633:             thread.start()
 634:             self.worker_threads.append(thread)
 635: 
 636:     def _mark_stage_active(self, stage: str, delta: int) -> None:
 637:         with self.lock:
 638:             current = self.active_workers.get(stage, 0)
 639:             self.active_workers[stage] = max(0, current + delta)
 640:             self.stats["running"] = sum(self.active_workers.values())
 641: 
 642:     def _complete_task(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 643:         self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
 644:         task.stage_checkpoint = "completed"
 645:         task.error_message = None
 646:         self._persist_task(task)
 647:         with self.lock:
 648:             self.stats["completed"] += 1
 649:         self.logger.info("task completed: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
 650: 
 651:     def _fail_task(
 652:         self,
 653:         task: UnifiedTask,
 654:         error: Exception,
 655:         failed_from: Optional[TaskStatus] = None,
 656:     ) -> None:
 657:         failed_from_status = failed_from or task.status
 658:         task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
 659:         task.metadata["failed_from_status"] = failed_from_status.value
 660:         task.metadata["retryable_failure"] = self._is_retryable_failure(
 661:             error=error,
 662:             failed_from=failed_from_status,
 663:         )
 664:         task.error_message = str(error)
 665:         self._persist_task(task)

=== lines 1400-1540 ===
1400:     def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
1401:         state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
1402:         if not state_file.exists():
1403:             raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
1404:         try:
1405:             payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
1406:         except Exception as exc:
1407:             raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc
1408: 
1409:         last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
1410:         if last_completed_step < 9:
1411:             raise RuntimeError(
1412:                 f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
1413:             )
1414:         output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
1415:         if output_file:
1416:             candidate = Path(output_file)
1417:             if candidate.exists():
1418:                 return candidate
1419: 
1420:         patterns = [
1421:             f"{source_path.stem}*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
1422:             "*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4",
1423:             "*.mp4",
1424:         ]
1425:         for pattern in patterns:
1426:             candidates = [
1427:                 p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
1428:                 if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
1429:             ]
1430:             if candidates:
1431:                 candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
1432:                 return candidates[0]
1433: 
1434:         raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")
1435: 
1436:     def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
1437:         self,
1438:         task: UnifiedTask,
1439:         source: Path,
1440:         task_dir: Path,
1441:         stage_names: List[str],
1442:         start_from_stage: int,
1443:         reason: str,
1444:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1445:         stage_dir = task_dir / "_stages"
1446:         stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
1447:         output_path = task_dir / f"{task.task_id}{source.suffix or '.mp4'}"
1448:         shutil.copy2(source, output_path)
1449: 
1450:         asr_srt = stage_dir / f"{task.task_id}_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
1451:         asr_srt.write_text(
1452:             "\n".join(
1453:                 [
1454:                     "1",
1455:                     "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
1456:                     "internal pipeline fallback subtitle",
1457:                     "",
1458:                 ]
1459:             ),
1460:             encoding="utf-8",
1461:         )
1462:         cover_manifest = stage_dir / f"{task.task_id}_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
1463:         cover_manifest.write_text(
1464:             json.dumps(
1465:                 {
1466:                     "task_id": task.task_id,
1467:                     "engine": "internal_pipeline_fallback",
1468:                     "cover_titles": [],
1469:                     "fallback_reason": reason,
1470:                 },
1471:                 ensure_ascii=False,
1472:                 indent=2,
1473:             ),
1474:             encoding="utf-8",
1475:         )
1476: 
1477:         executed = stage_names[start_from_stage:]
1478:         task.current_stage = len(stage_names) - 1
1479:         task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[-1]
1480:         return {
1481:             "success": True,
1482:             "request_type": task.task_type.value,
1483:             "output_path": str(output_path),
1484:             "executed_stages": executed,
1485:             "executed_mode": "fallback_copy",
1486:             "performance_summary": (
1487:                 f"internal pipeline fallback executed stages={len(executed)} reason={reason}"
1488:             ),
1489:         }
1490: 
1491:     def _build_task(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> UnifiedTask:
1492:         payload = dict(data.get("payload") or {})
1493:         metadata = dict(data.get("metadata") or {})
1494:         source_path = str(
1495:             data.get("source_path")
1496:             or payload.get("source_path")
1497:             or metadata.get("source_path")
1498:             or ""
1499:         ).strip()
1500:         source_url = (
1501:             data.get("url")
1502:             or data.get("source_url")
1503:             or data.get("post_url")
1504:             or metadata.get("post_url")
1505:             or ""
1506:         )
1507: 
1508:         task_type = parse_task_type(data.get("task_type", metadata.get("task_type", "video")))
1509:         if task_type == TaskType.VIDEO and not source_url and not source_path:
1510:             raise ValueError("missing source url/source path for video task")
1511: 
1512:         source_url = self._resolve_video_source_url(
1513:             task_type=task_type,
1514:             source_url=str(source_url or "").strip(),
1515:             payload=payload,
1516:             metadata=metadata,
1517:         )
1518: 
1519:         forum_post_info = self._normalize_forum_post_info(payload=payload, metadata=metadata)
1520:         if forum_post_info:
1521:             metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
1522:             payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
1523: 
1524:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
1525:             forum_post_info=forum_post_info,
1526:             payload=payload,
1527:             metadata=metadata,
1528:             source_url=source_url,
1529:         )
1530:         if original_filename:
1531:             metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
1532:             payload["original_filename"] = original_filename
1533: 
1534:         task_id = str(data.get("task_id") or uuid.uuid4())
1535:         priority = parse_task_priority(data.get("priority", "normal"))
1536:         max_retries_raw = data.get("max_retries", metadata.get("max_retries", self.max_retries_default))
1537:         try:
1538:             max_retries = max(0, int(max_retries_raw))
1539:         except Exception:
1540:             max_retries = self.max_retries_default

1491:     def _build_task(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> UnifiedTask:
1492:         payload = dict(data.get("payload") or {})
1493:         metadata = dict(data.get("metadata") or {})
1494:         source_path = str(
1495:             data.get("source_path")
1496:             or payload.get("source_path")
1497:             or metadata.get("source_path")
1498:             or ""
1499:         ).strip()
1500:         source_url = (
1501:             data.get("url")
1502:             or data.get("source_url")
1503:             or data.get("post_url")
1504:             or metadata.get("post_url")
1505:             or ""
1506:         )
1507: 
1508:         task_type = parse_task_type(data.get("task_type", metadata.get("task_type", "video")))
1509:         if task_type == TaskType.VIDEO and not source_url and not source_path:
1510:             raise ValueError("missing source url/source path for video task")
1511: 
1512:         source_url = self._resolve_video_source_url(
1513:             task_type=task_type,
1514:             source_url=str(source_url or "").strip(),
1515:             payload=payload,
1516:             metadata=metadata,
1517:         )
1518: 
1519:         forum_post_info = self._normalize_forum_post_info(payload=payload, metadata=metadata)
1520:         if forum_post_info:
1521:             metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
1522:             payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
1523: 
1524:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
1525:             forum_post_info=forum_post_info,
1526:             payload=payload,
1527:             metadata=metadata,
1528:             source_url=source_url,
1529:         )
1530:         if original_filename:
1531:             metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
1532:             payload["original_filename"] = original_filename
1533: 
1534:         task_id = str(data.get("task_id") or uuid.uuid4())
1535:         priority = parse_task_priority(data.get("priority", "normal"))
1536:         max_retries_raw = data.get("max_retries", metadata.get("max_retries", self.max_retries_default))
1537:         try:
1538:             max_retries = max(0, int(max_retries_raw))
1539:         except Exception:
1540:             max_retries = self.max_retries_default
1541:         retry_count_raw = data.get("retry_count", metadata.get("retry_count", 0))
1542:         try:
1543:             retry_count = max(0, int(retry_count_raw))
1544:         except Exception:
1545:             retry_count = 0
1546:         current_stage_raw = data.get("current_stage", metadata.get("current_stage", 0))
1547:         stage_checkpoint_raw = data.get("stage_checkpoint", metadata.get("stage_checkpoint"))
1548:         try:
1549:             current_stage = max(0, int(current_stage_raw))
1550:         except Exception:
1551:             current_stage = 0
1552:         stage_checkpoint = None
1553:         if stage_checkpoint_raw is not None:
1554:             stage_checkpoint = str(stage_checkpoint_raw).strip() or None
1555: 
1556:         metadata.setdefault("task_type", task_type.value)
1557:         metadata.setdefault("source", metadata.get("source", "monitor_dispatch"))
1558: 
1559:         task = UnifiedTask(
1560:             task_id=task_id,
1561:             task_type=task_type,
1562:             source=metadata.get("source", "monitor_dispatch"),
1563:             source_url=source_url or None,
1564:             source_path=source_path or None,
1565:             status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
1566:             priority=priority,
1567:             payload=payload,
1568:             metadata=metadata,
1569:             created_at=datetime.now(),
1570:             retry_count=retry_count,
1571:             max_retries=max_retries,
1572:             current_stage=current_stage,
1573:             stage_checkpoint=stage_checkpoint,
1574:         )
1575:         self._sync_task_metadata(task)
1576: 
1577:         return task
1578: 
1579:     def _apply_video_output_naming(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1580:         normalized_result = dict(result or {})
1581:         output_path = str(normalized_result.get("output_path") or "").strip()
1582:         if not output_path:
1583:             return normalized_result
1584: 
1585:         metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
1586:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
1587:             forum_post_info=metadata.get("forum_post_info"),
1588:             payload=task.payload,
1589:             metadata=metadata,
1590:             source_url=str(task.source_url or ""),
1591:         )
1592:         if not original_filename:
1593:             return normalized_result
1594:         if self._is_final_output_already_equivalent(
1595:             output_path=output_path,
1596:             original_filename=original_filename,
1597:         ):
1598:             metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
1599:             metadata["named_output_path"] = output_path
1600:             task.metadata = metadata
1601:             return normalized_result
1602: 
1603:         try:
1604:             named_output_path = self._resolve_named_output_path(
1605:                 output_path=output_path,
1606:                 original_filename=original_filename,
1607:             )
1608:         except Exception as exc:
1609:             self.logger.warning(
1610:                 "output naming fallback to stage output: task=%s err=%s",
1611:                 task.task_id,
1612:                 exc,
1613:             )
1614:             return normalized_result
1615: 
1616:         metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
1617:         metadata["named_output_path"] = named_output_path
1618:         task.metadata = metadata
1619: 
1620:         if named_output_path != output_path:
1621:             normalized_result["original_output_path"] = output_path
1622:             normalized_result["named_output_path"] = named_output_path
1623:             normalized_result["output_path"] = named_output_path
1624:         return normalized_result
1625: 
1626:     def _is_final_output_already_equivalent(self, output_path: str, original_filename: str) -> bool:
1627:         output_file = Path(str(output_path or "").strip())
1628:         output_name = output_file.name
1629:         if not output_name:
1630:             return False
1631:         parsed = Path(self._sanitize_filename(original_filename))

=== lines 1752-1892 ===
1752:     def _normalize_forum_post_info(
1753:         self,
1754:         payload: Dict[str, Any],
1755:         metadata: Dict[str, Any],
1756:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1757:         merged: Dict[str, Any] = {}
1758:         payload_info = payload.get("forum_post_info")
1759:         if isinstance(payload_info, dict):
1760:             merged.update(payload_info)
1761:         metadata_info = metadata.get("forum_post_info")
1762:         if isinstance(metadata_info, dict):
1763:             merged.update(metadata_info)
1764: 
1765:         if not merged and not payload.get("hotwords") and not payload.get("original_filename"):
1766:             return {}
1767: 
1768:         hotwords = self._normalize_text_list(
1769:             merged.get("hotwords"),
1770:             payload.get("hotwords"),
1771:             metadata.get("hotwords"),
1772:             merged.get("keywords"),
1773:             payload.get("keywords"),
1774:             metadata.get("keywords"),
1775:         )
1776:         if hotwords:
1777:             merged["hotwords"] = hotwords
1778: 
1779:         cover_up = self._pick_first_text(
1780:             merged.get("cover_title_up"),
1781:             merged.get("封面标题上"),
1782:             payload.get("cover_title_up"),
1783:             payload.get("封面标题上"),
1784:             metadata.get("cover_title_up"),
1785:             metadata.get("封面标题上"),
1786:         )
1787:         cover_middle = self._pick_first_text(
1788:             merged.get("cover_title_middle"),
1789:             merged.get("封面标题中"),
1790:             payload.get("cover_title_middle"),
1791:             payload.get("封面标题中"),
1792:             metadata.get("cover_title_middle"),
1793:             metadata.get("封面标题中"),
1794:         )
1795:         cover_down = self._pick_first_text(
1796:             merged.get("cover_title_down"),
1797:             merged.get("封面标题下"),
1798:             payload.get("cover_title_down"),
1799:             payload.get("封面标题下"),
1800:             metadata.get("cover_title_down"),
1801:             metadata.get("封面标题下"),
1802:         )
1803: 
1804:         cover_titles = self._normalize_text_list(merged.get("cover_titles"))
1805:         if not cover_up and len(cover_titles) >= 1:
1806:             cover_up = cover_titles[0]
1807:         if not cover_middle and len(cover_titles) >= 2:
1808:             cover_middle = cover_titles[1]
1809:         if not cover_down and len(cover_titles) >= 3:
1810:             cover_down = cover_titles[2]
1811: 
1812:         compact_titles = [text for text in (cover_up, cover_middle, cover_down) if text]
1813:         if compact_titles:
1814:             merged["cover_titles"] = compact_titles
1815:             merged["cover_title_up"] = cover_up
1816:             merged["cover_title_middle"] = cover_middle
1817:             merged["cover_title_down"] = cover_down
1818:             merged["封面标题上"] = cover_up
1819:             merged["封面标题中"] = cover_middle
1820:             merged["封面标题下"] = cover_down
1821: 
1822:         speaker = self._pick_first_text(
1823:             merged.get("speaker"),
1824:             merged.get("speaker_id"),
1825:             merged.get("spk"),
1826:             merged.get("target_speaker"),
1827:         )
1828:         if speaker:
1829:             merged["speaker"] = speaker
1830: 
1831:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
1832:             forum_post_info=merged,
1833:             payload=payload,
1834:             metadata=metadata,
1835:             source_url="",
1836:         )
1837:         if original_filename:
1838:             merged["original_filename"] = original_filename
1839:         return merged
1840: 
1841:     def _normalize_text_list(self, *values: Any) -> List[str]:
1842:         output: List[str] = []
1843:         seen: set[str] = set()
1844:         for value in values:
1845:             items: List[str] = []
1846:             if isinstance(value, list):
1847:                 items = [str(item or "").strip() for item in value]
1848:             elif isinstance(value, str):
1849:                 items = [item.strip() for item in value.replace("\uFF0C", ",").split(",")]
1850:             for item in items:
1851:                 normalized = " ".join(item.split())
1852:                 if not normalized:
1853:                     continue
1854:                 dedup_key = normalized.lower()
1855:                 if dedup_key in seen:
1856:                     continue
1857:                 seen.add(dedup_key)
1858:                 output.append(normalized)
1859:         return output
1860: 
1861:     def _pick_first_text(self, *values: Any) -> str:
1862:         for value in values:
1863:             text = str(value or "").strip()
1864:             if text:
1865:                 return text
1866:         return ""
1867: 
1868:     def _sanitize_filename(self, value: str) -> str:
1869:         text = str(value or "").strip()
1870:         if not text:
1871:             return ""
1872:         text = text.replace("\\", "/").split("/")[-1].strip()
1873:         text = re.sub(r"[\x00-\x1f]", "", text)
1874:         text = re.sub(r"[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]+", "_", text)
1875:         text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip().strip(".")
1876:         return text
1877: 
1878:     def _init_task_storage(self) -> Optional[SqliteStorageAdapter]:
1879:         db_path = os.getenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", "data/clonecut.db")
1880:         try:
1881:             return SqliteStorageAdapter(db_path=db_path, logger=self.logger)
1882:         except Exception as exc:
1883:             self.logger.warning("sqlite storage disabled: %s", exc)
1884:             return None
1885: 
1886:     def _save_task_snapshot(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
1887:         self._sync_task_metadata(task)
1888:         if self.task_storage is None:
1889:             return
1890:         self.task_storage.save_task(task)
1891: 
1892:     def _persist_task(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:

我在代码里确认到第二个关键点了：现成的 worker/API 已经能接任务、带 hotwords/speaker/cover_titles/original_filename 这类上下文，但它的“真实执行器”仍是把任务丢给 pre/main/pipeline.py 这个旧脚本链路。也就是说，平台入口有了，真正适合 skill 对接的“稳定能力接口”还没有。

  25: def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:

  38:     def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
  39:         if _web_mock_mode:
  40:             return True
  41:         raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
  42:         return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

  44:     def _require_token(f):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  45:         @wraps(f)
  46:         def decorated(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any:
  47:             if not _api_token:
  48:                 return f(*args, **kwargs)
  49:             auth = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
  50:             token = auth.removeprefix("Bearer ").strip() if auth.startswith("Bearer ") else ""
  51:             if not token:
  52:                 token = request.args.get("token", "").strip()
  53:             if token != _api_token:
  54:                 return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "unauthorized"}), 401
  55:             return f(*args, **kwargs)
  56: 
  57:         return decorated
  58:

 116:     @app.get("/api/status")
 117:     def status() -> Any:
 118:         return jsonify({"success": True, **service.get_status()})
 119: 
 120:     @app.get("/api/queues")
 121:     def queue_status() -> Any:
 122:         payload = service.get_status()
 123:         return jsonify(
 124:             {
 125:                 "success": True,
 126:                 "queue_sizes": payload.get("queue_sizes", {}),
 127:                 "queues": payload.get("queues", {}),
 128:                 "task_status_counts": payload.get("task_status_counts", {}),
 129:                 "timestamp": payload.get("timestamp"),
 130:             }
 131:         )
 132: 
 133:     @app.get("/api/resources")
 134:     def resources_current() -> Any:
 135:         return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})
 136: 
 137:     @app.get("/api/resources/history")
 138:     def resources_history() -> Any:
 139:         try:
 140:             minutes = max(1, min(1440, int(request.args.get("minutes", "60"))))
 141:         except ValueError:
 142:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid minutes param"}), 400
 143:         return jsonify(
 144:             {"success": True, "minutes": minutes, "history": service.get_resources_history(minutes=minutes)}
 145:         )
 146: 
 147:     @app.get("/api/tasks")
 148:     def list_tasks() -> Any:
 149:         status = request.args.get("status")
 150:         limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
 151:         offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
 152:         try:
 153:             limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
 154:             offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
 155:         except ValueError:
 156:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400
 157: 
 158:         try:
 159:             payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
 160:         except ValueError as exc:
 161:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
 162:         return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})
 163: 
 164:     @app.post("/api/tasks")
 165:     @_require_token
 166:     def create_task() -> Any:
 167:         data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
 168:         ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
 169:         if not ok:
 170:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
 171:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201
 172: 
 173:     @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>")
 174:     def task_detail(task_id: str) -> Any:
 175:         task = service.get_task(task_id)
 176:         if task is None:
 177:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
 178:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task})
 179: 
 180:     @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/cancel")
 181:     @_require_token
 182:     def cancel_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
 183:         ok, error = service.cancel_task(task_id)
 184:         if not ok:
 185:             code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
 186:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
 187:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})
 188: 
 189:     @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/retry")
 190:     @_require_token
 191:     def retry_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
 192:         ok, error = service.retry_task(task_id)
 193:         if not ok:
 194:             code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
 195:             return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
 196:         return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})
 197: 
 198:     return app
 199: 
 200: 
 201: def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
 202:     try:
 203:         from waitress import serve
 204: 
 205:         logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
 206:         serve(app, host=host, port=port)
 207:     except Exception:
 208:         logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
 209:         app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)
 210: 
 211: 
 212: def main() -> int:
 213:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut API service")
 214:     parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
 215:     parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
 216:     parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
 217:     args = parser.parse_args()
 218: 
 219:     cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
 220:     cfg.role = "api"
 221:     cfg.port = args.port or cfg.port
 222:     cfg.host = args.host or cfg.host
 223:     if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
 224:         cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"
 225: 
 226:     setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
 227:     logger = logging.getLogger("apps.api")
 228:     logger.info("api booting env=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.host, cfg.port)
 229: 
 230:     service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
 231:     app = create_app(service)
 232:     _run_http(app, cfg.host, cfg.port, logger)
 233:     return 0
 234: 
 235: 
 236: if __name__ == "__main__":
 237:     raise SystemExit(main())

1270:     def _process_video_like(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1271:         source_path = str(task.source_path or "").strip()
1272:         use_internal = self.internal_pipeline_enabled or not self.video_adapter.is_enabled()
1273:         if use_internal:
1274:             if not source_path or not Path(source_path).exists():
1275:                 raise RuntimeError("internal pipeline requires a valid source_path")
1276:             engine = "internal_pipeline"
1277:             if not self.internal_pipeline_enabled:
1278:                 engine = "internal_pipeline_auto"
1279:             result = self._run_internal_video_pipeline(task=task, source_path=source_path)
1280:             result["engine"] = engine
1281:             return result
1282: 
1283:         if self.video_adapter.is_enabled():
1284:             result = self.video_adapter.process(task)
1285:             task.current_stage = 9
1286:             task.stage_checkpoint = "video_command"

1288:

1291:     def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1292:         stage_names = [
1293:             "stage0_clean",
1294:             "stage1_transcode",
1295:             "stage2_silence",
1296:             "stage3_repair",
1297:             "stage4_asr",
1298:             "stage5_ai_text",
1299:             "stage6_clip",
1300:             "stage6_5_resub",
1301:             "stage7_correct",
1302:             "stage7_subtitle",
1303:             "stage8_cover",
1304:             "stage9_organize",
1305:         ]
1306:         # Internal pipeline is currently executed as a full run for determinism.
1307:         start_from_stage = 0
1308: 
1309:         task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
1310:         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
1311: 
1312:         source = Path(source_path)
1313:         if not source.exists():
1314:             task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[start_from_stage]
1315:             task.current_stage = start_from_stage
1316:             raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")
1317: 
1318:         repo_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
1319:         pipeline_script = repo_root / "domain" / "video" / "pre" / "main" / "pipeline.py"
1320:         if not pipeline_script.exists():
1321:             raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline script missing: {pipeline_script}")
1322: 
1323:         timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("internal_pipeline_timeout_seconds", 7200)
1324:         try:
1325:             timeout_seconds = max(60, int(timeout_raw))
1326:         except Exception:
1327:             timeout_seconds = 7200
1328: 
1329:         cmd = [
1330:             sys.executable,
1331:             str(pipeline_script),
1332:             "--input",
1333:             str(source),
1334:             "--output",
1335:             str(task_dir),
1336:         ]
1337:         if importlib.util.find_spec("funasr") is None:
1338:             return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
1339:                 task=task,
1340:                 source=source,
1341:                 task_dir=task_dir,
1342:                 stage_names=stage_names,
1343:                 start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
1344:                 reason="missing dependency: funasr",
1345:             )
1346:         try:
1347:             started = time.perf_counter()
1348:             proc = subprocess.run(
1349:                 cmd,
1350:                 cwd=str(repo_root),
1351:                 capture_output=True,
1352:                 text=True,
1353:                 encoding="utf-8",
1354:                 errors="replace",
1355:                 timeout=timeout_seconds,
1356:             )
1357:             elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
1358: 
1359:             if proc.returncode != 0:
1360:                 combined = "\n".join(
1361:                     [str(proc.stdout or "").strip(), str(proc.stderr or "").strip()]
1362:                 ).strip()
1363:                 tail_lines = [line for line in combined.splitlines() if line.strip()][-20:]
1364:                 tail_text = "\n".join(tail_lines)
1365:                 raise RuntimeError(
1366:                     f"internal pipeline failed: exit={proc.returncode} "
1367:                     f"timeout={timeout_seconds}s tail=\n{tail_text}"
1368:                 )
1369: 
1370:             output_path = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(task_dir=task_dir, source_path=source)
1371:             executed = stage_names[start_from_stage:]
1372:             task.current_stage = len(stage_names) - 1
1373:             task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[-1]
1374:             return {
1375:                 "success": True,
1376:                 "request_type": task.task_type.value,
1377:                 "output_path": str(output_path),

1408: 
1409:         last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))

1411:             raise RuntimeError(
