  40: class VideoClipper():
  41:     def __init__(self, funasr_model):
  42:         # 在 VideoClipper 初始化时也打印一下传入的 model，可以帮助确认
  43:         print(f"DEBUG: VideoClipper.__init__ - funasr_model object ID: {id(funasr_model)}")
  44:         if hasattr(funasr_model, 'model') and hasattr(funasr_model.model, 'model_path'): # FunASR >=1.0.10
  45:             print(f"DEBUG: VideoClipper.__init__ - FunASR ASR model path: {funasr_model.model.model_path}")
  46:         elif hasattr(funasr_model, 'model_path'): # Older FunASR
  47:              print(f"DEBUG: VideoClipper.__init__ - FunASR ASR model path: {funasr_model.model_path}")
  48:         else:
  49:             print(f"DEBUG: VideoClipper.__init__ - FunASR ASR model path attribute not found directly.")
  50:         
  51:         logging.warning("Initializing VideoClipper.")
  52:         self.funasr_model = funasr_model
  53:         self.GLOBAL_COUNT = 0
  54:         self.lang = 'zh'
  55:     def recog(self, audio_input, sd_switch='no', state=None, hotwords="", output_dir=None):
  56:         # --- BEGIN ADDED LOGS ---
  57:         print(f"--- VideoClipper.recog CALLED ---")
  58:         print(f"DEBUG: Received hotwords: '{hotwords}' (type: {type(hotwords)})")
  59:         print(f"DEBUG: Current self.lang: {self.lang}")
  60:         print(f"DEBUG: Using funasr_model object ID: {id(self.funasr_model)}")
  61: 
  62:         # 尝试打印模型内部的一些配置信息，这取决于FunASR的API结构
  63:         # 对于 FunASR AutoModel，可以直接访问其初始化参数
  64:         if hasattr(self.funasr_model, 'init_params') and self.funasr_model.init_params:
  65:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params['model']: {self.funasr_model.init_params.get('model')}")
  66:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params['punc_model']: {self.funasr_model.init_params.get('punc_model')}")
  67:         else:
  68:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params not found or empty.")
  69:         # --- END ADDED LOGS ---
  70: 
  71:         if state is None:
  72:             state = {}
  73:         sr, data = audio_input
  74: 
  75:         # Convert to float64 consistently (includes data type checking)
  76:         data = convert_pcm_to_float(data)
  77: 
  78:         # assert sr == 16000, "16kHz sample rate required, {} given.".format(sr)
  79:         if sr != 16000: # resample with librosa
  80:             data = librosa.resample(data, orig_sr=sr, target_sr=16000)
  81:         if len(data.shape) == 2:  # multi-channel wav input
  82:             logging.warning("Input wav shape: {}, only first channel reserved.".format(data.shape))
  83:             data = data[:,0]
  84:         state['audio_input'] = (sr, data)
  85:         
  86:         rec_result = self.funasr_model.generate(data, 
  87:                                                 return_spk_res=(sd_switch == 'Yes'),
  88:                                                 sentence_timestamp=True, 
  89:                                                 return_raw_text=True, 
  90:                                                 is_final=True, 
  91:                                                 hotword=hotwords,
  92:                                                 output_dir=output_dir,
  93:                                                 pred_timestamp=self.lang=='en',
  94:                                                 en_post_proc=self.lang=='en',
  95:                                                 cache={})
  96:         
  97:         sentence_info = rec_result[0]['sentence_info']
  98:         if sd_switch == 'Yes':
  99:             state['sd_sentences'] = sentence_info
 100:         
 101:         # 读取字幕分割配置
 102:         try:
 103:             # 尝试导入配置模块
 104:             import importlib.util
 105:             spec = importlib.util.find_spec('funclip.config')
 106:             if spec is not None:
 107:                 # 配置模块存在，导入它
 108:                 import funclip.config as cfg
 109:                 enable_split = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING', True)
 110:                 max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', 9)
 111:                 logging.info(f"成功从配置文件读取字幕设置: enable_split={enable_split}, max_chars={max_chars}")
 112:             else:
 113:                 # 配置模块不存在，使用默认值
 114:                 enable_split = True
 115:                 max_chars = 9
 116:                 logging.warning("未找到配置文件 funclip/config.py，使用默认字幕设置: enable_split=True, max_chars=9")
 117:         except Exception as e:
 118:             # 出现异常，使用默认值
 119:             enable_split = True
 120:             max_chars = 9
 121:             logging.warning(f"读取配置文件时出错: {str(e)}，使用默认字幕设置: enable_split=True, max_chars=9")
 122: 
 123:         # Split long sentences based on configuration
 124:         if enable_split:
 125:             logging.info("🎬 开始字幕分割处理...")
 126:             logging.info(f"📋 字幕分割配置: enable_split={enable_split}, max_chars={max_chars}")
 127: 
 128:             if isinstance(sentence_info, list):
 129:                 logging.info(f"📊 输入句子数量: {len(sentence_info)}")
 130: 
 131:                 # 记录分割前的统计
 132:                 total_chars_before = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 133:                                        for s in sentence_info)
 134:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割前总汉字数: {total_chars_before}")
 135: 
 136:                 # 转换数据格式：从 timestamp 格式转换为 ts_list 格式
 137:                 sentence_info_with_ts_list = []
 138:                 for sentence in sentence_info:
 139:                     sentence_copy = copy.deepcopy(sentence)
 140:                     text = sentence_copy.get('text', '')
 141:                     timestamp = sentence_copy.get('timestamp', [])
 142: 
 143:                     # 如果没有 ts_list 但有 timestamp，则构建 ts_list
 144:                     if 'ts_list' not in sentence_copy and timestamp and text:
 145:                         # 将文本按字符分割，与时间戳对应
 146:                         chars = list(text)
 147:                         ts_list = []
 148: 
 149:                         # 确保字符数和时间戳数匹配
 150:                         min_len = min(len(chars), len(timestamp))
 151:                         for i in range(min_len):
 152:                             char = chars[i]
 153:                             start_time = timestamp[i][0]
 154:                             end_time = timestamp[i][1]
 155:                             ts_list.append([char, start_time, end_time])
 156: 
 157:                         sentence_copy['ts_list'] = ts_list
 158:                         logging.info(f"   转换句子: '{text[:20]}...' -> {len(ts_list)}个词时间戳")
 159: 
 160:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list.append(sentence_copy)
 161: 
 162:                 processed_sentence_info = process_sentence_timestamps(
 163:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list,
 164:                     max_chars=max_chars
 165:                 )
 166: 
 167:                 # 记录分割后的统计
 168:                 total_chars_after = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 169:                                       for s in processed_sentence_info)
 170:                 logging.info(f"📊 分割后片段数量: {len(processed_sentence_info)}")
 171:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割后总汉字数: {total_chars_after}")

=== domain/video/funclip/videoclipper.py lines 55-225 ===
  55:     def recog(self, audio_input, sd_switch='no', state=None, hotwords="", output_dir=None):
  56:         # --- BEGIN ADDED LOGS ---
  57:         print(f"--- VideoClipper.recog CALLED ---")
  58:         print(f"DEBUG: Received hotwords: '{hotwords}' (type: {type(hotwords)})")
  59:         print(f"DEBUG: Current self.lang: {self.lang}")
  60:         print(f"DEBUG: Using funasr_model object ID: {id(self.funasr_model)}")
  61: 
  62:         # 尝试打印模型内部的一些配置信息，这取决于FunASR的API结构
  63:         # 对于 FunASR AutoModel，可以直接访问其初始化参数
  64:         if hasattr(self.funasr_model, 'init_params') and self.funasr_model.init_params:
  65:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params['model']: {self.funasr_model.init_params.get('model')}")
  66:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params['punc_model']: {self.funasr_model.init_params.get('punc_model')}")
  67:         else:
  68:              print(f"DEBUG: FunASR Model init_params not found or empty.")
  69:         # --- END ADDED LOGS ---
  70: 
  71:         if state is None:
  72:             state = {}
  73:         sr, data = audio_input
  74: 
  75:         # Convert to float64 consistently (includes data type checking)
  76:         data = convert_pcm_to_float(data)
  77: 
  78:         # assert sr == 16000, "16kHz sample rate required, {} given.".format(sr)
  79:         if sr != 16000: # resample with librosa
  80:             data = librosa.resample(data, orig_sr=sr, target_sr=16000)
  81:         if len(data.shape) == 2:  # multi-channel wav input
  82:             logging.warning("Input wav shape: {}, only first channel reserved.".format(data.shape))
  83:             data = data[:,0]
  84:         state['audio_input'] = (sr, data)
  85:         
  86:         rec_result = self.funasr_model.generate(data, 
  87:                                                 return_spk_res=(sd_switch == 'Yes'),
  88:                                                 sentence_timestamp=True, 
  89:                                                 return_raw_text=True, 
  90:                                                 is_final=True, 
  91:                                                 hotword=hotwords,
  92:                                                 output_dir=output_dir,
  93:                                                 pred_timestamp=self.lang=='en',
  94:                                                 en_post_proc=self.lang=='en',
  95:                                                 cache={})
  96:         
  97:         sentence_info = rec_result[0]['sentence_info']
  98:         if sd_switch == 'Yes':
  99:             state['sd_sentences'] = sentence_info
 100:         
 101:         # 读取字幕分割配置
 102:         try:
 103:             # 尝试导入配置模块
 104:             import importlib.util
 105:             spec = importlib.util.find_spec('funclip.config')
 106:             if spec is not None:
 107:                 # 配置模块存在，导入它
 108:                 import funclip.config as cfg
 109:                 enable_split = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING', True)
 110:                 max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', 9)
 111:                 logging.info(f"成功从配置文件读取字幕设置: enable_split={enable_split}, max_chars={max_chars}")
 112:             else:
 113:                 # 配置模块不存在，使用默认值
 114:                 enable_split = True
 115:                 max_chars = 9
 116:                 logging.warning("未找到配置文件 funclip/config.py，使用默认字幕设置: enable_split=True, max_chars=9")
 117:         except Exception as e:
 118:             # 出现异常，使用默认值
 119:             enable_split = True
 120:             max_chars = 9
 121:             logging.warning(f"读取配置文件时出错: {str(e)}，使用默认字幕设置: enable_split=True, max_chars=9")
 122: 
 123:         # Split long sentences based on configuration
 124:         if enable_split:
 125:             logging.info("🎬 开始字幕分割处理...")
 126:             logging.info(f"📋 字幕分割配置: enable_split={enable_split}, max_chars={max_chars}")
 127: 
 128:             if isinstance(sentence_info, list):
 129:                 logging.info(f"📊 输入句子数量: {len(sentence_info)}")
 130: 
 131:                 # 记录分割前的统计
 132:                 total_chars_before = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 133:                                        for s in sentence_info)
 134:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割前总汉字数: {total_chars_before}")
 135: 
 136:                 # 转换数据格式：从 timestamp 格式转换为 ts_list 格式
 137:                 sentence_info_with_ts_list = []
 138:                 for sentence in sentence_info:
 139:                     sentence_copy = copy.deepcopy(sentence)
 140:                     text = sentence_copy.get('text', '')
 141:                     timestamp = sentence_copy.get('timestamp', [])
 142: 
 143:                     # 如果没有 ts_list 但有 timestamp，则构建 ts_list
 144:                     if 'ts_list' not in sentence_copy and timestamp and text:
 145:                         # 将文本按字符分割，与时间戳对应
 146:                         chars = list(text)
 147:                         ts_list = []
 148: 
 149:                         # 确保字符数和时间戳数匹配
 150:                         min_len = min(len(chars), len(timestamp))
 151:                         for i in range(min_len):
 152:                             char = chars[i]
 153:                             start_time = timestamp[i][0]
 154:                             end_time = timestamp[i][1]
 155:                             ts_list.append([char, start_time, end_time])
 156: 
 157:                         sentence_copy['ts_list'] = ts_list
 158:                         logging.info(f"   转换句子: '{text[:20]}...' -> {len(ts_list)}个词时间戳")
 159: 
 160:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list.append(sentence_copy)
 161: 
 162:                 processed_sentence_info = process_sentence_timestamps(
 163:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list,
 164:                     max_chars=max_chars
 165:                 )
 166: 
 167:                 # 记录分割后的统计
 168:                 total_chars_after = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 169:                                       for s in processed_sentence_info)
 170:                 logging.info(f"📊 分割后片段数量: {len(processed_sentence_info)}")
 171:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割后总汉字数: {total_chars_after}")
 172: 
 173:                 if total_chars_before != total_chars_after:
 174:                     logging.warning(f"⚠️ 字符数不匹配! 分割前: {total_chars_before}, 分割后: {total_chars_after}")
 175:                 else:
 176:                     logging.info("✅ 字符数匹配，分割成功")
 177:             else:
 178:                 processed_sentence_info = sentence_info
 179:                 logging.info("📝 输入不是列表格式，跳过分割")
 180:         else:
 181:             processed_sentence_info = sentence_info
 182:             logging.info("🚫 字幕分割功能已禁用")
 183: 
 184:         # Ensure 'timestamp' key exists in each sentence dict for generate_srt
 185:         for s in processed_sentence_info:
 186:             if 'ts_list' in s and 'timestamp' not in s:
 187:                 s['timestamp'] = [[ts[1], ts[2]] for ts in s['ts_list']]
 188: 
 189:         res_srt = generate_srt(processed_sentence_info)
 190:         
 191:         state['recog_res_raw'] = rec_result[0]['raw_text']
 192:         state['timestamp'] = rec_result[0]['timestamp']
 193:         state['sentences'] = sentence_info
 194:         state['zimu'] = processed_sentence_info
 195:         res_text = rec_result[0]['text']
 196:         return res_text, res_srt, state
 197: 
 198:     def clip(self, dest_text, start_ost, end_ost, state, dest_spk=None, output_dir=None, timestamp_list=None):
 199:         # get from state
 200:         audio_input = state['audio_input']
 201:         recog_res_raw = state['recog_res_raw']
 202:         timestamp = state['timestamp']
 203:         # 使用分割后的字幕数据，如果存在的话
 204:         sentences = state.get('zimu', state['sentences'])
 205:         logging.info(f"clip方法: 使用{'分割后' if 'zimu' in state else '原始'}字幕数据，共{len(sentences)}个片段")
 206:         sr, data = audio_input
 207:         data = data.astype(np.float64)
 208: 
 209:         if timestamp_list is None:
 210:             all_ts = []
 211:             if dest_spk is None or dest_spk == '' or 'sd_sentences' not in state:
 212:                 for _dest_text in dest_text.split('#'):
 213:                     if '[' in _dest_text:
 214:                         match = re.search(r'\[(\d+),\s*(\d+)\]', _dest_text)
 215:                         if match:
 216:                             offset_b, offset_e = map(int, match.groups())
 217:                             log_append = ""
 218:                         else:
 219:                             offset_b, offset_e = 0, 0
 220:                             log_append = "(Bracket detected in dest_text but offset time matching failed)"
 221:                         _dest_text = _dest_text[:_dest_text.find('[')]
 222:                     else:
 223:                         log_append = ""
 224:                         offset_b, offset_e = 0, 0
 225:                     _dest_text = pre_proc(_dest_text)

=== domain/video/funclip/videoclipper.py lines 198-368 ===
 198:     def clip(self, dest_text, start_ost, end_ost, state, dest_spk=None, output_…7627 tokens truncated…imestamp,
 933:                           dest_text_processed=processed_dest_text,
 934:                           max_skips_allowed=10)
 935:                 for _ts in ts: all_ts.append(_ts)
 936:         else:
 937:             for _dest_spk in dest_spk.split('#'):
 938:                 ts = proc_spk(_dest_spk, state['sd_sentences'])
 939:                 for _ts in ts: all_ts.append(_ts)
 940: 
 941:         if not all_ts:
 942:             message = "No period found in the audio, return raw video."
 943:             return video_filename, message, ''
 944: 
 945:         # 将时间戳(样本数)转换为秒
 946:         all_ts_seconds = []
 947:         for start_sample, end_sample in sorted(all_ts):
 948:             start_sec = (start_sample + start_ost * 16) / 16000.0
 949:             end_sec = (end_sample + end_ost * 16) / 16000.0
 950:             if start_sec < end_sec:
 951:                 all_ts_seconds.append((start_sec, end_sec))
 952: 
 953:         # 构建ffmpeg filter_complex字符串
 954:         select_filter_v = "+".join([f"between(t,{s},{e})" for s, e in all_ts_seconds])
 955:         select_filter_a = select_filter_v
 956:         
 957:         filter_complex = (
 958:             f"[0:v]select='{select_filter_v}',setpts=N/FRAME_RATE/TB[v];"
 959:             f"[0:a]aselect='{select_filter_a}',asetpts=N/SR/TB[a]"
 960:         )
 961: 
 962:         # 构建ffmpeg命令
 963:         ffmpeg_cmd = [
 964:             'ffmpeg',
 965:             '-y',
 966:             '-i', video_filename,
 967:             '-filter_complex', filter_complex,
 968:             '-map', '[v]',
 969:             '-map', '[a]',
 970:             '-c:v', 'h264_nvenc', # 直接使用NVIDIA编码器
 971:             '-preset', 'p1',    # 使用最快速的预设
 972:             '-cq', '25',        # 添加固定质量参数，数值越低，质量越好
 973:             '-loglevel', 'error', # 只显示错误信息
 974:             clip_video_file
 975:         ]
 976:         
 977:         logging.info(f"Executing direct ffmpeg command: {' '.join(ffmpeg_cmd)}")
 978:         print("正在使用高性能模式 (direct ffmpeg) 进行剪辑...")
 979: 
 980:         try:
 981:             subprocess.run(ffmpeg_cmd, check=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
 982:             message = f"Successfully clipped video using direct ffmpeg. {len(all_ts_seconds)} segments concatenated."
 983:             logging.info("Direct ffmpeg clipping successful.")
 984:             
 985:             # 生成剪辑后的SRT字幕
 986:             clip_srt = ""
 987:             srt_index = 0
 988:             for start_sec, end_sec in all_ts_seconds:
 989:                 srt_clip, _, srt_index = generate_srt_clip(sentences, start_sec, end_sec, begin_index=srt_index)
 990:                 clip_srt += srt_clip
 991:         
 992:         except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
 993:             message = f"Error during direct ffmpeg clipping: {e.stderr}"
 994:             logging.error(message)
 995:             # 如果GPU加速失败，这里可以增加一个回退到CPU的逻辑
 996:             logging.info("Falling back to CPU encoding...")
 997:             fallback_cmd = [
 998:                 'ffmpeg',
 999:                 '-y',
1000:                 '-i', video_filename,
1001:                 '-filter_complex', filter_complex,
1002:                 '-map', '[v]',
1003:                 '-map', '[a]',
1004:                 '-c:v', 'libx264',
1005:                 '-preset', 'veryfast',
1006:                 '-loglevel', 'error',
1007:                 clip_video_file
1008:             ]
1009:             try:
1010:                 subprocess.run(fallback_cmd, check=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
1011:                 message = "Successfully clipped video using direct ffmpeg with CPU fallback."
1012:                 logging.info("Direct ffmpeg clipping successful with CPU fallback.")
1013:                 # 重新生成SRT
1014:                 clip_srt = ""
1015:                 srt_index = 0
1016:                 for start_sec, end_sec in all_ts_seconds:
1017:                     srt_clip, _, srt_index = generate_srt_clip(sentences, start_sec, end_sec, begin_index=srt_index)
1018:                     clip_srt += srt_clip
1019:             except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e_cpu:
1020:                 message = f"CPU fallback also failed: {e_cpu.stderr}"
1021:                 logging.error(message)
1022:                 return video_filename, message, ''
1023:         finally:
1024:             if 'video' in state and state['video'] is not None:
1025:                 state['video'].close()
1026: 
1027:         return clip_video_file, message, clip_srt
1028: 
1029: 
1030: def get_parser():
1031:     parser = ArgumentParser(
1032:         description='总结和剪切视频 | Summarize and Clip Video',
1033:         formatter_class=argparse.ArgumentDefaultsHelpFormatter)
1034:     parser.add_argument('--stage', type=int, default=1, choices=(1, 2), help='stage 1: 识别视频 | recognize video/audio; stage 2: 剪辑视频 | clip video')
1035:     parser.add_argument('--file', type=str, help='输入视频/音频路径 | video/audio path')
1036:     parser.add_argument('--sd_switch', type=str, default='no', choices=('yes', 'no'), help='是否进行说话人分离 | speaker diarization')
1037:     parser.add_argument('--hotwords', type=str, default="", help='热词，以空格分隔 | hotwords, separated by space')
1038:     parser.add_argument('--output_dir', type=str, default='./output', help='输出路径 | output path')
1039:     parser.add_argument('--dest_text', type=str, default='', help='待剪辑文本 | text to be clipped')
1040:     parser.add_argument('--dest_spk', type=str, default=None, help='说话人ID | speaker id')
1041:     parser.add_argument('--start_ost', type=int, default=0, help='开始时间偏移 | start offset(ms) for dest_text timestamp')
1042:     parser.add_argument('--end_ost', type=int, default=100, help='结束时间偏移 | end offset(ms) for dest_text timestamp')
1043:     parser.add_argument('--output_file', type=str, default=None, help='输出文件路径 | output file path')
1044:     # --config 参数已由 ArgumentParser 基类自动添加，无需重复定义
1045:     parser.add_argument('--lang', type=str, default="zh", help='语言(zh/en) | language(zh/en)')
1046:     parser.add_argument('--only_asr', action='store_true', help='仅进行语音识别，而不保存结果 | only do ASR, not save result')
1047:     parser.add_argument('--language', type=str, default=None, help='覆盖lang参数的语言设置(zh/en) | language(zh/en) to override lang param')
1048:     parser.add_argument('--subtitle_format', type=str, default='srt', choices=('srt', 'ass'), help='字幕格式 | subtitle format')
1049:     return parser
1050: 
1051: 
1052: def runner(stage, file, sd_switch, output_dir, dest_text, dest_spk, start_ost, end_ost, output_file, config=None, lang='zh', only_asr=False, language=None, subtitle_format='srt', hotwords=None):
1053:     # 如果提供了language参数，则覆盖lang参数
1054:     if language and language != lang:
1055:         lang = language
1056:         
1057:     # 设置默认空字符串而非None，以便传递给API
1058:     if hotwords is None:
1059:         hotwords = ""
1060:         
1061:     # 根据语言设置模型
1062:     if lang == 'zh':
1063:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
1064:             # ASR模型：Paraformer-large-zh 中文语音识别模型
1065:             # 在60,000小时普通话数据上训练，支持时间戳功能
1066:             model="damo/speech_paraformer-large-vad-punc_asr_nat-zh-cn-16k-common-vocab8404-pytorch",
1067:             # 或使用简化ID: "paraformer-zh"
1068:             
1069:             # VAD模型：基于 FSMN 的语音活动检测模型
1070:             # 用于检测音频中的语音片段，过滤非语音部分
1071:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
1072:             
1073:             # 标点符号模型：基于 Transformer 的中英文标点符号预测模型
1074:             # 支持中英文混合文本的标点符号预测，词表大小471067
1075:             # 相比原来的中文模型(vocab272727)，这个模型支持更好的中英文混合处理
1076:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
1077:             
1078:             # 说话人识别模型：基于 CAMPPlus 的说话人声纹特征提取模型
1079:             # 用于区分不同说话人的声音，支持说话人分离
1080:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
1081:         )
1082:     else:  # 英文模型

=== domain/video/funclip/videoclipper.py lines 1052-1222 ===
1052: def runner(stage, file, sd_switch, output_dir, dest_text, dest_spk, start_ost, end_ost, output_file, config=None, lang='zh', only_asr=False, language=None, subtitle_format='srt', hotwords=None):
1053:     # 如果提供了language参数，则覆盖lang参数
1054:     if language and language != lang:
1055:         lang = language
1056:         
1057:     # 设置默认空字符串而非None，以便传递给API
1058:     if hotwords is None:
1059:         hotwords = ""
1060:         
1061:     # 根据语言设置模型
1062:     if lang == 'zh':
1063:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
1064:             # ASR模型：Paraformer-large-zh 中文语音识别模型
1065:             # 在60,000小时普通话数据上训练，支持时间戳功能
1066:             model="damo/speech_paraformer-large-vad-punc_asr_nat-zh-cn-16k-common-vocab8404-pytorch",
1067:             # 或使用简化ID: "paraformer-zh"
1068:             
1069:             # VAD模型：基于 FSMN 的语音活动检测模型
1070:             # 用于检测音频中的语音片段，过滤非语音部分
1071:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
1072:             
1073:             # 标点符号模型：基于 Transformer 的中英文标点符号预测模型
1074:             # 支持中英文混合文本的标点符号预测，词表大小471067
1075:             # 相比原来的中文模型(vocab272727)，这个模型支持更好的中英文混合处理
1076:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
1077:             
1078:             # 说话人识别模型：基于 CAMPPlus 的说话人声纹特征提取模型
1079:             # 用于区分不同说话人的声音，支持说话人分离
1080:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
1081:         )
1082:     else:  # 英文模型
1083:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
1084:             # ASR模型：基于 Paraformer 的英文语音识别模型
1085:             # 支持16k采样率的英文语音识别，词表大小4199
1086:             model="iic/speech_paraformer_asr-en-16k-vocab4199-pytorch",
1087:             
1088:             # 使用相同的 VAD、标点符号和说话人识别模型
1089:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
1090:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
1091:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
1092:         )
1093:         
1094:     video_clipper = VideoClipper(funasr_model)
1095:     video_clipper.lang = lang
1096:     
1097:     if stage == 1:
1098:         if file.endswith(".mp4") or file.endswith(".MP4") or file.endswith(".mov") or file.endswith(".MOV"):
1099:             res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1100:             # 检查是否只需要ASR结果
1101:             if only_asr:
1102:                 return res_text, res_srt
1103:             if output_dir is not None:
1104:                 os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1105:                 base_name, _ = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(file))
1106:                 res_text_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "script.txt")
1107:                 res_srt_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.srt")
1108:                 
1109:                 with open(res_text_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1110:                     f.write(res_text)
1111:                 with open(res_srt_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1112:                     f.write(res_srt)
1113:                     
1114:                 print(f"Recognized text saved to: {res_text_path}")
1115:                 print(f"Generated SRT subtitle saved to: {res_srt_path}")
1116: 
1117:             # 检查是否为多说话人模式并生成说话人可视化数据
1118:             if sd_switch == 'yes' or sd_switch == 'Yes' and 'sd_sentences' in state:
1119:                 try:
1120:                     from funclip.utils.visualization_utils import visualize_speaker_segments
1121:                     if output_dir is not None:
1122:                         viz_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{base_name}_speakers_viz.html")
1123:                         visualize_speaker_segments(state['sd_sentences'], output_file=viz_path)
1124:                         print(f"Speaker visualization saved to: {viz_path}")
1125:                 except Exception as e:
1126:                     print(f"Failed to generate speaker visualization: {str(e)}")
1127:                     
1128:                 # 生成说话人转写文本，每个说话人独立显示
1129:                 try:
1130:                     if output_dir is not None and 'sd_sentences' in state:
1131:                         spk_txt_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{base_name}_speakers.txt")
1132:                         with open(spk_txt_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1133:                             speakers = {}
1134:                             for sent in state['sd_sentences']:
1135:                                 if 'spk' in sent:
1136:                                     spk_id = f"说话人{sent['spk']}"
1137:                                     if spk_id not in speakers:
1138:                                         speakers[spk_id] = []
1139:                                     speakers[spk_id].append(sent['text'])
1140:                             
1141:                             for spk_id, texts in speakers.items():
1142:                                 f.write(f"=== {spk_id} ===\n")
1143:                                 f.write("\n".join(texts))
1144:                                 f.write("\n\n")
1145:                                 
1146:                         print(f"Speaker transcriptions saved to: {spk_txt_path}")
1147:                 except Exception as e:
1148:                     print(f"Failed to generate speaker transcriptions: {str(e)}")
1149:                 
1150:             return res_text, res_srt
1151:         else:
1152:             sr, data = librosa.load(file, sr=16000)
1153:             res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.recog((sr, data), sd_switch, None, hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1154:             
1155:             # 对于音频文件，同样生成ASS字幕
1156:             if output_dir is not None:
1157:                 try:
1158:                     # 使用统一字幕配置
1159:                     from funclip import config as cfg
1160:                     max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE', None) or getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', 9)
1161:                     from funclip.utils.subtitle_utils import generate_ass
1162:                     base_name, _ = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(file))
1163:                     ass_file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.ass")
1164: 
1165:                     # 使用分割后的字幕数据，而不是原始数据
1166:                     sentence_info = state.get('zimu', state['sentences'])
1167:                     logging.info(f"ASS字幕生成(音频): 使用{'分割后' if 'zimu' in state else '原始'}数据，共{len(sentence_info)}个片段")
1168: 
1169:                     # 获取字幕隐藏配置
1170:                     try:
1171:                         from pre.stage.subtitle.config import DEFAULT_HIDDEN_SUBTITLES_COUNT
1172:                         hidden_subtitles_count = DEFAULT_HIDDEN_SUBTITLES_COUNT
1173:                         logging.info(f"音频ASS字幕隐藏配置: 隐藏前{hidden_subtitles_count}条字幕")
1174:                     except Exception as e:
1175:                         hidden_subtitles_count = 3  # 默认隐藏3条
1176:                         logging.warning(f"无法读取字幕隐藏配置，使用默认值3: {e}")
1177: 
1178:                     # 对于音频文件，使用默认分辨率 720x1280
1179:                     ass_content = generate_ass(sentence_info,
1180:                                              video_width=720, video_height=1280,
1181:                                              line_limit=False, max_chars_per_line=max_chars,
1182:                                              hide_initial_subtitles=True,
1183:                                              hidden_subtitles_count=hidden_subtitles_count)
1184:                     with open(ass_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1185:                         f.write(ass_content)
1186:                     print(f"ASS字幕文件已生成: {ass_file_path} (每行最大{max_chars}字符)")
1187:                     logging.info(f"ASS字幕文件已生成，使用统一配置: max_chars={max_chars}")
1188:                 except Exception as e:
1189:                     logging.error(f"生成ASS字幕时出错: {str(e)}")
1190:             
1191:             return res_text, res_srt
1192:     elif stage == 2:
1193:         state = {}
1194: 
1195:         if file.endswith(".mp4") or file.endswith(".MP4") or file.endswith(".mov") or file.endswith(".MOV"):
1196:             logging.info(f"Stage 2: Processing video file: {file}")
1197: 
1198:             # 尝试加载已有的状态，避免重复语音识别
1199:             if output_dir and os.path.exists(output_dir):
1200:                 try:
1201:                     existing_state = load_state(output_dir)
1202:                     if existing_state and 'sentences' in existing_state:
1203:                         logging.info("✅ 找到已有的语音识别结果，跳过重复识别")
1204:                         state = existing_state
1205: 
1206:                         # 构建识别结果文本和SRT
1207:                         sentences = state.get('zimu', state['sentences'])
1208:                         res_text = state.get('recog_res_raw', '')
1209: 
1210:                         # 如果没有现成的SRT，生成一个
1211:                         if not res_text and sentences:
1212:                             res_text = ' '.join([s.get('text', '') for s in sentences])
1213: 
1214:                         # 生成SRT内容
1215:                         from funclip.utils.subtitle_utils import generate_srt
1216:                         res_srt = generate_srt(sentences)
1217: 
1218:                         logging.info(f"使用已有状态: {'分割后' if 'zimu' in state else '原始'}数据，共{len(sentences)}个片段")
1219:                     else:
1220:                         logging.info("未找到有效的语音识别状态，执行新的识别")
1221:                         res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1222:                 except Exception as e:

=== domain/video/funclip/utils/trans_utils.py lines 1-121 ===
   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
   2: # -*- encoding: utf-8 -*-
   3: # Copyright FunASR (https://github.com/alibaba-damo-academy/FunClip). All Rights Reserved.
   4: #  MIT License  (https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
   5: 
   6: import os
   7: import re
   8: import numpy as np  
   9: 
  10: # PUNC_LIST is not strictly needed anymore with the new pre_proc logic,
  11: # but kept for now if other parts of the code might use it.
  12: PUNC_LIST = ['，', '。', '！', '？', '、', ',', '.', '?', '!']
  13: 
  14: def pre_proc(text):
  15:     # 1. Convert to lowercase.
  16:     text_lower = text.lower()
  17:     
  18:     # 2. Keep only Chinese characters, English letters, and digits.
  19:     #    Remove all other characters (punctuation, spaces,语气词, etc.).
  20:     processed_chars = []
  21:     for char in text_lower:
  22:         # Check for Chinese characters (Unicode range for common CJK Unified Ideographs)
  23:         if '\u4e00' <= char <= '\u9fff':
  24:             processed_chars.append(char)
  25:         # Check for English letters (a-z)
  26:         elif 'a' <= char <= 'z':
  27:             processed_chars.append(char)
  28:         # Check for digits (0-9)
  29:         elif '0' <= char <= '9':
  30:             processed_chars.append(char)
  31:             
  32:     text_filtered = "".join(processed_chars)
  33:     
  34:     # 3. Join every remaining character with a single space.
  35:     if not text_filtered:
  36:         return ""
  37:     return " ".join(list(text_filtered))
  38: 
  39: def proc(raw_text_processed: str, timestamp: list, dest_text_processed: str, lang: str = 'zh', max_skips_allowed: int = 5):
  40:     """
  41:     Finds occurrences of dest_text_processed within raw_text_processed, allowing for a specified number of skips.
  42: 
  43:     Args:
  44:         raw_text_processed: The ASR result, pre-processed into space-separated characters.
  45:         timestamp: A list of [start, end] times (in FunASR frames, 1 unit = 1/16000 s * 16 = 1ms after *16) 
  46:                    corresponding to each character in raw_text_processed.
  47:         dest_text_processed: The target text, pre-processed into space-separated characters.
  48:         lang: Language code (unused in this modified version but kept for signature compatibility).
  49:         max_skips_allowed: Maximum number of characters that can be skipped in raw_text_processed
  50:                            while trying to match dest_text_processed.
  51: 
  52:     Returns:
  53:         A list of [start_ms, end_ms] for each found match.
  54:     """
  55:     
  56:     raw_tokens = raw_text_processed.split()
  57:     dest_tokens = dest_text_processed.split()
  58:     
  59:     collected_timestamps_ms = []
  60:     if not dest_tokens or not raw_tokens:
  61:         return []
  62: 
  63:     len_raw = len(raw_tokens)
  64:     len_dest = len(dest_tokens)
  65:     
  66:     # This check ensures timestamp list is not shorter than raw_tokens list.
  67:     # If they are not perfectly aligned, it's an issue upstream.
  68:     # For safety, we'll avoid index out of bounds if timestamp is too short.
  69:     if len(timestamp) < len_raw:
  70:         # Or raise an error, or log a warning. For now, prevent crash.
  71:         # This indicates a problem with how timestamps are prepared relative to raw_text_processed.
  72:         print(f"Warning: Timestamp array length ({len(timestamp)}) is less than raw tokens length ({len_raw}). Clipping might be inaccurate.")
  73:         # Option 1: Truncate raw_tokens to match timestamp length (might miss matches at the end)
  74:         # raw_tokens = raw_tokens[:len(timestamp)]
  75:         # len_raw = len(raw_tokens)
  76:         # Option 2: Return empty if alignment is critical (safer)
  77:         # return [] 
  78:         # Option 3: Proceed but be careful with indexing (used below with min(..., len(timestamp)-1))
  79: 
  80:     raw_search_offset = 0 
  81: 
  82:     while raw_search_offset < len_raw:
  83:         # Find the next potential starting position for dest_tokens[0] in raw_tokens
  84:         # r_potential_start_of_dest0 is the index in raw_tokens
  85:         
  86:         try:
  87:             # Find the first character of dest_tokens in raw_tokens at or after raw_search_offset
  88:             r_potential_start_of_dest0 = raw_tokens.index(dest_tokens[0], raw_search_offset)
  89:         except ValueError:
  90:             # dest_tokens[0] not found in the rest of raw_tokens
  91:             break # Exit the while loop, no more possible matches
  92: 
  93:         # Potential start found at r_potential_start_of_dest0. 
  94:         # Now try to match the rest of dest_tokens.
  95:         current_match_first_raw_idx = r_potential_start_of_dest0
  96:         current_match_last_raw_idx = r_potential_start_of_dest0 # Initialization for dest_tokens[0]
  97:         
  98:         d_ptr = 1 # Pointer for dest_tokens, starting from the second character
  99:         r_ptr = r_potential_start_of_dest0 + 1 # Pointer for raw_tokens
 100:         skips_count = 0
 101: 
 102:         # Try to match the rest of dest_tokens
 103:         while d_ptr < len_dest and r_ptr < len_raw:
 104:             if raw_tokens[r_ptr] == dest_tokens[d_ptr]:
 105:                 current_match_last_raw_idx = r_ptr # Update last matched raw position
 106:                 d_ptr += 1
 107:                 r_ptr += 1
 108:             else: 
 109:                 skips_count += 1
 110:                 if skips_count > max_skips_allowed:
 111:                     break # Too many skips for this attempt
 112:                 r_ptr += 1 # Skip this raw_token and continue
 113:         
 114:         if d_ptr == len_dest: # Successfully matched all of dest_tokens
 115:             # Check if timestamp indices are valid
 116:             if current_match_first_raw_idx < len(timestamp) and current_match_last_raw_idx < len(timestamp):
 117:                 start_ms = timestamp[current_match_first_raw_idx][0] * 16
 118:                 end_ms = timestamp[current_match_last_raw_idx][1] * 16
 119:                 collected_timestamps_ms.append([start_ms, end_ms])
 120:             else:
 121:                 print(f"Warning: Timestamp index out of bounds during match. First raw idx: {current_match_first_raw_idx}, Last raw idx: {current_match_last_raw_idx}, Timestamp len: {len(timestamp)}")

=== domain/video/funclip/utils/trans_utils.py lines 39-159 ===
  39: def proc(raw_text_processed: str, timestamp: list, dest_text_processed: str, lang: str = 'zh', max_skips_allowed: int = 5):
  40:     """
  41:     Finds occurrences of dest_text_processed within raw_text_processed, allowing for a specified number of skips.
  42: 
  43:     Args:
  44:         raw_text_processed: The ASR result, pre-processed into space-separated characters.
  45:         timestamp: A list of [start, end] times (in FunASR frames, 1 unit = 1/16000 s * 16 = 1ms after *16) 
  46:                    corresponding to each character in raw_text_processed.
  47:         dest_text_processed: The target text, pre-processed into space-separated characters.
  48:         lang: Language code (unused in this modified version but kept for signature compatibility).
  49:         max_skips_allowed: Maximum number of characters that can be skipped in raw_text_processed
  50:                            while trying to match dest_text_processed.
  51: 
  52:     Returns:
  53:         A list of [start_ms, end_ms] for each found match.
  54:     """
  55:     
  56:     raw_tokens = raw_text_processed.split()
  57:     dest_tokens = dest_text_processed.split()
  58:     
  59:     collected_timestamps_ms = []
  60:     if not dest_tokens or not raw_tokens:
  61:         return []
  62: 
  63:     len_raw = len(raw_tokens)
  64:     len_dest = len(dest_tokens)
  65:     
  66:     # This check ensures timestamp list is not shorter than raw_tokens list.
  67:     # If they are not perfectly aligned, it's an issue upstream.
  68:     # For safety, we'll avoid index out of bounds if timestamp is too short.
  69:     if len(timestamp) < len_raw:
  70:         # Or raise an error, or log a warning. For now, prevent crash.
  71:         # This indicates a problem with how timestamps are prepared relative to raw_text_processed.
  72:         print(f"Warning: Timestamp array length ({len(timestamp)}) is less than raw tokens length ({len_raw}). Clipping might be inaccurate.")
  73:         # Option 1: Truncate raw_tokens to match timestamp length (might miss matches at the end)
  74:         # raw_tokens = raw_tokens[:len(timestamp)]
  75:         # len_raw = len(raw_tokens)
  76:         # Option 2: Return empty if alignment is critical (safer)
  77:         # return [] 
  78:         # Option 3: Proceed but be careful with indexing (used below with min(..., len(timestamp)-1))
  79: 
  80:     raw_search_offset = 0 
  81: 
  82:     while raw_search_offset < len_raw:
  83:         # Find the next potential starting position for dest_tokens[0] in raw_tokens
  84:         # r_potential_start_of_dest0 is the index in raw_tokens
  85:         
  86:         try:
  87:             # Find the first character of dest_tokens in raw_tokens at or after raw_search_offset
  88:             r_potential_start_of_dest0 = raw_tokens.index(dest_tokens[0], raw_search_offset)
  89:         except ValueError:
  90:             # dest_tokens[0] not found in the rest of raw_tokens
  91:             break # Exit the while loop, no more possible matches
  92: 
  93:         # Potential start found at r_potential_start_of_dest0. 
  94:         # Now try to match the rest of dest_tokens.
  95:         current_match_first_raw_idx = r_potential_start_of_dest0
  96:         current_match_last_raw_idx = r_potential_start_of_dest0 # Initialization for dest_tokens[0]
  97:         
  98:         d_ptr = 1 # Pointer for dest_tokens, starting from the second character
  99:         r_ptr = r_potential_start_of_dest0 + 1 # Pointer for raw_tokens
 100:         skips_count = 0
 101: 
 102:         # Try to match the rest of dest_tokens
 103:         while d_ptr < len_dest and r_ptr < len_raw:
 104:             if raw_tokens[r_ptr] == dest_tokens[d_ptr]:
 105:                 current_match_last_raw_idx = r_ptr # Update last matched raw position
 106:                 d_ptr += 1
 107:                 r_ptr += 1
 108:             else: 
 109:                 skips_count += 1
 110:                 if skips_count > max_skips_allowed:
 111:                     break # Too many skips for this attempt
 112:                 r_ptr += 1 # Skip this raw_token and continue
 113:         
 114:         if d_ptr == len_dest: # Successfully matched all of dest_tokens
 115:             # Check if timestamp indices are valid
 116:             if current_match_first_raw_idx < len(timestamp) and current_match_last_raw_idx < len(timestamp):
 117:                 start_ms = timestamp[current_match_first_raw_idx][0] * 16
 118:                 end_ms = timestamp[current_match_last_raw_idx][1] * 16
 119:                 collected_timestamps_ms.append([start_ms, end_ms])
 120:             else:
 121:                 print(f"Warning: Timestamp index out of bounds during match. First raw idx: {current_match_first_raw_idx}, Last raw idx: {current_match_last_raw_idx}, Timestamp len: {len(timestamp)}")
 122: 
 123:             # Advance raw_search_offset to search for the next occurrence.
 124:             # Start searching after the end of the current consumed raw segment.
 125:             raw_search_offset = current_match_last_raw_idx + 1
 126:         else:
 127:             # Match attempt failed (either too many skips or raw_tokens ended before dest_tokens completed).
 128:             # We must advance raw_search_offset to avoid an infinite loop if dest_tokens[0]
 129:             # is found at r_potential_start_of_dest0 but the rest of the match fails.
 130:             # Advance beyond the point where the current dest_tokens[0] was found.
 131:             raw_search_offset = r_potential_start_of_dest0 + 1
 132:             
 133:     return collected_timestamps_ms
 134:             
 135: 
 136: def proc_spk(dest_spk, sd_sentences):
 137:     ts = []
 138:     for d in sd_sentences:
 139:         d_start = d['timestamp'][0][0]
 140:         d_end = d['timestamp'][-1][1]
 141:         spkid=dest_spk[3:]
 142:         if str(d['spk']) == spkid and d_end-d_start>999:
 143:             ts.append([d_start*16, d_end*16])
 144:     return ts
 145: 
 146: def generate_vad_data(data, sd_sentences, sr=16000):
 147:     assert len(data.shape) == 1
 148:     vad_data = []
 149:     for d in sd_sentences:
 150:         d_start = round(d['ts_list'][0][0]/1000, 2)
 151:         d_end = round(d['ts_list'][-1][1]/1000, 2)
 152:         vad_data.append([d_start, d_end, data[int(d_start * sr):int(d_end * sr)]])
 153:     return vad_data
 154:

 157:         with open(output_dir+key, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as fout:
 158:             fout.write(str(state[key[1:]]))

=== domain/video/funclip/utils/trans_utils.py lines 155-233 ===
 155: def write_state(output_dir, state):
 156:     for key in ['/recog_res_raw', '/timestamp', '/sentences']:#, '/sd_sentences']:
 157:         with open(output_dir+key, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as fout:
 158:             fout.write(str(state[key[1:]]))
 159:     if 'sd_sentences' in state:
 160:         with open(output_dir+'/sd_sentences', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as fout:
 161:             fout.write(str(state['sd_sentences']))
 162:     if 'zimu' in state:
 163:         with open(output_dir+'/zimu', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as fout:
 164:             fout.write(str(state['zimu']))
 165: 
 166: def load_state(output_dir):
 167:     state = {}
 168:     with open(output_dir+'/recog_res_raw') as fin:
 169:         line = fin.read()
 170:         state['recog_res_raw'] = line
 171:     with open(output_dir+'/timestamp') as fin:
 172:         line = fin.read()
 173:         state['timestamp'] = eval(line)
 174:     with open(output_dir+'/sentences') as fin:
 175:         line = fin.read()
 176:         state['sentences'] = eval(line)
 177:     if os.path.exists(output_dir+'/sd_sentences'):
 178:         with open(output_dir+'/sd_sentences') as fin:
 179:             line = fin.read()
 180:             state['sd_sentences'] = eval(line)
 181:     # 加载分割后的字幕数据
 182:     if os.path.exists(output_dir+'/zimu'):
 183:         with open(output_dir+'/zimu') as fin:
 184:             line = fin.read()
 185:             state['zimu'] = eval(line)
 186:             print(f"✅ 已加载分割后的字幕数据: {len(state['zimu'])} 个片段")
 187:     return state
 188: 
 189: def convert_pcm_to_float(data):
 190:     if data.dtype == np.float64:
 191:         return data
 192:     elif data.dtype == np.float32:
 193:         return data.astype(np.float64)
 194:     elif data.dtype == np.int16:
 195:         bit_depth = 16
 196:     elif data.dtype == np.int32:
 197:         bit_depth = 32
 198:     elif data.dtype == np.int8:
 199:         bit_depth = 8
 200:     else:
 201:         raise ValueError("Unsupported audio data type")
 202: 
 203:     # Now handle the integer types
 204:     max_int_value = float(2 ** (bit_depth - 1))
 205:     if bit_depth == 8:
 206:         data = data - 128
 207:     return (data.astype(np.float64) / max_int_value)
 208: 
 209: def convert_time_to_millis(time_str):
 210:     # 格式: [小时:分钟:秒,毫秒]
 211:     hours, minutes, seconds, milliseconds = map(int, re.split('[:,]', time_str))
 212:     return (hours * 3600 + minutes * 60 + seconds) * 1000 + milliseconds
 213: 
 214: def extract_timestamps(input_text):
 215:     # 使用正则表达式查找所有时间戳
 216:     timestamps = re.findall(r'\[(\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2},\d{2,3})\s*-\s*(\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2},\d{2,3})\]', input_text)
 217:     times_list = []
 218:     print(timestamps)
 219:     # 循环遍历找到的所有时间戳，并转换为毫秒
 220:     for start_time, end_time in timestamps:
 221:         start_millis = convert_time_to_millis(start_time)
 222:         end_millis = convert_time_to_millis(end_time)
 223:         times_list.append([start_millis, end_millis])
 224:     
 225:     return times_list
 226: 
 227: 
 228: if __name__ == '__main__':
 229:     text = ("1. [00:00:00,500-00:00:05,850] 在我们的设计普惠当中，有一个我经常津津乐道的项目叫寻找远方的美好。"
 230:     "2. [00:00:07,120-00:00:12,940] 啊，在这样一个我们叫寻美在这样的一个项目当中，我们把它跟乡村振兴去结合起来，利用我们的设计的能力。"
 231:     "3. [00:00:13,240-00:00:25,620] 问我们自身员工的设设计能力，我们设计生态伙伴的能力，帮助乡村振兴当中，要希望把他的产品推向市场，把他的农产品把他加工产品推向市场的这样的伙伴做一件事情，")
 232: 
 233:     print(extract_timestamps(text))

   1: import logging
   2: import copy
   3: import re
   4: 
   5: logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
   6: 
   7: # 中英文标点符号（保持向后兼容）
   8: PUNCTUATIONS = '，。！？；：,.!?;:'
   9: 
  10: 
  11: 
  12: def _get_text_length_no_punc(text):
  13:     """计算一个字符串中非标点符号的字符数量"""
  14:     return len(re.sub(f'[{PUNCTUATIONS}\\s]', '', text))
  15: 
  16: def _create_segment(base_info, ts_list_segment):
  17:     """一个辅助函数，用于根据时间戳片段创建新的分段信息字典。"""
  18:     if not ts_list_segment:
  19:         return None
  20: 
  21:     text_segment = "".join([item[0] for item in ts_list_segment])
  22:     start = ts_list_segment[0][1]
  23:     end = ts_list_segment[-1][2]
  24: 
  25:     new_segment_info = base_info.copy()
  26:     new_segment_info.update({
  27:         'text': text_segment,
  28:         'start': start,
  29:         'end': end,
  30:         'ts_list': ts_list_segment,
  31:         'timestamp': [[w[1], w[2]] for w in ts_list_segment]
  32:     })
  33:     logger.info(f"  -> New segment: '{text_segment}' ({start}-{end})")
  34:     return new_segment_info
  35: 
  36: def _get_chinese_char_count(text):
  37:     """计算文本中汉字的数量"""
  38:     return len([c for c in text if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
  39: 
  40: def _has_punctuation_within_range(text, max_chars, core_punctuations):
  41:     """检查在指定字符范围内是否有核心标点符号"""
  42:     char_count = 0
  43:     for char in text:
  44:         if '\u4e00' <= char <= '\u9fff':  # 只计算汉字
  45:             char_count += 1
  46:         if char_count <= max_chars and char in core_punctuations:
  47:             return True, char_count
  48:     return False, char_count
  49: 
  50: def _find_best_punctuation_split(text, ts_list, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations):
  51:     """在标准范围或容错范围内找到最佳的标点分割位置"""
  52:     best_split_pos = -1
  53:     best_char_count = 0
  54:     best_is_standard = False  # 标记是否在标准范围内
  55: 
  56:     char_count = 0
  57:     for i, (word, start_ms, end_ms) in enumerate(ts_list):
  58:         word_char_count = _get_chinese_char_count(word)
  59:         char_count += word_char_count
  60: 
  61:         # 检查词尾是否有标点
  62:         if word and word[-1] in core_punctuations:
  63:             if char_count <= max_chars:
  64:                 # 标准范围内的标点，优先选择
  65:                 best_split_pos = i
  66:                 best_char_count = char_count
  67:                 best_is_standard = True
  68:                 logger.info(f"      找到标准范围标点: 位置{i+1}, {char_count}字, 词'{word}'")
  69:             elif char_count <= tolerance_max and not best_is_standard:
  70:                 # 容错范围内的标点，只有在没有标准范围标点时才选择
  71:                 best_split_pos = i
  72:                 best_char_count = char_count
  73:                 logger.info(f"      找到容错范围标点: 位置{i+1}, {char_count}字, 词'{word}'")
  74: 
  75:         # 如果超出容错范围，停止搜索
  76:         if char_count > tolerance_max:
  77:             break
  78: 
  79:     return best_split_pos, best_char_count, best_is_standard
  80: 
  81: 
  82: 
  83: def _merge_short_segments(segments, min_chars=4, max_merged=15):
  84:     """合并过短的片段"""
  85:     if len(segments) <= 1:
  86:         return segments
  87: 
  88:     optimized_segments = []
  89:     i = 0
  90: 
  91:     while i < len(segments):
  92:         current_segment = segments[i]
  93:         current_text = current_segment.get('text', '')
  94:         current_char_count = _get_chinese_char_count(current_text)
  95: 
  96:         # 如果当前片段过短且不是第一个
  97:         if current_char_count <= 3 and i > 0:
  98:             # 合并到前一个片段
  99:             prev_segment = optimized_segments[-1]
 100:             merged_text = prev_segment['text'] + current_text
 101:             merged_char_count = _get_chinese_char_count(merged_text)
 102: 
 103:             if merged_char_count <= max_merged:
 104:                 # 执行合并
 105:                 prev_segment['text'] = merged_text
 106:                 prev_segment['end'] = current_segment.get('end', prev_segment.get('end', 0))
 107:                 prev_segment['ts_list'].extend(current_segment.get('ts_list', []))
 108:                 prev_segment['timestamp'].extend(current_segment.get('timestamp', []))
 109:                 logger.info(f"   🔗 合并短片段: '{current_text}' -> '{merged_text}' ({merged_char_count}字)")
 110:             else:
 111:                 # 合并后过长，保持原状
 112:                 optimized_segments.append(current_segment)
 113:         else:
 114:             optimized_segments.append(current_segment)
 115: 
 116:         i += 1
 117: 
 118:     return optimized_segments
 119: 
 120: 
 121: 

=== domain/video/funclip/zimu.py lines 122-242 ===
 122: def smart_subtitle_segmentation(sentence_info, max_chars=9, tolerance_max=12, core_punctuations=None):
 123:     """
 124:     智能字幕分割：四级策略
 125: 
 126:     Args:
 127:         sentence_info: 句子信息字典
 128:         max_chars: 标准最大字符数
 129:         tolerance_max: 容错最大字符数
 130:         core_punctuations: 核心标点符号列表
 131: 
 132:     Returns:
 133:         list: 分割后的句子信息列表
 134:     """
 135:     if core_punctuations is None:
 136:         core_punctuations = ['。', '！', '？', '；', '，', '、', '：']
 137: 
 138:     text = sentence_info.get('text', '')
 139:     ts_list = sentence_info.get('ts_list', [])
 140:     char_count = _get_chinese_char_count(text)
 141: 
 142:     logger.info(f"🔍 智能分割处理: '{text}' ({char_count}字)")
 143: 
 144:     # 第0级：保留短字幕
 145:     if char_count <= max_chars:
 146:         logger.info(f"   ✅ 第0级: 短字幕保留 ({char_count}字 ≤ {max_chars}字)")
 147:         return [sentence_info]
 148: 
 149:     if not ts_list:
 150:         logger.warning(f"   ⚠️ 无时间戳信息，无法分割")
 151:         return [sentence_info]
 152: 
 153:     # 第1级：标准范围内标点分割
 154:     best_split_pos, split_char_count, is_standard = _find_best_punctuation_split(
 155:         text, ts_list, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations
 156:     )
 157: 
 158:     if best_split_pos != -1 and is_standard:
 159:         logger.info(f"   ✅ 第1级: 标准范围标点分割 (位置{best_split_pos+1}, {split_char_count}字)")
 160:         return _split_at_position(sentence_info, best_split_pos, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations)
 161: 
 162:     # 第2级：容错范围内标点分割
 163:     if best_split_pos != -1 and split_char_count <= tolerance_max:
 164:         logger.info(f"   ✅ 第2级: 容错范围标点分割 (位置{best_split_pos+1}, {split_char_count}字)")
 165:         return _split_at_position(sentence_info, best_split_pos, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations)
 166: 
 167:     # 第3级：无合适标点，从第9个字强制分割
 168:     logger.info(f"   ✂️ 第3级: 无合适标点，从第{max_chars}字强制分割")
 169: 
 170:     # 找到第9个汉字的位置
 171:     ts_list = sentence_info.get('ts_list', [])
 172:     char_count = 0
 173:     split_pos = -1
 174: 
 175:     for i, (word, _, _) in enumerate(ts_list):
 176:         word_char_count = _get_chinese_char_count(word)
 177:         if char_count + word_char_count >= max_chars:
 178:             split_pos = i - 1  # 在前一个词结束处分割
 179:             break
 180:         char_count += word_char_count
 181: 
 182:     if split_pos >= 0:
 183:         segments = _split_at_position(sentence_info, split_pos, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations)
 184:     else:
 185:         # 如果找不到合适的分割位置，保持原样
 186:         segments = [sentence_info]
 187: 
 188:     # 应用短片段合并优化
 189:     try:
 190:         import funclip.config as cfg
 191:         enable_merge = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SHORT_SEGMENT_MERGE', True)
 192:         min_chars = getattr(cfg, 'MIN_SEGMENT_CHARS', 4)
 193:         max_merged = getattr(cfg, 'MAX_MERGED_CHARS', 15)
 194: 
 195:         if enable_merge and len(segments) > 1:
 196:             segments = _merge_short_segments(segments, min_chars, max_merged)
 197:     except Exception as e:
 198:         logger.warning(f"短片段合并失败: {e}")
 199: 
 200:     return segments
 201: 
 202: def _split_at_position(sentence_info, split_pos, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations):
 203:     """在指定位置分割句子"""
 204:     ts_list = sentence_info.get('ts_list', [])
 205: 
 206:     # 分割为两部分
 207:     first_part_ts = ts_list[:split_pos + 1]
 208:     second_part_ts = ts_list[split_pos + 1:]
 209: 
 210:     segments = []
 211: 
 212:     # 创建第一部分
 213:     if first_part_ts:
 214:         first_segment = _create_segment(sentence_info, first_part_ts)
 215:         if first_segment:
 216:             segments.append(first_segment)
 217: 
 218:     # 递归处理第二部分
 219:     if second_part_ts:
 220:         second_segment_info = sentence_info.copy()
 221:         second_segment_info['ts_list'] = second_part_ts
 222:         second_segment_info['text'] = ''.join([item[0] for item in second_part_ts])
 223: 
 224:         # 递归调用智能分割
 225:         remaining_segments = smart_subtitle_segmentation(
 226:             second_segment_info, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations
 227:         )
 228:         segments.extend(remaining_segments)
 229: 
 230:     # 应用短片段合并优化
 231:     try:
 232:         import funclip.config as cfg
 233:         enable_merge = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SHORT_SEGMENT_MERGE', True)
 234:         min_chars = getattr(cfg, 'MIN_SEGMENT_CHARS', 4)
 235:         max_merged = getattr(cfg, 'MAX_MERGED_CHARS', 15)
 236: 
 237:         if enable_merge and len(segments) > 1:
 238:             segments = _merge_short_segments(segments, min_chars, max_merged)
 239:     except Exception as e:
 240:         logger.warning(f"短片段合并失败: {e}")
 241: 
 242:     return segments

=== domain/video/funclip/zimu.py lines 202-322 ===
 202: def _split_at_position(sentence_info, split_pos, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations):
 203:     """在指定位置分割句子"""
 204:     ts_list = sentence_info.get('ts_list', [])
 205: 
 206:     # 分割为两部分
 207:     first_part_ts = ts_list[:split_pos + 1]
 208:     second_part_ts = ts_list[split_pos + 1:]
 209: 
 210:     segments = []
 211: 
 212:     # 创建第一部分
 213:     if first_part_ts:
 214:         first_segment = _create_segment(sentence_info, first_part_ts)
 215:         if first_segment:
 216:             segments.append(first_segment)
 217: 
 218:     # 递归处理第二部分
 219:     if second_part_ts:
 220:         second_segment_info = sentence_info.copy()
 221:         second_segment_info['ts_list'] = second_part_ts
 222:         second_segment_info['text'] = ''.join([item[0] for item in second_part_ts])
 223: 
 224:         # 递归调用智能分割
 225:         remaining_segments = smart_subtitle_segmentation(
 226:             second_segment_info, max_chars, tolerance_max, core_punctuations
 227:         )
 228:         segments.extend(remaining_segments)
 229: 
 230:     # 应用短片段合并优化
 231:     try:
 232:         import funclip.config as cfg
 233:         enable_merge = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SHORT_SEGMENT_MERGE', True)
 234:         min_chars = getattr(cfg, 'MIN_SEGMENT_CHARS', 4)
 235:         max_merged = getattr(cfg, 'MAX_MERGED_CHARS', 15)
 236: 
 237:         if enable_merge and len(segments) > 1:
 238:             segments = _merge_short_segments(segments, min_chars, max_merged)
 239:     except Exception as e:
 240:         logger.warning(f"短片段合并失败: {e}")
 241: 
 242:     return segments
 243: 
 244: def _detect_timestamp_overlaps(sentence_list):
 245:     """检测时间戳重叠问题，返回重叠数量"""
 246:     if not sentence_list or len(sentence_list) < 2:
 247:         return 0
 248: 
 249:     overlap_count = 0
 250: 
 251:     for i in range(len(sentence_list) - 1):
 252:         current = sentence_list[i]
 253:         next_item = sentence_list[i + 1]
 254: 
 255:         current_end = current.get('end', 0)
 256:         next_start = next_item.get('start', 0)
 257: 
 258:         # 检查重叠
 259:         if current_end > next_start:
 260:             overlap_count += 1
 261:             logger.debug(f"   重叠 {overlap_count}: '{current.get('text', '')}' ({current_end}ms) 与 '{next_item.get('text', '')}' ({next_start}ms)")
 262: 
 263:     return overlap_count
 264: 
 265: def _fix_timestamp_overlaps(sentence_list):
 266:     """修复时间戳重叠问题"""
 267:     if not sentence_list:
 268:         return sentence_list
 269: 
 270:     fixed_list = []
 271: 
 272:     for i, sentence in enumerate(sentence_list):
 273:         current_sentence = sentence.copy()
 274: 
 275:         # 如果不是第一个句子，检查与前一个句子的重叠
 276:         if i > 0 and fixed_list:
 277:             prev_sentence = fixed_list[-1]
 278:             prev_end = prev_sentence.get('end', 0)
 279:             current_start = current_sentence.get('start', 0)
 280: 
 281:             # 如果有重叠，调整当前句子的开始时间
 282:             if current_start < prev_end:
 283:                 logger.debug(f"   修复重叠: 片段{i} 开始时间 {current_start}ms -> {prev_end}ms")
 284:                 current_sentence['start'] = prev_end
 285: 
 286:                 # 同时更新ts_list中的时间戳
 287:                 if 'ts_list' in current_sentence:
 288:                     ts_list = current_sentence['ts_list']
 289:                     if ts_list:
 290:                         # 计算时间偏移
 291:                         original_start = ts_list[0][1] if len(ts_list[0]) > 1 else 0
 292:                         time_offset = prev_end - original_start
 293: 
 294:                         # 更新所有词的时间戳
 295:                         updated_ts_list = []
 296:                         for word_info in ts_list:
 297:                             if len(word_info) >= 3:
 298:                                 word, start_ms, end_ms = word_info[0], word_info[1], word_info[2]
 299:                                 updated_ts_list.append([word, start_ms + time_offset, end_ms + time_offset])
 300:                             else:
 301:                                 updated_ts_list.append(word_info)
 302: 
 303:                         current_sentence['ts_list'] = updated_ts_list
 304: 
 305:                 # 更新timestamp字段
 306:                 if 'timestamp' in current_sentence and 'ts_list' in current_sentence:
 307:                     current_sentence['timestamp'] = [[w[1], w[2]] for w in current_sentence['ts_list'] if len(w) >= 3]
 308: 
 309:         fixed_list.append(current_sentence)
 310: 
 311:     return fixed_list
 312: 
 313: def process_sentence_timestamps(sentence_info_list, max_chars=9):
 314:     """
 315:     处理句子时间戳，根据配置进行智能分割
 316: 
 317:     Args:
 318:         sentence_info_list: 句子信息列表
 319:         max_chars: 最大字符数
 320:     """
 321:     if not isinstance(sentence_info_list, list):
 322:         logger.warning("process_sentence_timestamps 接收到非列表输入，返回空列表。")

=== domain/video/funclip/zimu.py lines 244-364 ===
 244: def _detect_timestamp_overlaps(sentence_list):
 245:     """检测时间戳重叠问题，返回重叠数量"""
 246:     if not sentence_list or len(sentence_list) < 2:
 247:         return 0
 248: 
 249:     overlap_count = 0
 250: 
 251:     for i in range(len(sentence_list) - 1):
 252:         current = sentence_list[i]
 253:         next_item = sentence_list[i + 1]
 254: 
 255:         current_end = current.get('end', 0)
 256:         next_start = next_item.get('start', 0)
 257: 
 258:         # 检查重叠
 259:         if current_end > next_start:
 260:             overlap_count += 1
 261:             logger.debug(f"   重叠 {overlap_count}: '{current.get('text', '')}' ({current_end}ms) 与 '{next_item.get('text', '')}' ({next_start}ms)")
 262: 
 263:     return overlap_count
 264: 
 265: def _fix_timestamp_overlaps(sentence_list):
 266:     """修复时间戳重叠问题"""
 267:     if not sentence_list:
 268:         return sentence_list
 269: 
 270:     fixed_list = []
 271: 
 272:     for i, sentence in enumerate(sentence_list):
 273:         current_sentence = sentence.copy()
 274: 
 275:         # 如果不是第一个句子，检查与前一个句子的重叠
 276:         if i > 0 and fixed_list:
 277:             prev_sentence = fixed_list[-1]
 278:             prev_end = prev_sentence.get('end', 0)
 279:             current_start = current_sentence.get('start', 0)
 280: 
 281:             # 如果有重叠，调整当前句子的开始时间
 282:             if current_start < prev_end:
 283:                 logger.debug(f"   修复重叠: 片段{i} 开始时间 {current_start}ms -> {prev_end}ms")
 284:                 current_sentence['start'] = prev_end
 285: 
 286:                 # 同时更新ts_list中的时间戳
 287:                 if 'ts_list' in current_sentence:
 288:                     ts_list = current_sentence['ts_list']
 289:                     if ts_list:
 290:                         # 计算时间偏移
 291:                         original_start = ts_list[0][1] if len(ts_list[0]) > 1 else 0
 292:                         time_offset = prev_end - original_start
 293: 
 294:                         # 更新所有词的时间戳
 295:                         updated_ts_list = []
 296:                         for word_info in ts_list:
 297:                             if len(word_info) >= 3:
 298:                                 word, start_ms, end_ms = word_info[0], word_info[1], word_info[2]
 299:                                 updated_ts_list.append([word, start_ms + time_offset, end_ms + time_offset])
 300:                             else:
 301:                                 updated_ts_list.append(word_info)
 302: 
 303:                         current_sentence['ts_list'] = updated_ts_list
 304: 
 305:                 # 更新timestamp字段
 306:                 if 'timestamp' in current_sentence and 'ts_list' in current_sentence:
 307:                     current_sentence['timestamp'] = [[w[1], w[2]] for w in current_sentence['ts_list'] if len(w) >= 3]
 308: 
 309:         fixed_list.append(current_sentence)
 310: 
 311:     return fixed_list
 312: 
 313: def process_sentence_timestamps(sentence_info_list, max_chars=9):
 314:     """
 315:     处理句子时间戳，根据配置进行智能分割
 316: 
 317:     Args:
 318:         sentence_info_list: 句子信息列表
 319:         max_chars: 最大字符数
 320:     """
 321:     if not isinstance(sentence_info_list, list):
 322:         logger.warning("process_sentence_timestamps 接收到非列表输入，返回空列表。")
 323:         return []
 324: 
 325:     # 读取字幕配置并记录日志
 326:     try:
 327:         import funclip.config as cfg
 328:         config_max_chars_per_line = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE', None)
 329:         config_max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', None)
 330:         enable_splitting = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING', True)
 331: 
 332:         # 新增配置项
 333:         tolerance_max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'TOLERANCE_MAX_CHARS', 12)
 334:         enable_punctuation_priority = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_PUNCTUATION_PRIORITY', True)
 335:         core_punctuations = getattr(cfg, 'CORE_PUNCTUATIONS', ['。', '！', '？', '；', '，', '、', '：'])
 336: 
 337:         actual_max_chars = config_max_chars_per_line or config_max_chars or max_chars
 338: 
 339:         logger.info("=" * 60)
 340:         logger.info("🎬 智能字幕分割配置信息:")
 341:         logger.info(f"   📋 基础配置:")
 342:         logger.info(f"      SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE = {config_max_chars_per_line}")
 343:         logger.info(f"      SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS = {config_max_chars}")
 344:         logger.info(f"      ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING = {enable_splitting}")
 345:         logger.info(f"   🧠 智能分割配置:")
 346:         logger.info(f"      TOLERANCE_MAX_CHARS = {tolerance_max_chars}")
 347:         logger.info(f"      ENABLE_PUNCTUATION_PRIORITY = {enable_punctuation_priority}")
 348:         logger.info(f"      CORE_PUNCTUATIONS = {core_punctuations}")
 349:         logger.info(f"   🎯 实际使用的最大字符数: {actual_max_chars}")
 350:         logger.info(f"   📝 传入参数 max_chars: {max_chars}")
 351:         logger.info("=" * 60)
 352: 
 353:         # 使用配置文件中的值
 354:         max_chars = actual_max_chars
 355: 
 356:     except Exception as e:
 357:         logger.warning(f"读取字幕配置失败，使用默认值: {e}")
 358:         tolerance_max_chars = 12
 359:         enable_punctuation_priority = True
 360:         core_punctuations = ['。', '！', '？', '；', '，', '、', '：']
 361: 
 362:     # 检查是否启用字幕分割
 363:     if not enable_splitting:
 364:         logger.info("🚫 字幕分割功能已禁用，返回原始数据")

=== domain/video/funclip/zimu.py lines 313-433 ===
 313: def process_sentence_timestamps(sentence_info_list, max_chars=9):
 314:     """
 315:     处理句子时间戳，根据配置进行智能分割
 316: 
 317:     Args:
 318:         sentence_info_list: 句子信息列表
 319:         max_chars: 最大字符数
 320:     """
 321:     if not isinstance(sentence_info_list, list):
 322:         logger.warning("process_sentence_timestamps 接收到非列表输入，返回空列表。")
 323:         return []
 324: 
 325:     # 读取字幕配置并记录日志
 326:     try:
 327:         import funclip.config as cfg
 328:         config_max_chars_per_line = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE', None)
 329:         config_max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', None)
 330:         enable_splitting = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING', True)
 331: 
 332:         # 新增配置项
 333:         tolerance_max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'TOLERANCE_MAX_CHARS', 12)
 334:         enable_punctuation_priority = getattr(cfg, 'ENABLE_PUNCTUATION_PRIORITY', True)
 335:         core_punctuations = getattr(cfg, 'CORE_PUNCTUATIONS', ['。', '！', '？', '；', '，', '、', '：'])
 336: 
 337:         actual_max_chars = config_max_chars_per_line or config_max_chars or max_chars
 338: 
 339:         logger.info("=" * 60)
 340:         logger.info("🎬 智能字幕分割配置信息:")
 341:         logger.info(f"   📋 基础配置:")
 342:         logger.info(f"      SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE = {config_max_chars_per_line}")
 343:         logger.info(f"      SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS = {config_max_chars}")
 344:         logger.info(f"      ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING = {enable_splitting}")
 345:         logger.info(f"   🧠 智能分割配置:")
 346:         logger.info(f"      TOLERANCE_MAX_CHARS = {tolerance_max_chars}")
 347:         logger.info(f"      ENABLE_PUNCTUATION_PRIORITY = {enable_punctuation_priority}")
 348:         logger.info(f"      CORE_PUNCTUATIONS = {core_punctuations}")
 349:         logger.info(f"   🎯 实际使用的最大字符数: {actual_max_chars}")
 350:         logger.info(f"   📝 传入参数 max_chars: {max_chars}")
 351:         logger.info("=" * 60)
 352: 
 353:         # 使用配置文件中的值
 354:         max_chars = actual_max_chars
 355: 
 356:     except Exception as e:
 357:         logger.warning(f"读取字幕配置失败，使用默认值: {e}")
 358:         tolerance_max_chars = 12
 359:         enable_punctuation_priority = True
 360:         core_punctuations = ['。', '！', '？', '；', '，', '、', '：']
 361: 
 362:     # 检查是否启用字幕分割
 363:     if not enable_splitting:
 364:         logger.info("🚫 字幕分割功能已禁用，返回原始数据")
 365:         return sentence_info_list
 366: 
 367:     final_processed_list = []
 368:     total_sentences = len(sentence_info_list)
 369:     logger.info(f"📊 开始智能处理 {total_sentences} 个句子")
 370:     logger.info(f"   📏 标准长度: {max_chars}字, 容错长度: {tolerance_max_chars}字")
 371: 
 372:     for idx, sentence_info in enumerate(sentence_info_list, 1):
 373:         original_text = sentence_info.get('text', '')
 374:         ts_list = sentence_info.get('ts_list', [])
 375: 
 376:         logger.info(f"\n🔍 处理句子 {idx}/{total_sentences}: '{original_text}'")
 377:         logger.info(f"   ⏱️ 词时间戳数量: {len(ts_list)}")
 378: 
 379:         # 使用智能分割策略
 380:         if enable_punctuation_priority:
 381:             # 使用新的四级智能分割策略
 382:             segments = smart_subtitle_segmentation(
 383:                 sentence_info,
 384:                 max_chars=max_chars,
 385:                 tolerance_max=tolerance_max_chars,
 386:                 core_punctuations=core_punctuations
 387:             )
 388:             final_processed_list.extend(segments)
 389:             logger.info(f"   📊 智能分割: 1句 -> {len(segments)}片段")
 390:         else:
 391:             # 使用传统分割方式（向后兼容）
 392:             logger.info(f"   🔄 使用传统分割方式")
 393:             segments = _legacy_split_sentence(sentence_info, max_chars)
 394:             final_processed_list.extend(segments)
 395:             logger.info(f"   📊 传统分割: 1句 -> {len(segments)}片段")
 396: 
 397:     logger.info(f"\n🎉 字幕分割处理完成:")
 398:     logger.info(f"   📊 输入: {total_sentences} 个句子")
 399:     logger.info(f"   📊 输出: {len(final_processed_list)} 个片段")
 400:     logger.info(f"   📏 每行限制: {max_chars} 字符")
 401: 
 402:     # 记录最终结果
 403:     logger.info(f"\n📋 最终分割结果:")
 404:     for i, segment in enumerate(final_processed_list, 1):
 405:         text = segment.get('text', '')
 406:         char_count = len([c for c in text if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 407:         start_time = segment.get('start', 0)
 408:         end_time = segment.get('end', 0)
 409:         status = "✅" if char_count <= max_chars else "❌"
 410:         logger.info(f"   {status} 片段{i}: '{text}' ({char_count}字) [{start_time}ms-{end_time}ms]")
 411: 
 412:     logger.info("=" * 60)
 413: 
 414:     # 过滤掉可能产生的空片段
 415:     filtered_result = [seg for seg in final_processed_list if seg is not None and seg.get('text')]
 416: 
 417:     if len(filtered_result) != len(final_processed_list):
 418:         logger.warning(f"⚠️ 过滤掉了 {len(final_processed_list) - len(filtered_result)} 个空片段")
 419: 
 420:     # 检测和修复时间戳重叠问题
 421:     logger.info(f"\n🔍 检测时间戳重叠问题...")
 422:     overlaps_detected = _detect_timestamp_overlaps(filtered_result)
 423: 
 424:     if overlaps_detected > 0:
 425:         logger.warning(f"⚠️ 发现 {overlaps_detected} 个时间戳重叠，正在修复...")
 426:         filtered_result = _fix_timestamp_overlaps(filtered_result)
 427: 
 428:         # 再次检测确认修复效果
 429:         remaining_overlaps = _detect_timestamp_overlaps(filtered_result)
 430:         if remaining_overlaps == 0:
 431:             logger.info(f"✅ 所有时间戳重叠问题已修复")
 432:         else:
 433:             logger.warning(f"⚠️ 仍有 {remaining_overlaps} 个重叠问题未完全修复")

   2: # -*- encoding: utf-8 -*-
