 179:             api_key = os.environ.get("QWEN_API_KEY")
 180:             if not api_key:
 181:                 logging.error("未设置QWEN_API_KEY环境变量")
 182:                 return None, None
 183:             response, raw_response = llm_client.call_qwen_model(key=api_key, user_content=full_prompt)
 184:             # 确保raw_response是字符串
 185:             if isinstance(raw_response, dict):
 186:                 raw_response = str(raw_response)
 187:             return response, raw_response
 188:         elif llm_client.__name__ == 'deepseek_api':
 189:             # 专门为DeepSeek API添加的处理逻辑
 190:             api_key = os.environ.get("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY")
 191:             if not api_key:
 192:                 logging.error("未设置DEEPSEEK_API_KEY环境变量")
 193:                 return None, None
 194:             print("\n开始DeepSeek流式输出，请稍候...\n")
 195:             response = llm_client.deepseek_stream_call(apikey=api_key, user_content=full_prompt)
 196:             return response, None
 197:         elif llm_client.__name__ == 'kimi_api':
 198:             # 专门为Kimi API添加的处理逻辑
 199:             api_key = os.environ.get("KIMI_API_KEY")
 200:             if not api_key:
 201:                 logging.error("未设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量")
 202:                 return None, None
 203:             response = llm_client.kimi_call(apikey=api_key, user_content=full_prompt)
 204:             return response, None
 205:         else:
 206:             logging.error("无法识别的LLM接口")
 207:             return None, None
 208:     except Exception as e:
 209:         logging.error(f"调用大模型失败: {e}")
 210:         return None, None
 211: 
 212: def clean_clip_text(text):
 213:     """清理剪辑文本，删除标点符号和多余空白"""
 214:     # 定义要保留的字符
 215:     keep_chars = {'#'}
 216:     # 定义要删除的标点符号
 217:     punctuation = {'，', '。', '！', '？', '、', ',', '.', '!', '?', '；', ';', '：', ':', '"', '"', ''', ''', '（', '）', '(', ')', '【', '】', '[', ']', '《', '》', '<', '>', '…', '~', '～', '`', '·', '、'}
 218:     
 219:     # 分割文本（以#为分隔符）
 220:     parts = text.split('#')
 221:     
 222:     # 处理每个部分
 223:     cleaned_parts = []
 224:     for part in parts:
 225:         # 1. 删除标点符号
 226:         cleaned = ''.join(char for char in part if char not in punctuation)
 227:         # 2. 删除多余空白
 228:         cleaned = ''.join(cleaned.split())
 229:         cleaned_parts.append(cleaned)
 230:     
 231:     # 用#重新连接文本
 232:     return '#'.join(part for part in cleaned_parts if part)
 233: 
 234: def extract_clip_text(llm_response, clean_text=False):
 235:     """从大模型返回中提取clip_text部分，选择preserved代码块中最长的一个"""
 236:     if not llm_response:
 237:         return None
 238:     
 239:     # 先移除plaintext标记
 240:     llm_response = llm_response.replace("plaintext", "").strip()
 241:     
 242:     # 使用正则表达式查找所有```preserved与```之间的内容
 243:     import re
 244:     pattern = r"```preserved(.*?)```"
 245:     preserved_blocks = re.findall(pattern, llm_response, re.DOTALL)
 246:     
 247:     if preserved_blocks:
 248:         # 找到了preserved代码块
 249:         logging.info(f"找到 {len(preserved_blocks)} 个preserved代码块")
 250:         
 251:         # 保存第一个preserved块到单独文件
 252:         first_block = preserved_blocks[0].strip()
 253:         first_block_path = os.path.join("output", "first_preserved_block.txt")
 254:         os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(first_block_path), exist_ok=True)
 255:         try:
 256:             # 使用二进制模式写入，避免编码问题
 257:             with open(first_block_path, 'wb') as f:
 258:                 f.write(first_block.encode('utf-8'))
 259:             logging.info(f"已使用UTF-8编码保存第一个preserved块到文件: {first_block_path}")
 260:             logging.info(f"第一个preserved块内容: '{first_block}'")
 261:             
 262:             # 在控制台打印第一个preserved块
 263:             print("\n" + "="*80)
 264:             print("第一个preserved块内容:")
 265:             print("-"*80)

=== domain/video/pre/ai_processor.py lines 212-332 ===
 212: def clean_clip_text(text):
 213:     """清理剪辑文本，删除标点符号和多余空白"""
 214:     # 定义要保留的字符
 215:     keep_chars = {'#'}
 216:     # 定义要删除的标点符号
 217:     punctuation = {'，', '。', '！', '？', '、', ',', '.', '!', '?', '；', ';', '：', ':', '"', '"', ''', ''', '（', '）', '(', ')', '【', '】', '[', ']', '《', '》', '<', '>', '…', '~', '～', '`', '·', '、'}
 218:     
 219:     # 分割文本（以#为分隔符）
 220:     parts = text.split('#')
 221:     
 222:     # 处理每个部分
 223:     cleaned_parts = []
 224:     for part in parts:
 225:         # 1. 删除标点符号
 226:         cleaned = ''.join(char for char in part if char not in punctuation)
 227:         # 2. 删除多余空白
 228:         cleaned = ''.join(cleaned.split())
 229:         cleaned_parts.append(cleaned)
 230:     
 231:     # 用#重新连接文本
 232:     return '#'.join(part for part in cleaned_parts if part)
 233: 
 234: def extract_clip_text(llm_response, clean_text=False):
 235:     """从大模型返回中提取clip_text部分，选择preserved代码块中最长的一个"""
 236:     if not llm_response:
 237:         return None
 238:     
 239:     # 先移除plaintext标记
 240:     llm_response = llm_response.replace("plaintext", "").strip()
 241:     
 242:     # 使用正则表达式查找所有```preserved与```之间的内容
 243:     import re
 244:     pattern = r"```preserved(.*?)```"
 245:     preserved_blocks = re.findall(pattern, llm_response, re.DOTALL)
 246:     
 247:     if preserved_blocks:
 248:         # 找到了preserved代码块
 249:         logging.info(f"找到 {len(preserved_blocks)} 个preserved代码块")
 250:         
 251:         # 保存第一个preserved块到单独文件
 252:         first_block = preserved_blocks[0].strip()
 253:         first_block_path = os.path.join("output", "first_preserved_block.txt")
 254:         os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(first_block_path), exist_ok=True)
 255:         try:
 256:             # 使用二进制模式写入，避免编码问题
 257:             with open(first_block_path, 'wb') as f:
 258:                 f.write(first_block.encode('utf-8'))
 259:             logging.info(f"已使用UTF-8编码保存第一个preserved块到文件: {first_block_path}")
 260:             logging.info(f"第一个preserved块内容: '{first_block}'")
 261:             
 262:             # 在控制台打印第一个preserved块
 263:             print("\n" + "="*80)
 264:             print("第一个preserved块内容:")
 265:             print("-"*80)
 266:             print(first_block)
 267:             print("="*80 + "\n")
 268:         except Exception as e:
 269:             logging.error(f"保存第一个preserved块失败: {e}")
 270:         
 271:         # 找出最长的代码块
 272:         longest_block = max(preserved_blocks, key=len)
 273:         longest_length = len(longest_block)
 274:         logging.info(f"最长的代码块长度为 {longest_length} 字符")
 275:         
 276:         # 在日志中记录每个代码块的长度（调试用）
 277:         for i, block in enumerate(preserved_blocks):
 278:             logging.info(f"代码块 #{i+1} 长度: {len(block)} 字符")
 279:         
 280:         # 处理最长的代码块
 281:         content = longest_block.strip()
 282:         
 283:         # 添加文本清理
 284:         if clean_text:
 285:             content = clean_clip_text(content)
 286:         
 287:         # 额外清理：对每一行文本清理前后空格
 288:         content = "\n".join([line.strip() for line in content.split("\n")])
 289:         
 290:         return content
 291:     else:
 292:         # 如果没有找到preserved代码块，给出明确错误
 293:         logging.error("未找到任何preserved代码块")
 294:         return "未能找到preserved代码块，请检查大模型输出"
 295: 
 296: def analyze_text(text, max_length=50):
 297:     import re
 298:     
 299:     # 检查是否有预处理文件存在
 300:     preprocessed_file = os.path.join("output", "temp", "model_input_text.txt")
 301:     if os.path.exists(preprocessed_file):
 302:         logging.info("检测到文本已经被unified_preprocessor预处理过，将跳过重复分段")
 303:         # 按行分割文本，每行作为一个段落
 304:         paragraphs = [line.strip() for line in text.split('\n') if line.strip()]
 305:         
 306:         # 记录结果
 307:         logging.info(f"使用预处理好的文本，共 {len(paragraphs)} 个段落")
 308:         print(f"\n### 使用预处理的段落（共 {len(paragraphs)} 个）###")
 309:         for i, paragraph in enumerate(paragraphs):
 310:             print(f"## 段落{i+1}: {paragraph}")
 311:         
 312:         # 返回已预处理的文本，每个段落作为一个元素
 313:         return paragraphs
 314:     
 315:     # 如果没有预处理文件，则执行原来的处理逻辑
 316:     # 主要分类
 317:     # 用句号、问号、感叹号等一级标点分割文本
 318:     pattern = r'([。！？\!\\?])'
 319:     segments = re.split(pattern, text)
 320:     
 321:     # 组合句子与标点
 322:     primary_sentences = []
 323:     for i in range(0, len(segments)-1, 2):
 324:         if i+1 < len(segments):
 325:             sentence = segments[i] + segments[i+1]
 326:             if sentence.strip():
 327:                 primary_sentences.append(sentence.strip())
 328:     
 329:     # 处理可能的最后一个片段（如果文本不以标点结束）
 330:     if len(segments) % 2 == 1 and segments[-1].strip():
 331:         primary_sentences.append(segments[-1].strip())
 332:     

=== domain/video/pre/ai_processor.py lines 234-354 ===
 234: def extract_clip_text(llm_response, clean_text=False):
 235:     """从大模型返回中提取clip_text部分，选择preserved代码块中最长的一个"""
 236:     if not llm_response:
 237:         return None
 238:     
 239:     # 先移除plaintext标记
 240:     llm_response = llm_response.replace("plaintext", "").strip()
 241:     
 242:     # 使用正则表达式查找所有```preserved与```之间的内容
 243:     import re
 244:     pattern = r"```preserved(.*?)```"
 245:     preserved_blocks = re.findall(pattern, llm_response, re.DOTALL)
 246:     
 247:     if preserved_blocks:
 248:         # 找到了preserved代码块
 249:         logging.info(f"找到 {len(preserved_blocks)} 个preserved代码块")
 250:         
 251:         # 保存第一个preserved块到单独文件
 252:         first_block = preserved_blocks[0].strip()
 253:         first_block_path = os.path.join("output", "first_preserved_block.txt")
 254:         os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(first_block_path), exist_ok=True)
 255:         try:
 256:             # 使用二进制模式写入，避免编码问题
 257:             with open(first_block_path, 'wb') as f:
 258:                 f.write(first_block.encode('utf-8'))
 259:             logging.info(f"已使用UTF-8编码保存第一个preserved块到文件: {first_block_path}")
 260:             logging.info(f"第一个preserved块内容: '{first_block}'")
 261:             
 262:             # 在控制台打印第一个preserved块
 263:             print("\n" + "="*80)
 264:             print("第一个preserved块内容:")
 265:             print("-"*80)
 266:             print(first_block)
 267:             print("="*80 + "\n")
 268:         except Exception as e:
 269:             logging.error(f"保存第一个preserved块失败: {e}")
 270:         
 271:         # 找出最长的代码块
 272:         longest_block = max(preserved_blocks, key=len)
 273:         longest_length = len(longest_block)
 274:         logging.info(f"最长的代码块长度为 {longest_length} 字符")
 275:         
 276:         # 在日志中记录每个代码块的长度（调试用）
 277:         for i, block in enumerate(preserved_blocks):
 278:             logging.info(f"代码块 #{i+1} 长度: {len(block)} 字符")
 279:         
 280:         # 处理最长的代码块
 281:         content = longest_block.strip()
 282:         
 283:         # 添加文本清理
 284:         if clean_text:
 285:             content = clean_clip_text(content)
 286:         
 287:         # 额外清理：对每一行文本清理前后空格
 288:         content = "\n".join([line.strip() for line in content.split("\n")])
 289:         
 290:         return content
 291:     else:
 292:         # 如果没有找到preserved代码块，给出明确错误
 293:         logging.error("未找到任何preserved代码块")
 294:         return "未能找到preserved代码块，请检查大模型输出"
 295: 
 296: def analyze_text(text, max_length=50):
 297:     import re
 298:     
 299:     # 检查是否有预处理文件存在
 300:     preprocessed_file = os.path.join("output", "temp", "model_input_text.txt")
 301:     if os.path.exists(preprocessed_file):
 302:         logging.info("检测到文本已经被unified_preprocessor预处理过，将跳过重复分段")
 303:         # 按行分割文本，每行作为一个段落
 304:         paragraphs = [line.strip() for line in text.split('\n') if line.strip()]
 305:         
 306:         # 记录结果
 307:         logging.info(f"使用预处理好的文本，共 {len(paragraphs)} 个段落")
 308:         print(f"\n### 使用预处理的段落（共 {len(paragraphs)} 个）###")
 309:         for i, paragraph in enumerate(paragraphs):
 310:             print(f"## 段落{i+1}: {paragraph}")
 311:         
 312:         # 返回已预处理的文本，每个段落作为一个元素
 313:         return paragraphs
 314:     
 315:     # 如果没有预处理文件，则执行原来的处理逻辑
 316:     # 主要分类
 317:     # 用句号、问号、感叹号等一级标点分割文本
 318:     pattern = r'([。！？\!\\?])'
 319:     segments = re.split(pattern, text)
 320:     
 321:     # 组合句子与标点
 322:     primary_sentences = []
 323:     for i in range(0, len(segments)-1, 2):
 324:         if i+1 < len(segments):
 325:             sentence = segments[i] + segments[i+1]
 326:             if sentence.strip():
 327:                 primary_sentences.append(sentence.strip())
 328:     
 329:     # 处理可能的最后一个片段（如果文本不以标点结束）
 330:     if len(segments) % 2 == 1 and segments[-1].strip():
 331:         primary_sentences.append(segments[-1].strip())
 332:     
 333:     logging.info(f"一级分类完成，共找到 {len(primary_sentences)} 个句子")
 334:     
 335:     # 记录分类结果
 336:     try:
 337:         with open("logs/primary_sentences.log", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 338:             f.write(f"## 一级分类结果 ##\n共 {len(primary_sentences)} 个句子\n\n")
 339:             for i, sentence in enumerate(primary_sentences):
 340:                 f.write(f"#{i+1}: {sentence}\n")
 341:         logging.info("已保存一级分类结果到日志文件")
 342:     except Exception as e:
 343:         logging.error(f"保存一级分类结果到日志文件失败: {e}")
 344:     
 345:     # 打印一级分类结果（简化版）
 346:     print(f"\n### 一级分段结果（按句号、问号、感叹号等分割） ###")
 347:     for i, sentence in enumerate(primary_sentences):
 348:         print(f"#### 一级句子{i+1}: {sentence}")
 349:     print("### 一级分段结束 ###\n")
 350:     
 351:     # 直接使用一级分类结果作为最终结果
 352:     final_sentences = primary_sentences
 353:     
 354:     # 确保每个段落至少包含3个句子并合并相邻重复内容

=== domain/video/pre/ai_processor.py lines 296-416 ===
 296: def analyze_text(text, max_length=50):
 297:     import re
 298:     
 299:     # 检查是否有预处理文件存在
 300:     preprocessed_file = os.path.join("output", "temp", "model_input_text.txt")
 301:     if os.path.exists(preprocessed_file):
 302:         logging.info("检测到文本已经被unified_preprocessor预处理过，将跳过重复分段")
 303:         # 按行分割文本，每行作为一个段落
 304:         paragraphs = [line.strip() for line in text.split('\n') if line.strip()]
 305:         
 306:         # 记录结果
 307:         logging.info(f"使用预处理好的文本，共 {len(paragraphs)} 个段落")
 308:         print(f"\n### 使用预处理的段落（共 {len(paragraphs)} 个）###")
 309:         for i, paragraph in enumerate(paragraphs):
 310:             print(f"## 段落{i+1}: {paragraph}")
 311:         
 312:         # 返回已预处理的文本，每个段落作为一个元素
 313:         return paragraphs
 314:     
 315:     # 如果没有预处理文件，则执行原来的处理逻辑
 316:     # 主要分类
 317:     # 用句号、问号、感叹号等一级标点分割文本
 318:     pattern = r'([。！？\!\\?])'
 319:     segments = re.split(pattern, text)
 320:     
 321:     # 组合句子与标点
 322:     primary_sentences = []
 323:     for i in range(0, len(segments)-1, 2):
 324:         if i+1 < len(segments):
 325:             sentence = segments[i] + segments[i+1]
 326:             if sentence.strip():
 327:                 primary_sentences.append(sentence.strip())
 328:     
 329:     # 处理可能的最后一个片段（如果文本不以标点结束）
 330:     if len(segments) % 2 == 1 and segments[-1].strip():
 331:         primary_sentences.append(segments[-1].strip())
 332:     
 333:     logging.info(f"一级分类完成，共找到 {len(primary_sentences)} 个句子")
 334:     
 335:     # 记录分类结果
 336:     try:
 337:         with open("logs/primary_sentences.log", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 338:             f.write(f"## 一级分类结果 ##\n共 {len(primary_sentences)} 个句子\n\n")
 339:             for i, sentence in enumerate(primary_sentences):
 340:                 f.write(f"#{i+1}: {sentence}\n")
 341:         logging.info("已保存一级分类结果到日志文件")
 342:     except Exception as e:
 343:         logging.error(f"保存一级分类结果到日志文件失败: {e}")
 344:     
 345:     # 打印一级分类结果（简化版）
 346:     print(f"\n### 一级分段结果（按句号、问号、感叹号等分割） ###")
 347:     for i, sentence in enumerate(primary_sentences):
 348:         print(f"#### 一级句子{i+1}: {sentence}")
 349:     print("### 一级分段结束 ###\n")
 350:     
 351:     # 直接使用一级分类结果作为最终结果
 352:     final_sentences = primary_sentences
 353:     
 354:     # 确保每个段落至少包含3个句子并合并相邻重复内容
 355:     print("### 开始段落合并处理 ###")
 356:     merged_paragraphs = merge_short_paragraphs(final_sentences)
 357:     
 358:     # 输出合并结果
 359:     print(f"\n### 合并后段落结果预览（共 {len(merged_paragraphs)} 个段落）###")
 360:     for i, paragraph in enumerate(merged_paragraphs):
 361:         # 将段落中的句子合并为一行显示
 362:         combined_paragraph = "".join(paragraph)
 363:         print(f"## 段落{i+1} (包含 {len(paragraph)} 个句子):")
 364:         print(f"  {combined_paragraph}")
 365:     
 366:     # 将段落中的句子合并为段落返回，而不是单独返回每个句子
 367:     result_lines = []
 368:     for paragraph in merged_paragraphs:
 369:         # 每个段落合并为一行
 370:         combined_paragraph = "".join(paragraph)
 371:         result_lines.append(combined_paragraph)
 372:     
 373:     print(f"### 段落合并处理结束，共得到 {len(merged_paragraphs)} 个段落 ###\n")
 374:     
 375:     # 将处理后的段落结果保存到文件（每个段落一行）
 376:     try:
 377:         with open("logs/final_sentences.log", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 378:             f.write(f"## 最终段落结果 ##\n共 {len(result_lines)} 行文本\n\n")
 379:             for i, line in enumerate(result_lines):
 380:                 f.write(f"{line}\n")
 381:         logging.info(f"已保存最终段落结果到日志文件，共 {len(result_lines)} 行")
 382:     except Exception as e:
 383:         logging.error(f"保存最终段落结果到日志文件失败: {e}")
 384:     
 385:     return result_lines
 386: 
 387: def merge_short_paragraphs(sentences):
 388:     """合并短段落，确保每个段落至少包含3个句子，并合并相邻的重复内容
 389:     
 390:     Args:
 391:         sentences: 分割后的基础句子列表
 392:         
 393:     Returns:
 394:         List[List[str]]: 合并后的段落列表，每个段落是一个句子列表
 395:     """
 396:     import re
 397:     
 398:     # 特殊情况处理：如果总句子数少于3，则作为一个段落返回
 399:     if len(sentences) < 3:
 400:         print("总句子数少于3，作为一个段落返回")
 401:         return [sentences]
 402:     
 403:     # 初始化结果列表
 404:     result_paragraphs = []
 405:     
 406:     # 当前处理的段落
 407:     current_paragraph = []
 408:     
 409:     # 遍历所有句子
 410:     for i, sentence in enumerate(sentences):
 411:         # 添加当前句子到当前段落
 412:         current_paragraph.append(sentence)
 413:         
 414:         # 如果当前段落已有3个或更多句子，将其添加到结果中并重置
 415:         if len(current_paragraph) >= 3:
 416:             result_paragraphs.append(current_paragraph)

 139: def step7_add_subtitle(input_video, config):
 140:     """第七步：添加字幕"""
 141:     logger.info("开始执行步骤7: 添加字幕")
 142:     
 143:     # 创建字幕缓存
 144:     subtitle_cache = {}
 145:     
 146:     # 在step7_add_subtitle函数开始处添加
 147:     selection_reason = "直接传入的输入参数"  # 默认原因
 148:     
 149:     # 尝试从pipeline_state.json读取最近处理的视频文件
 150:     state_file = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "pipeline_state.json")
 151:     latest_video = input_video
 152: 
 153:     # 健壮性检查：如果传入的路径是目录，则查找最新的视频文件
 154:     if latest_video and os.path.isdir(latest_video):
 155:         logger.warning(f"提供的输入路径是一个目录: {latest_video}，将自动查找其中的最新视频文件。")
 156:         # 参考zimu模块的逻辑，查找目录中的视频文件
 157:         search_dir = latest_video
 158:         # 首先查找常见的视频格式
 159:         video_files = []
 160:         for ext in ["*.mp4", "*.avi", "*.mov", "*.mkv", "*.flv"]:
 161:             video_files.extend(glob.glob(os.path.join(search_dir, ext)))
 162:         
 163:         if video_files:
 164:             # 按修改时间排序，获取最新的文件
 165:             video_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 166:             latest_video = video_files[0]
 167:             selection_reason = f"自动在目录 {search_dir} 中找到的最新视频文件"
 168:             logger.info(f"已自动选择视频文件: {latest_video}")
 169:             print(f"已自动选择视频文件: {latest_video}")
 170:         else:
 171:             logger.error(f"在目录 {search_dir} 中未找到任何支持的视频文件。")
 172:             print(f"错误: 在目录 {search_dir} 中未找到任何视频文件。")
 173:             return False, None
 174: 
 175:     # 确保input_video不为None
 176:     if latest_video is None:
 177:         logger.error("输入视频为None，无法继续处理")
 178:         print("错误: 输入视频为None，请先选择有效的视频文件")
 179:         
 180:         # 尝试查找可用的视频文件
 181:         clip_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "*_clip*.mp4"))
 182:         if clip_files:
 183:             clip_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 184:             print(f"\n找到剪辑后的视频文件: {clip_files[0]}")
 185:             print("是否使用此文件? (y/n, 默认y)")
 186:             user_choice = input_with_timeout("> ", default="y").strip().lower()
 187:             if user_choice != 'n':
 188:                 latest_video = clip_files[0]
 189:                 selection_reason = f"自动找到的最新剪辑视频文件 (共找到{len(clip_files)}个)"
 190:                 print(f"将使用文件: {latest_video}")
 191:             else:
 192:                 return False, None
 193:         else:
 194:             mp4_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "*.mp4"))
 195:             if mp4_files:
 196:                 mp4_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 197:                 print(f"\n找到视频文件: {mp4_files[0]}")
 198:                 print("是否使用此文件? (y/n, 默认y)")
 199:                 user_choice = input_with_timeout("> ", default="y").strip().lower()
 200:                 if user_choice != 'n':
 201:                     latest_video = mp4_files[0]
 202:                     print(f"将使用文件: {latest_video}")
 203:                 else:
 204:                     return False, None
 205:             else:
 206:                 print("未找到任何视频文件，无法继续处理")
 207:                 return False, None
 208: 
 209:     # 导入字幕校准模块（优先包内导入，兼容脚本直跑）
 210:     try:
 211:         from pre.stage.stage7_0 import correct_subtitle
 212:     except ImportError:
 213:         from stage7_0 import correct_subtitle
 214:     
 215:     # 直接使用output文件夹中的total.ass文件
 216:     def find_best_subtitle_file():
 217:         """直接使用output文件夹中的total.ass文件"""
 218:         output_dir = config["output_dir"]
 219:         ass_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.ass")
 220:         
 221:         if os.path.exists(ass_file):
 222:             logger.info(f"找到ASS字幕文件: {ass_file}")
 223:             print(f"找到并使用ASS字幕文件: {ass_file}")
 224:             return ass_file, ass_file, "ass"
 225:         else:
 226:             logger.error(f"错误: 在 {output_dir} 中未找到total.ass文件。")
 227:             print(f"错误: 未找到指定的字幕文件total.ass。请确保相关步骤已成功执行。")
 228:             return None, None, None
 229:     
 230:     # 查找字幕文件 
 231:     subtitle_file, original_subtitle_file, subtitle_format = find_best_subtitle_file()
 232:     
 233:     if not subtitle_file:
 234:         print("错误: 未找到任何字幕文件，无法添加字幕")
 235:         return False, latest_video
 236:     
 237:     # 记录字幕文件信息
 238:     logger.info(f"使用字幕文件: {subtitle_file}, 格式: {subtitle_format}")
 239:     
 240:     # 优化：缓存字幕内容
 241:     def read_subtitle_content(file_path):
 242:         """读取字幕文件内容，使用缓存减少IO操作"""
 243:         if file_path in subtitle_cache:
 244:             return subtitle_cache[file_path]
 245:             
 246:         content = None
 247:         used_encoding = None
 248:         for encoding in ['utf-8-sig', 'utf-8', 'gbk', 'gb2312', 'latin1']:
 249:             try:
 250:                 with open(file_path, 'r', encoding=encoding) as f:
 251:                     content = f.read()
 252:                     used_encoding = encoding
 253:                     break
 254:             except (UnicodeDecodeError, TypeError):
 255:                 continue
 256:         
 257:         if content:
 258:             subtitle_cache[file_path] = content
 259:             logger.info(f"使用 {used_encoding} 编码读取字幕文件: {file_path}")
 260:             return content
 261:         else:
 262:             logger.error(f"无法使用任何支持的编码读取字幕文件: {file_path}")
 263:             return ""
 264: 
 265:     # 使用临时目录处理文件
 266:     temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
 267:     
 268:     # 记录选择的字幕文件
 269:     logger.info(f"选择的字幕文件: {subtitle_file}")

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage7.py lines 215-345 ===
 215:     # 直接使用output文件夹中的total.ass文件
 216:     def find_best_subtitle_file():
 217:         """直接使用output文件夹中的total.ass文件"""
 218:         output_dir = config["output_dir"]
 219:         ass_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.ass")
 220:         
 221:         if os.path.exists(ass_file):
 222:             logger.info(f"找到ASS字幕文件: {ass_file}")
 223:             print(f"找到并使用ASS字幕文件: {ass_file}")
 224:             return ass_file, ass_file, "ass"
 225:         else:
 226:             logger.error(f"错误: 在 {output_dir} 中未找到total.ass文件。")
 227:             print(f"错误: 未找到指定的字幕文件total.ass。请确保相关步骤已成功执行。")
 228:             return None, None, None
 229:     
 230:     # 查找字幕文件 
 231:     subtitle_file, original_subtitle_file, subtitle_format = find_best_subtitle_file()
 232:     
 233:     if not subtitle_file:
 234:         print("错误: 未找到任何字幕文件，无法添加字幕")
 235:         return False, latest_video
 236:     
 237:     # 记录字幕文件信息
 238:     logger.info(f"使用字幕文件: {subtitle_file}, 格式: {subtitle_format}")
 239:     
 240:     # 优化：缓存字幕内容
 241:     def read_subtitle_content(file_path):
 242:         """读取字幕文件内容，使用缓存减少IO操作"""
 243:         if file_path in subtitle_cache:
 244:             return subtitle_cache[file_path]
 245:             
 246:         content = None
 247:         used_encoding = None
 248:         for encoding in ['utf-8-sig', 'utf-8', 'gbk', 'gb2312', 'latin1']:
 249:             try:
 250:                 with open(file_path, 'r', encoding=encoding) as f:
 251:                     content = f.read()
 252:                     used_encoding = encoding
 253:                     break
 254:             except (UnicodeDecodeError, TypeError):
 255:                 continue
 256:         
 257:         if content:
 258:             subtitle_cache[file_path] = content
 259:             logger.info(f"使用 {used_encoding} 编码读取字幕文件: {file_path}")
 260:             return content
 261:         else:
 262:             logger.error(f"无法使用任何支持的编码读取字幕文件: {file_path}")
 263:             return ""
 264: 
 265:     # 使用临时目录处理文件
 266:     temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
 267:     
 268:     # 记录选择的字幕文件
 269:     logger.info(f"选择的字幕文件: {subtitle_file}")
 270: 
 271:     # 在应用字幕前，应用样式
 272:     styled_ass_file = os.path.join(temp_dir, f"{os.path.basename(latest_video)}.styled.ass")
 273:     width, height = get_video_dimensions(latest_video)
 274: 
 275:     try:
 276:         subs = pysubs2.load(subtitle_file, encoding='utf-8-sig')
 277:         subs.info['PlayResX'] = str(width)
 278:         subs.info['PlayResY'] = str(height)
 279: 
 280:         style = _create_style_from_config(video_width=width, video_height=height)
 281:         # 动态设置字体名称
 282:         style.fontname = get_font_name_from_index(subtitle_config.DEFAULT_FONT_INDEX)
 283:         subs.styles["Default"] = style
 284: 
 285:         for line in subs:
 286:             line.style = "Default"
 287:         
 288:         subs.info['WrapStyle'] = '1' # Use 1 for explicit end-of-line wrapping, respecting \N
 289: 
 290:         subs.save(styled_ass_file, encoding='utf-8-sig')
 291:         logger.info(f"成功应用样式并保存到: {styled_ass_file}")
 292:         success = True
 293:     except Exception as e:
 294:         logger.error(f"为字幕文件应用样式失败: {e}")
 295:         import traceback
 296:         logger.error(traceback.format_exc())
 297:         success = False
 298: 
 299:     if not success:
 300:         logger.error("为字幕文件应用样式失败，将尝试使用原始字幕文件")
 301:         styled_ass_file = subtitle_file
 302:     
 303:     # 最终用于添加字幕的文件
 304:     final_subtitle_file = styled_ass_file
 305:     
 306:     # 记录最终使用的字幕文件
 307:     logger.info(f"最终用于添加字幕的文件: {final_subtitle_file}")
 308:     
 309:     # 获取模型名称和轮数
 310:     model_name = config.get("model_name", "qwen")
 311:     rounds = config.get("rounds", 1)
 312:     
 313:     # 调用字幕校准函数
 314:     print(f"正在校准字幕文件: {final_subtitle_file}")
 315:     logger.info(f"开始校准字幕文件: {final_subtitle_file}")
 316:     
 317:     correction_start_time = time.time()
 318:     correction_success, corrected_subtitle_file = correct_subtitle(
 319:         final_subtitle_file,
 320:         model_name=model_name,
 321:         rounds=rounds,
 322:         debug=True,
 323:         output_dir=config["output_dir"]
 324:     )
 325:     correction_duration = time.time() - correction_start_time
 326:     logger.info(f"大模型校正字幕总用时: {correction_duration:.2f}秒")
 327:     print(f"大模型校准字幕完成，总用时: {correction_duration:.2f}秒")
 328:     
 329:     if not correction_success:
 330:         print("\n字幕校准失败，将使用原始字幕文件")
 331:         logger.warning("字幕校准失败，将使用原始字幕文件")
 332:         corrected_subtitle_file = final_subtitle_file  # 使用原始字幕文件
 333:     else:
 334:         logger.info(f"将使用已校准的字幕文件: {corrected_subtitle_file}")
 335:         final_subtitle_file = corrected_subtitle_file  # 更新final_subtitle_file为校准后的文件
 336:         logger.info(f"已将字幕文件更新为校准后的文件: {final_subtitle_file}")
 337:     
 338:     # 添加字幕到视频 - 使用优化的字幕处理函数
 339:     print("\n正在添加字幕到视频...")
 340:     
 341:     # 准备环境变量
 342:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_VIDEO_FILE'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(latest_video))
 343:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_SUBTITLE_FILE'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(final_subtitle_file))
 344:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_OUTPUT_DIR'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(config["output_dir"]))  # 直接使用主output目录
 345:     

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage7.py lines 330-453 ===
 330:         print("\n字幕校准失败，将使用原始字幕文件")
 331:         logger.warning("字幕校准失败，将使用原始字幕文件")
 332:         corrected_subtitle_file = final_subtitle_file  # 使用原始字幕文件
 333:     else:
 334:         logger.info(f"将使用已校准的字幕文件: {corrected_subtitle_file}")
 335:         final_subtitle_file = corrected_subtitle_file  # 更新final_subtitle_file为校准后的文件
 336:         logger.info(f"已将字幕文件更新为校准后的文件: {final_subtitle_file}")
 337:     
 338:     # 添加字幕到视频 - 使用优化的字幕处理函数
 339:     print("\n正在添加字幕到视频...")
 340:     
 341:     # 准备环境变量
 342:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_VIDEO_FILE'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(latest_video))
 343:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_SUBTITLE_FILE'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(final_subtitle_file))
 344:     os.environ['FUNCLIP_OUTPUT_DIR'] = os.path.normpath(os.path.abspath(config["output_dir"]))  # 直接使用主output目录
 345:     
 346:     print(f"设置视频文件: {os.environ['FUNCLIP_VIDEO_FILE']}")
 347:     print(f"设置字幕文件: {os.environ['FUNCLIP_SUBTITLE_FILE']}")
 348:     print(f"设置输出目录: {os.environ['FUNCLIP_OUTPUT_DIR']}")
 349:     
 350:     # 生成输出文件名
 351:     base_name, ext = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(latest_video))
 352:     
 353:     # 简化输出文件命名，去掉中间步骤标记
 354:     clean_base_name = base_name
 355:     if "_转码版" in clean_base_name:
 356:         clean_base_name = clean_base_name.replace("_转码版", "")
 357:     if "_去气口版" in clean_base_name:
 358:         clean_base_name = clean_base_name.replace("_去气口版", "")
 359:     if "_智能剪辑无字幕版" in clean_base_name:
 360:         clean_base_name = clean_base_name.replace("_智能剪辑无字幕版", "")
 361:     
 362:     # 修改输出文件名命名方式，使用中文后缀
 363:     output_video = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], f"{clean_base_name}_智能剪辑带字幕版{ext}")
 364:     
 365:     # 封装路径转义逻辑
 366:     def escape_path_for_ffmpeg_filter(path):
 367:         if os.name == 'nt':
 368:             # 在Windows上，FFmpeg滤镜中的路径需要对冒号进行转义
 369:             # 并且路径分隔符应为 /
 370:             return path.replace('\\', '/').replace(':', '\\:')
 371:         return path
 372:     
 373:     # 准备将字幕添加到视频
 374:     success = False
 375:     
 376:     # -------------------------------------------------------------
 377:     # 直接使用ASS文件进行视频合成
 378:     # -------------------------------------------------------------
 379:     try:
 380:         # 确保所有路径使用正斜杠
 381:         video_file_fixed = latest_video.replace('\\', '/')
 382:         output_video_fixed = output_video.replace('\\', '/')
 383:         subtitle_file_fixed = final_subtitle_file.replace('\\', '/')
 384: 
 385:         # 获取视频尺寸
 386:         print("\n正在读取视频信息...")
 387:         width, height = get_video_dimensions(video_file_fixed)
 388: 
 389:         # 路径转义
 390:         if os.name == 'nt':
 391:             ass_path_escaped = subtitle_file_fixed.replace('\\', '/').replace(':', '\\:')
 392:         else:
 393:             ass_path_escaped = subtitle_file_fixed
 394: 
 395:         # 获取字体目录的绝对路径并进行转义
 396:         font_dir = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', '..', 'font'))
 397:         fonts_dir_escaped = escape_path_for_ffmpeg_filter(font_dir)
 398: 
 399:         # 构建并执行ffmpeg命令
 400:         cmd = [
 401:             "ffmpeg", "-y",
 402:             "-i", video_file_fixed,
 403:             "-vf", f"ass='{ass_path_escaped}':fontsdir='{fonts_dir_escaped}'",
 404:             "-c:v", "h264_nvenc",
 405:             "-preset", "p1",
 406:             "-cq", "30",
 407:             "-c:a", "copy",
 408:             output_video_fixed
 409:         ]
 410:         
 411:         logger.info(f"执行FFmpeg命令: {' '.join(cmd)}")
 412:         
 413:         video_gen_start_time = time.time()
 414:         # 使用subprocess.Popen以实时获取输出
 415:         process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, 
 416:                                universal_newlines=True, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
 417: 
 418:         # 实时打印ffmpeg的输出
 419:         for line in process.stdout:
 420:             # 查找以'frame='开头的行来显示进度
 421:             if line.strip().startswith('frame='):
 422:                 # 使用回车符 \r 来在同一行更新进度
 423:                 print(f"  > {line.strip()}", end='\r')
 424:             else:
 425:                 # 打印其他信息
 426:                 print(line.strip())
 427:         
 428:         # 等待命令执行完成
 429:         process.wait()
 430:         video_gen_duration = time.time() - video_gen_start_time
 431:         print() # 打印一个新行，避免下一行输出覆盖进度条
 432:         
 433:         if process.returncode == 0:
 434:             logger.info(f"生成带字幕的视频用时: {video_gen_duration:.2f}秒")
 435:             print(f"生成带字幕的视频完成，用时: {video_gen_duration:.2f}秒")
 436:             logger.info(f"字幕添加成功: {output_video}")
 437:             success = True
 438:         else:
 439:             logger.error(f"FFmpeg添加字幕失败。返回码: {process.returncode}")
 440:             
 441:     except Exception as e:
 442:         logger.error(f"添加字幕时出错: {str(e)}")
 443:         import traceback
 444:         logger.error(traceback.format_exc())
 445:     
 446:     if success:
 447:         logger.info(f"字幕添加成功: {output_video}")
 448:         print(f"\n字幕添加成功: {output_video}")
 449:         return True, output_video
 450:     else:
 451:         logger.error(f"字幕添加失败: {latest_video}")
 452:         print(f"\n字幕添加失败: {latest_video}")
 453:         return False, latest_video

  77: def normalize_forum_info(data):
  78:     """Normalize forum_post_info payload to a stable cover_titles schema."""
  79:     if not isinstance(data, dict):
  80:         return {}
  81: 
  82:     normalized = dict(data)
  83:     cover_titles = []
  84:     raw_cover_titles = normalized.get("cover_titles")
  85:     default_positions = ["up", "middle", "down"]
  86: 
  87:     if isinstance(raw_cover_titles, list):
  88:         for idx, item in enumerate(raw_cover_titles):
  89:             default_position = default_positions[min(idx, len(default_positions) - 1)]
  90:             if isinstance(item, dict):
  91:                 text = str(item.get("text") or item.get("title") or "").strip()
  92:                 position = str(item.get("position") or default_position).strip().lower()
  93:             else:
  94:                 text = str(item or "").strip()
  95:                 position = default_position
  96:             if not text:
  97:                 continue
  98:             if position not in {"up", "middle", "down"}:
  99:                 position = default_position
 100:             cover_titles.append({"position": position, "text": text})
 101: 
 102:     if not cover_titles:
 103:         legacy_candidates = [
 104:             ("up", normalized.get("cover_title_up"), normalized.get("封面标题上")),
 105:             ("middle", normalized.get("cover_title_middle"), normalized.get("封面标题中")),
 106:             ("down", normalized.get("cover_title_down"), normalized.get("封面标题下")),
 107:         ]
 108:         for position, value, legacy_value in legacy_candidates:
 109:             text = str(value or legacy_value or "").strip()
 110:             if text:
 111:                 cover_titles.append({"position": position, "text": text})
 112: 
 113:     normalized["cover_titles"] = cover_titles
 114:     for item in cover_titles:
 115:         position = item.get("position")
 116:         text = item.get("text", "")
 117:         if position == "up":
 118:             normalized["cover_title_up"] = text
 119:         elif position == "middle":
 120:             normalized["cover_title_middle"] = text
 121:         elif position == "down":
 122:             normalized["cover_title_down"] = text
 123: 
 124:     return normalized
 125: 
 126: 
 127: def process_titles_for_stage8(titles):
 128:     """
 129:     处理各种格式的标题，统一输出格式
 130:     
 131:     Args:
 132:         titles: 标题数据，可能的格式：
 133:             - 论坛语义化: [[{'text': '...', 'position': '...'}]]
 134:             - AI双行: [['主标题', '副标题']]
 135:             - 单行: ['标题'] 或 '标题'
 136:             
 137:     Returns:
 138:         tuple: (title_texts, title_positions)
 139:             - title_texts: 文本列表
 140:             - title_positions: 位置列表
 141:     """
 142:     if not titles:
 143:         return [], []
 144:         
 145:     # 获取第一个标题（因为我们只处理一个标题）
 146:     title = titles[0] if isinstance(titles, list) else titles
 147:     
 148:     # 处理论坛的语义化标题格式
 149:     if isinstance(title, list) and len(title) > 0 and isinstance(title[0], dict) and 'position' in title[0]:
 150:         title_texts = []
 151:         title_positions = []
 152:         for item in title:
 153:             if 'text' in item and item['text'].strip():
 154:                 title_texts.append(item['text'].strip())
 155:                 title_positions.append(item.get('position', 'center'))
 156:         return title_texts, title_positions
 157:     
 158:     # 处理AI生成的双行标题 [主标题, 副标题]
 159:     elif isinstance(title, list) and len(title) == 2:
 160:         return title, ['up', 'down']
 161:     
 162:     # 处理单行标题
 163:     elif isinstance(title, str):
 164:         return [title], ['center']
 165:     
 166:     # 处理其他列表格式
 167:     elif isinstance(title, list) and len(title) == 1:
 168:         return [str(title[0])], ['center']
 169:     
 170:     # 默认处理
 171:     return [str(title)], ['center']
 172: 
 173: 
 174: def get_semantic_color(display_index, original_positions, config):
 175:     """根据原始语义位置选择颜色"""
 176:     # 解析颜色的辅助函数
 177:     def parse_color(color_str, default_rgb):
 178:         if not color_str:
 179:             return default_rgb
 180: 
 181:         color_str = color_str.strip()
 182:         if color_str.startswith('#'):
 183:             try:
 184:                 hex_color = color_str[1:]
 185:                 if len(hex_color) == 6:
 186:                     return tuple(int(hex_color[i:i+2], 16) for i in (0, 2, 4))
 187:                 elif len(hex_color) == 3:
 188:                     return tuple(int(hex_color[i]*2, 16) for i in range(3))
 189:             except ValueError:
 190:                 pass
 191: 
 192:         # 颜色名称映射
 193:         color_map = {
 194:             'white': (255, 255, 255), 'black': (0, 0, 0),
 195:             'red': (255, 0, 0), 'green': (0, 255, 0), 'blue': (0, 0, 255),
 196:             'yellow': (255, 255, 0), 'cyan': (0, 255, 255), 'magenta': (255, 0, 255)
 197:         }
 198:         return color_map.get(color_str.lower(), default_rgb)
 199: 
 200:     # 语义颜色选择
 201:     if original_positions and display_index < len(original_positions):
 202:         position = original_positions[display_index]
 203:         if position == 'up':
 204:             return parse_color(config.get("title_up_color", "#FFFF00"), (255, 255, 0))
 205:         elif position == 'middle':
 206:             return parse_color(config.get("title_middle_color", "#00FF00"), (0, 255, 0))
 207:         elif position == 'down':
 208:             return parse_color(config.get("title_down_color", "#00FF00"), (0, 255, 0))
 209: 
 210:     # 默认：第一行黄色，其他绿色
 211:     if display_index == 0:
 212:         return parse_color(config.get("title_up_color", "#FFFF00"), (255, 255, 0))
 213:     else:
 214:         return parse_color(config.get("title_down_color", "#00FF00"), (0, 255, 0))
 215: 
 216: 
 217: # 大模型生成标题的提示词模板
 218: TITLE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE = """
 219: # 角色
 220: 你是一个专业的同城号口播文案标题AI写作助手，擅长结合各种信息，为用户生成最优秀的短视频口播文案标题。请遵循以下定义进行创作。
 221: 短视频口播 ：是指一个人面对拍摄镜头，在整个过程中不进行镜头切换，通过清晰、流畅且富有情绪变化的语言表达，将特定内容传达给观众的一种视频呈现形式。主播在口播时，通常会借助适当的表情、肢体语言等增强与观众的互动感和内容的感染力，让观众能够专注于主播所讲述的内容，常见于新闻播报、产品介绍、个人见解分享等多种视频场景。
 222: 口播文案 ：是专门为短视频口播视频创作的文字内容，它是一整段连贯的文字，旨在通过主播的口述生动地呈现信息。优秀的口播文案要充分考虑受众的接受习惯，具备清晰的逻辑结构，以口语化的表达方式准确传达核心要点，并且融入能够引发主播情绪表达的元素，使整个口播内容更具吸引力和说服力，从而更好地实现与观众的信息沟通和情感交流。
 223: 
 224: # 任务
 225: 根据以下视频文本内容，生成 **1个** 最凝练、最吸引人的视频标题。
 226: 
 227: {video_text}
 228: 
 229: # 最高原则 (必须严格遵守)
 230: 1. **地名要求**：如果视频文案中提到了具体的地名，生成的标题中**必须**包含此地名。这是硬性要求，不可忽略。
 231: 2. **字数限制**：标题必须分为主标题和副标题两行，每行字数**严格控制在6个字符以内**，且不能包含任何标点、数字或特殊符号。
 232: 
 233: # 其他要求
 234: 1. 标题要能准确概括视频主题，并使用吸引人的表达方式。
 235: 2. 标题要更口语化，俗气一点，大俗即大雅，并尽量激发某种情绪。
 236: 3. 把内容描述成与粉丝利益相关。
 237: 4. **格式**：必须严格按照 "主标题|副标题" 的格式返回，且只返回这一个标题。

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage8.py lines 241-401 ===
 241: def get_asr_text(output_dir="output"):
 242:     """
 243:     获取ASR识别的文本内容
 244:     
 245:     Args:
 246:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
 247:         
 248:     Returns:
 249:         str: ASR识别的文本内容
 250:     """
 251:     # 查找ASR结果文件
 252:     asr_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(output_dir, "script.txt"))
 253:     
 254:     if asr_files:
 255:         latest_file = max(asr_files, key=os.path.getmtime)
 256:         # 尝试不同的编码方式
 257:         encodings = ['utf-8', 'gbk', 'gb2312', 'gb18030', 'latin-1']
 258:         for encoding in encodings:
 259:             try:
 260:                 with open(latest_file, 'r', encoding=encoding) as f:
 261:                     content = f.read()
 262:                 print(f"成功使用{encoding}编码读取ASR文件")
 263:                 return content
 264:             except Exception as e:
 265:                 print(f"尝试使用{encoding}编码读取ASR文件失败: {str(e)}")
 266:                 continue
 267:         
 268:         print("警告: 尝试所有编码方式都无法读取ASR文件")
 269:         # 最后尝试以二进制方式读取并用latin-1强制解码
 270:         try:
 271:             with open(latest_file, 'rb') as f:
 272:                 return f.read().decode('latin-1')
 273:         except Exception as e:
 274:             logger.error(f"最终尝试读取ASR文件失败: {str(e)}")
 275:             return ""
 276:     
 277:     return ""
 278: 
 279: def generate_title_with_ai(text, config):
 280:     """
 281:     使用大模型生成视频标题
 282:     
 283:     Args:
 284:         text: ASR识别的文本内容
 285:         config: 配置信息
 286:         
 287:     Returns:
 288:         list: 生成的1个标题列表，格式为 [[主标题, 副标题]]
 289:     """
 290:     logger.info("使用大模型生成视频标题")
 291:     print("使用大模型生成1个视频标题...")
 292:     
 293:     # 准备提示词
 294:     prompt = TITLE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE.format(video_text=text)
 295:     
 296:     # 获取模型类型
 297:     model_name = config.get("model_name", "qwen")
 298:     
 299:     try:
 300:         # 获取项目根目录
 301:         root_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
 302:         
 303:         # 添加根目录到系统路径
 304:         if root_dir not in sys.path:
 305:             sys.path.insert(0, root_dir)
 306:         
 307:         # 使用与字幕矫正相同的方法直接调用大模型
 308:         if model_name == "openai":
 309:             # 直接使用相对导入
 310:             from funclip.llm import openai_api
 311:             # 获取API密钥
 312:             api_key = os.environ.get("OPENAI_API_KEY", "")
 313:             if not api_key:
 314:                 print("错误: 未设置OPENAI_API_KEY环境变量")
 315:                 logger.error("未设置OPENAI_API_KEY环境变量")
 316:                 return []
 317:             
 318:             # 调用API
 319:             system_content = "你是一位专业的视频标题生成专家，善于创作简洁有力、吸引人的标题。"
 320:             title_response = openai_api.openai_call(
 321:                 apikey=api_key,
 322:                 model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
 323:                 user_content=prompt,
 324:                 system_content=system_content
 325:             )
 326:         elif model_name == "g4f":
 327:             from funclip.llm import g4f_openai_api
 328:             
 329:             # 调用API
 330:             system_content = "你是一位专业的视频标题生成专家，善于创作简洁有力、吸引人的标题。"
 331:             title_response = g4f_openai_api.g4f_openai_call(
 332:                 model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
 333:                 user_content=prompt,
 334:                 system_content=system_content
 335:             )
 336:         elif model_name == "deepseek":
 337:             from funclip.llm import deepseek_api
 338:             # 获取API密钥
 339:             api_key = os.environ.get("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY", "")
 340:             if not api_key:
 341:                 print("错误: 未设置DEEPSEEK_API_KEY环境变量")
 342:                 logger.error("未设置DEEPSEEK_API_KEY环境变量")
 343:                 return []
 344:             
 345:             # 调用API
 346:             title_response = deepseek_api.deepseek_stream_call(
 347:                 apikey=api_key,
 348:                 user_content=prompt
 349:             )
 350:         elif model_name == "kimi":
 351:             from funclip.llm import kimi_api
 352:             # 获取API密钥
 353:             api_key = os.environ.get("KIMI_API_KEY", "")
 354:             if not api_key:
 355:                 print("错误: 未设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量")
 356:                 logger.error("未设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量")
 357:                 return []
 358:             
 359:             # 调用API
 360:             title_response = kimi_api.kimi_call(
 361:                 apikey=api_key,
 362:                 user_content=prompt
 363:             )
 364:         else:  # 默认使用千问
 365:             from funclip.llm import qwen_api
 366:             # 获取API密钥
 367:             api_key = os.environ.get("QWEN_API_KEY", "")
 368:             if not api_key:
 369:                 print("错误: 未设置QWEN_API_KEY环境变量")
 370:                 logger.error("未设置QWEN_API_KEY环境变量")
 371:                 return []
 372:             
 373:             # 调用API
 374:             title_response = qwen_api.call_qwen_model(
 375:                 key=api_key,
 376:                 model="qwen3-max",
 377:                 user_content=prompt
 378:             )
 379:             # 确保title_response是字符串而不是元组
 380:             if isinstance(title_response, tuple):
 381:                 title_response = title_response[0]
 382:         
 383:         # 处理大模型返回的标题文本
 384:         if title_response:
 385:             # 解析返回的标题 (格式: "主标题|副标题")
 386:             titles = []
 387:             # 拆分为多行
 388:             response_lines = title_response.strip().split('\n')
 389:             
 390:             # 处理每一行，直到找到一个有效的标题
 391:             for line in response_lines:
 392:                 line = line.strip()
 393:                 if not line:
 394:                     continue
 395:                     
 396:                 # 尝试按"|"分割
 397:                 parts = line.split('|')
 398:                 if len(parts) == 2:
 399:                     main_title = parts[0].strip()
 400:                     sub_title = parts[1].strip()
 401:                     titles.append([main_title, sub_title])

 279: def generate_title_with_ai(text, config):
 280:     """
 281:     使用大模型生成视频标题
 282:     
 283:     Args:
 284:         text: ASR识别的文本内容
 285:         config: 配置信息

 287:     Returns:
 288:         list: 生成的1个标题列表，格式为 [[主标题, 副标题]]

 321:                 apikey=api_key,

 325:             )
 326:         elif model_name == "g4f":
 327:             from funclip.llm import g4f_openai_api
 328:             
 329:             # 调用API
 330:             system_content = "你是一位专业的视频标题生成专家，善于创作简洁有力、吸引人的标题。"
 331:             title_response = g4f_openai_api.g4f_openai_call(
 332:                 model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
 333:                 user_content=prompt,
 334:                 system_content=system_content
 335:             )
 336:         elif model_name == "deepseek":

 338:             # 获取API密钥

 354:             if not api_key:
 355:                 print("错误: 未设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量")
 356:                 logger.error("未设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量")

 359:             # 调用API

 364:         else:  # 默认使用千问

 366:             # 获取API密钥
 367:             api_key = os.environ.get("QWEN_API_KEY", "")

 370:                 logger.e…187 tokens truncated…分为多行
 388:             response_lines = title_response.strip().split('\n')
 389:             
 390:             # 处理每一行，直到找到一个有效的标题
 391:             for line in response_lines:
 392:                 line = line.strip()
 393:                 if not line:
 394:                     continue
 395:                     
 396:                 # 尝试按"|"分割
 397:                 parts = line.split('|')
 398:                 if len(parts) == 2:
 399:                     main_title = parts[0].strip()
 400:                     sub_title = parts[1].strip()
 401:                     titles.append([main_title, sub_title])
 402:                     break  # 找到一个就退出
 403:                 else:
 404:                     # 如果没有明确分割，尝试按"-"或其他符号分割
 405:                     for separator in ['-', '：', ':', '_']:
 406:                         if separator in line:
 407:                             parts = line.split(separator, 1)
 408:                             main_title = parts[0].strip()
 409:                             sub_title = parts[1].strip()
 410:                             titles.append([main_title, sub_title])
 411:                             break
 412:                     if titles:
 413:                         break # 内层循环找到后，外层也退出
 414: 
 415:                     # 如果没有分隔符，将整行作为主标题
 416:                     if len(line) > 5:  # 长度足够时尝试拆分
 417:                         mid = len(line) // 2
 418:                         main_title = line[:mid].strip()
 419:                         sub_title = line[mid:].strip()
 420:                         titles.append([main_title, sub_title])
 421:                     else:
 422:                         titles.append([line, "精彩继续"])
 423:                     break # 不管怎样都只处理第一个有效行
 424:             
 425:             # 如果成功解析，返回该标题
 426:             if titles:
 427:                 print(f"成功生成标题: {titles[0]}")
 428:                 logger.info(f"成功生成标题：{titles[0]}")
 429:                 return [titles[0]] # 返回只包含一个标题的列表
 430:         
 431:         # 如果AI生成失败或返回格式不正确
 432:         print("生成标题失败，或返回格式不正确，将不添加标题")
 433:         return []
 434:     except Exception as e:
 435:         logger.error(f"调用AI生成标题时出错: {str(e)}")
 436:         print(f"生成标题时出错: {str(e)}")
 437:         return []
 438: 
 439: def get_font(font_path, font_size=80):

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage8.py lines 1035-1195 ===
1035: def get_forum_cover_title(output_dir):
1036:     """
1037:     从输出目录中获取论坛封面标题信息
1038: 
1039:     Args:
1040:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
1041: 
1042:     Returns:
1043:         dict: 包含论坛信息的字典，如果没有找到则返回None
1044:         {
1045:             'has_forum_info': bool,  # 是否是论坛任务
1046:             'cover_titles': [str] or [str, str] or [str, str, str] or None,  # 封面标题列表，1-3行
1047:             'post_info': dict  # 完整的论坛信息
1048:         }
1049:     """
1050:     try:
1051:         # 先搜索所有可能的forum_post_info.json文件
1052:         print(f"\n🔍 开始搜索forum_post_info.json文件...")
1053:         print(f"📂 搜索根目录: {output_dir}")
1054:         
1055:         # 列出输出目录的内容
1056:         if os.path.exists(output_dir):
1057:             print(f"📋 输出目录内容:")
1058:             for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
1059:                 item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
1060:                 if os.path.isfile(item_path):
1061:                     print(f"   📄 文件: {item}")
1062:                 else:
1063:                     print(f"   📁 目录: {item}")
1064:         
1065:         # 🎯 关键修复：优先在子目录中查找，因为系统将文件保存在子目录中
1066:         forum_info_file = None
1067:         found = False
1068:         
1069:         # 添加调试信息：显示所有找到的JSON文件
1070:         all_json_files = []
1071:         
1072:         # 🔥 重要修复：先检查根目录（文件实际保存位置）
1073:         root_file = os.path.join(output_dir, "forum_post_info.json")
1074:         if os.path.exists(root_file):
1075:             forum_info_file = root_file
1076:             logger.info(f"在根目录找到论坛信息文件: {forum_info_file}")
1077:             print(f"✅ 在根目录找到: {forum_info_file}")
1078:             found = True
1079:         else:
1080:             print(f"❌ 根目录未找到forum_post_info.json: {root_file}")
1081:         
1082:         # 如果根目录没有，再在子目录中查找
1083:         if not found:
1084:             for root, dirs, files in os.walk(output_dir):
1085:                 # 跳过temp和debug目录
1086:                 if 'temp' in root or 'debug' in root:
1087:                     continue
1088:                 
1089:                 # 跳过根目录（已经检查过了）
1090:                 if root == output_dir:
1091:                     continue
1092:                     
1093:                 print(f"🔍 搜索子目录: {root}")
1094:                 
1095:                 # 显示该目录下所有JSON文件
1096:                 json_files_in_dir = [f for f in files if f.endswith('.json')]
1097:                 if json_files_in_dir:
1098:                     print(f"   📄 JSON文件: {json_files_in_dir}")
1099:                     all_json_files.extend([(root, f) for f in json_files_in_dir])
1100:                 
1101:                 # 查找forum_post_info.json（不区分大小写）
1102:                 for filename in files:
1103:                     if filename.lower() == "forum_post_info.json":
1104:                         forum_info_file = os.path.join(root, filename)
1105:                         logger.info(f"在子目录中找到论坛信息文件: {forum_info_file}")
1106:                         print(f"✅ 在子目录中找到: {forum_info_file}")
1107:                         found = True
1108:                         break
1109:                 if found:
1110:                     break
1111:         
1112:         # 如果都没找到，显示调试信息
1113:         if not found:
1114:             print(f"❌ 在所有目录中都未找到forum_post_info.json文件")
1115:             if all_json_files:
1116:                 print(f"🔍 但找到了以下JSON文件:")
1117:                 for dir_path, filename in all_json_files:
1118:                     print(f"   - {os.path.join(dir_path, filename)}")
1119:             else:
1120:                 print(f"⚠️ 未找到任何JSON文件")
1121: 
1122:         if found and forum_info_file and os.path.exists(forum_info_file):
1123:             logger.info(f"找到论坛信息文件: {forum_info_file}")
1124:             print(f"🔍 [DEBUG] 找到论坛信息文件: {forum_info_file}")
1125: 
1126:             # 加载并归一化数据
1127:             with open(forum_info_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1128:                 forum_info = json.load(f)
1129:             
1130:             # 归一化数据格式
1131:             forum_info = normalize_forum_info(forum_info)
1132:             
1133:             print(f"🔍 [DEBUG] forum_post_info.json内容 (归一化后): {json.dumps(forum_info, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)}")
1134: 
1135:             # 使用新的统一数据格式
1136:             if 'cover_titles' in forum_info and forum_info['cover_titles']:
1137:                 cover_titles = forum_info['cover_titles']
1138:                 
1139:                 # 显示找到的标题
1140:                 found_titles = []
1141:                 for title_data in cover_titles:
1142:                     position_name = {'up': '上', 'middle': '中', 'down': '下'}.get(title_data['position'], title_data['position'])
1143:                     found_titles.append(f"{position_name}='{title_data['text']}'")
1144:                 
1145:                 logger.info(f"使用论坛封面标题({len(cover_titles)}行): {', '.join(found_titles)}")
1146:                 print(f"✅ 使用论坛提供的封面标题({len(cover_titles)}行): {', '.join(found_titles)}")
1147: 
1148:                 return {
1149:                     'has_forum_info': True,
1150:                     'cover_titles': cover_titles,  # 直接返回语义化标题列表
1151:                     'post_info': forum_info
1152:                 }
1153:             else:
1154:                 # 是论坛任务但没有封面标题
1155:                 logger.info("论坛任务但未提供封面标题")
1156:                 print(f"📝 论坛任务但未提供封面标题，将使用AI生成")
1157: 
1158:                 return {
1159:                     'has_forum_info': True,
1160:                     'cover_titles': None,
1161:                     'post_info': forum_info
1162:                 }
1163:         else:
1164:             logger.info("未找到论坛信息文件")
1165:             return None
1166: 
1167:     except Exception as e:
1168:         logger.error(f"读取论坛信息时出错: {str(e)}")
1169:         return None
1170: 
1171: def step8_add_title(input_video, config):
1172:     """第八步：添加视频封面标题"""
1173:     start_time = time.time()
1174:     logger.info("开始执行步骤8: 添加封面标题")
1175:     logger.info(f"使用配置: {json.dumps(config, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)}")
1176:     print("\n===== 步骤8: 添加封面标题 =====")
1177: 
1178:     output_dir = config.get("output_dir", "output")
1179:     logger.debug(f"输出目录: {output_dir}")
1180:     
1181:     # 详细显示输出目录信息
1182:     print(f"\n📂 当前输出目录: {output_dir}")
1183:     print(f"📍 绝对路径: {os.path.abspath(output_dir)}")
1184:     
1185:     # 列出目录内容
1186:     if os.path.exists(output_dir):
1187:         print(f"📋 目录内容:")
1188:         for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
1189:             item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
1190:             if os.path.isfile(item_path):
1191:                 print(f"   📄 {item} ({os.path.getsize(item_path)} bytes)")
1192:             else:
1193:                 print(f"   📁 {item}/")
1194:     else:
1195:         print(f"❌ 输出目录不存在！")

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage8.py lines 1171-1331 ===
1171: def step8_add_title(input_video, config):
1172:     """第八步：添加视频封面标题"""
1173:     start_time = time.time()
1174:     logger.info("开始执行步骤8: 添加封面标题")
1175:     logger.info(f"使用配置: {json.dumps(config, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)}")
1176:     print("\n===== 步骤8: 添加封面标题 =====")
1177: 
1178:     output_dir = config.get("output_dir", "output")
1179:     logger.debug(f"输出目录: {output_dir}")
1180:     
1181:     # 详细显示输出目录信息
1182:     print(f"\n📂 当前输出目录: {output_dir}")
1183:     print(f"📍 绝对路径: {os.path.abspath(output_dir)}")
1184:     
1185:     # 列出目录内容
1186:     if os.path.exists(output_dir):
1187:         print(f"📋 目录内容:")
1188:         for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
1189:             item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
1190:             if os.path.isfile(item_path):
1191:                 print(f"   📄 {item} ({os.path.getsize(item_path)} bytes)")
1192:             else:
1193:                 print(f"   📁 {item}/")
1194:     else:
1195:         print(f"❌ 输出目录不存在！")
1196: 
1197:     # 确保输出目录存在
1198:     os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1199:     
1200:     # 如果没有提供输入视频，则尝试查找最新处理的视频文件
1201:     if not input_video:
1202:         # 只查找带特定标记的视频
1203:         target_pattern = "*_智能剪辑带字幕版*.mp4"
1204:         logger.info(f"未提供输入视频，将在输出目录中自动查找: {target_pattern}")
1205:         print(f"未提供输入视频，将在输出目录中自动查找: {target_pattern}")
1206:         
1207:         subtitled_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(output_dir, target_pattern))
1208: 
1209:         if subtitled_files:
1210:             subtitled_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
1211:             input_video = subtitled_files[0]
1212:             logger.info(f"已自动选择最新处理的视频文件: {input_video}")
1213:             print(f"已自动选择最新处理的视频文件: {input_video}")
1214:         else:
1215:             logger.error(f"在输出目录 '{output_dir}' 中未找到匹配 '{target_pattern}' 的视频文件")
1216:             print(f"错误: 在输出目录 '{output_dir}' 中未找到匹配 '{target_pattern}' 的视频文件。请确保第6、7步已正确生成文件。")
1217:             return False, None
1218:     
1219:     # 新增：检查输入视频的有效性
1220:     if not input_video or not os.path.isfile(input_video):
1221:         logger.error(f"输入路径不是一个有效的文件: {input_video}")
1222:         print(f"错误: 输入的路径不是一个有效的文件: '{input_video}'。请检查调用流程。")
1223:         return False, None
1224:     
1225:     # 获取视频信息
1226:     try:
1227:         cmd = ["ffprobe", "-v", "error", "-select_streams", "v:0", "-show_entries", "stream=width,height", "-of", "json", input_video]
1228:         result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
1229:         video_info = json.loads(result.stdout)
1230:         width = video_info['streams'][0]['width']
1231:         height = video_info['streams'][0]['height']
1232:         logger.info(f"视频尺寸: {width}x{height}")
1233:     except Exception as e:
1234:         logger.error(f"获取视频信息失败: {str(e)}")
1235:         logger.warning("无法获取视频尺寸，将使用默认值 720x1280")
1236:         width, height = 720, 1280
1237:     
1238:     # 创建临时目录
1239:     temp_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "temp")
1240:     os.makedirs(temp_dir, exist_ok=True)
1241:     
1242:     # 获取标题 - 优先使用论坛封面标题
1243:     titles = []  # 默认无标题
1244:     use_forum_title = config.get("use_forum_cover_title", True)
1245: 
1246:     if use_forum_title:
1247:         # 尝试获取论坛信息
1248:         forum_result = get_forum_cover_title(output_dir)
1249:         if forum_result and forum_result['has_forum_info']:
1250:             if forum_result['cover_titles']:
1251:                 # 有论坛封面标题
1252:                 titles = [forum_result['cover_titles']]
1253:                 logger.info(f"使用论坛封面标题: {forum_result['cover_titles']}")
1254:                 print(f"✅ 使用论坛提供的封面标题")
1255:             else:
1256:                 # 是论坛任务但没有封面标题，使用AI生成
1257:                 logger.info("论坛任务但未提供封面标题，将使用AI生成")
1258:                 print("📝 论坛任务但未提供封面标题，将使用AI生成标题")
1259:         else:
1260:             logger.info("非论坛任务，将尝试AI生成")
1261:             print("📝 非论坛任务，将使用AI生成标题")
1262: 
1263:     # 如果没有论坛标题或配置为不使用论坛标题，则使用AI生成
1264:     if not titles:
1265:         asr_text = get_asr_text(output_dir)
1266:         if not asr_text:
1267:             logger.warning("未找到ASR文本(script.txt)或文本为空，将跳过AI标题生成。")
1268:             print("未找到ASR文本(script.txt)，跳过添加封面标题。")
1269:         else:
1270:             # 生成1个标题
1271:             try:
1272:                 ai_titles = generate_title_with_ai(asr_text, config)
1273:                 if ai_titles:
1274:                     titles = ai_titles
1275:                     logger.info(f"成功生成AI标题: {ai_titles[0]}")
1276:                     print(f"🤖 使用AI生成的标题: {ai_titles[0]}")
1277:                 else:
1278:                     logger.warning("AI未能生成有效标题，将不添加标题。")
1279:                     print("AI未能生成有效标题，将跳过添加封面标题。")
1280:             except Exception as e:
1281:                 logger.error(f"调用AI生成标题时发生异常: {str(e)}")
1282:                 titles = []  # 确保异常时也是空列表
1283:     
1284:     # 创建一个列表存储所有生成的视频路径
1285:     output_videos = []
1286:     
1287:     # --- 生成带标题的视频 ---
1288:     print("\n处理带封面标题的视频版本")
1289:     logger.info("处理带封面标题的视频版本")
1290: 
1291:     if titles:
1292:         # 统一处理各种格式的标题
1293:         title_texts, title_positions = process_titles_for_stage8(titles)
1294:         
1295:         if not title_texts:
1296:             logger.error("未能从标题数据中提取有效内容")
1297:             print("❌ 未能从标题数据中提取有效内容")
1298:         else:
1299:             # 创建用于文件名的安全标题文本
1300:             title_text = _create_safe_title_for_filename(title_texts)
1301:             
1302:             # 合并为单个标题用于显示
1303:             title_for_display = '\n'.join(title_texts)
1304:             
1305:             # 显示标题信息
1306:             position_names = []
1307:             for i, (text, pos) in enumerate(zip(title_texts, title_positions)):
1308:                 pos_name = {'up': '上', 'middle': '中', 'down': '下', 'center': '中心'}.get(pos, pos)
1309:                 position_names.append(f"{pos_name}='{text}'")
1310:             
1311:             logger.info(f"使用标题({len(title_texts)}行): {', '.join(position_names)}")
1312:             print(f"📝 标题内容({len(title_texts)}行): {', '.join(position_names)}")
1313:             
1314:             # 为标题创建透明背景图片并直接保存到output目录
1315:             title_transparent_image = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{title_text}.png")
1316:             if create_transparent_image(width, height, title_transparent_image):
1317:                 # 在透明图片上添加标题文字
1318:                 if add_text_to_image(title_transparent_image, title_for_display, config, title_positions):
1319:                     # 提取文件名（不含路径和扩展名）
1320:                     basename = os.path.basename(input_video)
1321:                     filename_without_ext = os.path.splitext(basename)[0]
1322:                     
1323:                     # 构建新的输出路径：标题_原文件名.mp4
1324:                     custom_output_path = os.path.join(
1325:                         output_dir, 
1326:                         f"{title_text}_{filename_without_ext}.mp4"
1327:                     ).replace('\\', '/')
1328:                     
1329:                     # 将标题图片叠加到视频上
1330:                     titled_video = combine_videos(title_transparent_image, input_video, output_dir, config, custom_output_path)
1331:

 136: def step9_organize_files(input_video, config):
 137:     """第九步：将处理后的文件剪切到以原始视频名命名的子文件夹"""
 138:     # 尝试释放所有日志处理程序，防止文件锁定
 139:     for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
 140:         logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
 141:         if logger.handlers:
 142:             for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
 143:                 logger.removeHandler(handler)
 144:                 if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 145:                     handler.close()
 146:     
 147:     # 关闭根日志处理程序
 148:     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
 149:         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
 150:         if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 151:             handler.close()
 152:             
 153:     logger.info("开始执行步骤9: 文件整理")
 154:     print("\n===== 步骤9: 文件整理 =====")
 155:     
 156:     output_dir = config.get("output_dir", "output")
 157:     
 158:     # 获取是否删除原始文件的配置，默认为False（不删除）
 159:     delete_original = config.get("organize_delete_original", False)
 160:     
 161:     # 显示操作类型
 162:     operation_type = "移动" if delete_original else "复制"
 163:     print(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹")
 164:     logger.info(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹，是否删除原始文件: {delete_original}")
 165:     
 166:     # 从state.json获取原始文件名
 167:     original_filename = extract_original_filename(output_dir)
 168:     
 169:     if not original_filename:
 170:         print("错误: 无法获取原始视频文件名，中止处理")
 171:         return False, input_video
 172:     
 173:     print(f"原始视频文件名: {original_filename}")
 174:     
 175:     # 创建以原始文件名命名的子文件夹
 176:     target_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, original_filename)
 177:     os.makedirs(target_dir, exist_ok=True)
 178:     print(f"创建目标文件夹: {target_dir}")
 179:     
 180:     # 获取output目录中的所有文件（非文件夹）
 181:     all_files = []
 182:     exclude_files = [".gitkeep", "README.md"]
 183:     
 184:     for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
 185:         item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
 186:         # 只处理文件，不处理文件夹
 187:         if os.path.isfile(item_path) and item not in exclude_files:
 188:             # 检查文件是否在目标文件夹中（使用精确的目录比较）
 189:             if os.path.dirname(item_path) != target_dir:
 190:                 all_files.append(item_path)
 191:     
 192:     total_files = len(all_files)
 193:     
 194:     if total_files == 0:
 195:         print(f"未找到任何文件需要整理")
 196:         # 即使没有文件，我们仍然会处理文件夹
 197:     else:
 198:         print(f"找到 {total_files} 个文件需要整理")
 199:         print(f"\n将{operation_type}这些文件到子文件夹...")
 200:     
 201:         # 复制或移动文件到目标文件夹
 202:         processed_count = 0
 203:         for file_path in all_files:
 204:             if os.path.isfile(file_path):
 205:                 filename = os.path.basename(file_path)
 206:                 target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, filename)
 207:                 
 208:                 # 检查目标文件是否已存在
 209:                 if os.path.exists(target_path):
 210:                     # 生成一个带时间戳的新名称
 211:                     timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 212:                     name, ext = os.path.splitext(filename)
 213:                     new_filename = f"{name}_{timestamp}{ext}"
 214:                     target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, new_filename)
 215:                 
 216:                 try:
 217:                     # 根据配置选择复制或移动
 218:                     if delete_original:
 219:                         # 移动文件
 220:                         shutil.move(file_path, target_path)
 221:                         processed_count += 1
 222:                         print(f"已移动: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
 223:                     else:
 224:                         # 复制文件
 225:                         shutil.copy2(file_path, target_path)
 226:                         processed_count += 1
 227:                         print(f"已复制: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
 228:                 except Exception as e:
 229:                     print(f"{operation_type}文件 {filename} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 230:         
 231:         print(f"\n文件整理完成! 成功{operation_type} {processed_count}/{total_files} 个文件到 {target_dir}")
 232:     
 233:     # 处理logs和temp文件夹
 234:     directories_to_copy = ["logs", "temp"]
 235:     processed_dirs_count = 0
 236:     
 237:     print(f"\n开始{operation_type} logs和temp文件夹...")
 238:     
 239:     for dir_name in directories_to_copy:
 240:         source_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, dir_name)
 241:         target_subdir = os.path.join(target_dir, dir_name)
 242:         
 243:         # 检查源目录是否存在
 244:         if os.path.exists(source_dir) and os.path.isdir(source_dir):
 245:             try:
 246:                 # 如果目标文件夹已存在，先备份或删除它
 247:                 if os.path.exists(target_subdir):
 248:                     backup_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 249:                     backup_dir = f"{target_subdir}_{backup_timestamp}_bak"
 250:                     print(f"目标文件夹 {dir_name} 已存在，重命名为: {os.path.basename(backup_dir)}")
 251:                     os.rename(target_subdir, backup_dir)
 252:                 
 253:                 # 复制整个文件夹及其内容
 254:                 print(f"正在{operation_type}文件夹: {dir_name}...")
 255:                 shutil.copytree(source_dir, target_subdir)
 256:                 processed_dirs_count += 1
 257:                 print(f"已{operation_type}: {dir_name} -> {target_dir}/{dir_name}")
 258:                 
 259:                 # 如果设置为删除原始文件，并且是复制模式，则在复制完成后删除原始文件夹
 260:                 if delete_original:
 261:                     try:
 262:                         print(f"正在删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 263:                         shutil.rmtree(source_dir)
 264:                         print(f"已删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 265:                     except Exception as e:
 266:                         print(f"删除原始文件夹 {dir_name} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 267:                         # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 268:                         try:
 269:                             if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 270:                                 os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{source_dir}"')
 271:                             else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 272:                                 os.system(f'rm -rf "{source_dir}"')
 273:                             print(f"使用系统命令成功删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 274:                         except Exception as e2:
 275:                             print(f"即使使用系统命令也无法删除原始文件夹 {dir_name}: {str(e2)}")
 276:             except Exception as e:

=== domain/video/pre/stage/stage9.py lines 412-542 ===
 412: def clean_logs_and_state(output_dir="output"):
 413:     """
 414:     清理日志目录和state.json文件
 415:     
 416:     Args:
 417:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
 418:     
 419:     Returns:
 420:         bool: 是否成功清理
 421:     """
 422:     print("\n===== 清理日志和状态文件 =====")
 423:     
 424:     # 关闭所有日志处理器
 425:     for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
 426:         logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
 427:         if logger.handlers:
 428:             for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
 429:                 logger.removeHandler(handler)
 430:                 if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 431:                     handler.close()
 432:     
 433:     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
 434:         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
 435:         if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 436:             handler.close()
 437:     
 438:     deleted_count = 0
 439:     
 440:     # 删除logs目录
 441:     logs_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "logs")
 442:     if os.path.exists(logs_dir) and os.path.isdir(logs_dir):
 443:         try:
 444:             print(f"正在尝试删除logs目录...")
 445:             shutil.rmtree(logs_dir)
 446:             print(f"已删除logs目录")
 447:             deleted_count += 1
 448:         except Exception as e:
 449:             print(f"删除logs目录时出错: {str(e)}")
 450:             # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 451:             try:
 452:                 if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 453:                     # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的进程
 454:                     os.system('taskkill /F /IM python.exe /T >nul 2>&1')
 455:                     # 等待一会让系统释放文件
 456:                     time.sleep(1)
 457:                     # 再次尝试删除
 458:                     os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{logs_dir}"')
 459:                 else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 460:                     os.system(f'rm -rf "{logs_dir}"')
 461:                 print(f"使用系统命令成功删除logs目录")
 462:                 deleted_count += 1
 463:             except Exception as e2:
 464:                 print(f"即使使用系统命令也无法删除logs目录: {str(e2)}")
 465:                 return False
 466:     
 467:     # 删除state.json文件
 468:     state_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "state.json")
 469:     if os.path.exists(state_json_path):
 470:         try:
 471:             print("正在尝试删除state.json文件...")
 472:             # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的句柄
 473:             try:
 474:                 # 尝试打开文件以确认它未被锁定
 475:                 with open(state_json_path, 'a') as f:
 476:                     pass
 477:             except:
 478:                 pass
 479:             
 480:             # 等待一会儿让系统释放文件
 481:             time.sleep(1)
 482:             
 483:             # 尝试删除文件
 484:             try:
 485:                 os.remove(state_json_path)
 486:                 print("成功删除state.json文件")
 487:                 deleted_count += 1
 488:             except Exception as e:
 489:                 print(f"删除state.json文件时出错: {str(e)}")
 490:                 # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 491:                 if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 492:                     os.system(f'del /F /Q "{state_json_path}"')
 493:                 else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 494:                     os.system(f'rm -f "{state_json_path}"')
 495:                 print("使用系统命令成功删除state.json文件")
 496:                 deleted_count += 1
 497:         except Exception as e:
 498:             print(f"无法删除state.json文件: {str(e)}")
 499:             return False
 500:     
 501:     print(f"\n清理完成! 已删除 {deleted_count} 个文件/目录")
 502:     return True
 503: 
 504: 
 505: if __name__ == "__main__":
 506:     # 这里可以添加独立运行时的测试代码
 507:     from config import get_config
 508:     
 509:     # 检查是否只需要清理日志和状态文件
 510:     if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == "--clean":
 511:         output_dir = "output"  # 默认输出目录
 512:         
 513:         # 如果提供了输出目录参数
 514:         if len(sys.argv) > 2:
 515:             output_dir = sys.argv[2]
 516:             
 517:         success = clean_logs_and_state(output_dir)
 518:         if success:
 519:             print("清理成功")
 520:             sys.exit(0)
 521:         else:
 522:             print("清理失败")
 523:             sys.exit(1)
 524:     
 525:     # 否则，执行正常的文件整理流程
 526:     config = get_config()
 527:     
 528:     # 确保输出目录存在
 529:     os.makedirs(config["output_dir"], exist_ok=True)
 530:     
 531:     # 如果提供了输入视频，使用它；否则传入None让函数自动找
 532:     input_video = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else None
 533:     
 534:     # 执行文件整理
 535:     success, output_video = step9_organize_files(input_video, config)
 536:     
 537:     if success:
 538:         print(f"文件整理成功，视频文件路径: {output_video}")
 539:         sys.exit(0)
 540:     else:
 541:         print("文件整理失败")
 542:         sys.exit(1)
