   1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
   2: # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
   3: """
   4: 统一内容结构化处理器
   5: 为论坛爬取、热词提取、Stage8等提供统一的内容处理功能
   6: 位置: pre/stage/unified_content_processor.py
   7: """
   8: 
   9: import re
  10: import logging
  11: from typing import Dict, List, Any, Optional, Tuple
  12: from dataclasses import dataclass
  13: 
  14: @dataclass
  15: class UnifiedForumContent:
  16:     """统一的论坛内容结构"""
  17:     # 原始内容
  18:     raw_content: str = ""
  19:     
  20:     # 封面信息（用于Stage8）
  21:     cover_title_up: str = ""
  22:     cover_title_middle: str = ""
  23:     cover_title_down: str = ""
  24:     cover_info_raw: str = ""
  25:     
  26:     # 核心文本（用于热词提取）
  27:     core_text: str = ""
  28:     
  29:     # 系统信息
  30:     system_tags: List[str] = None
  31:     
  32:     # 链接和标签
  33:     urls: List[str] = None
  34:     bbcode_tags: List[str] = None
  35:     
  36:     # 内容分类
  37:     content_type: str = "unknown"  # video_post, text_post, mixed, empty
  38:     has_media_content: bool = False
  39:     
  40:     # 统计信息
  41:     original_length: int = 0
  42:     core_text_length: int = 0
  43:     filtered_elements_count: int = 0
  44: 
  45: class UnifiedContentProcessor:
  46:     """统一内容处理器"""
  47:     
  48:     def __init__(self):
  49:         self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
  50:         
  51:         # 系统标识模式
  52:         self.system_patterns = [
  53:             r'^懒人智能剪辑\s*$',
  54:             r'^智能剪辑\s*$',
  55:             r'^AI剪辑助手\s*$',
  56:             r'^自动剪辑\s*$'
  57:         ]
  58:         
  59:         # 封面信息提取模式（与Stage8和论坛爬取保持一致）
  60:         self.cover_patterns = {
  61:             'title_top': [
  62:                 r'封面标题上\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',      # 同行格式
  63:                 r'封面标题上\s*[:：]\s*[\n\r]+\s*([^\n\r]+)',  # 换行格式
  64:                 r'标题上\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',
  65:                 r'上标题\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)'
  66:             ],
  67:             'title_middle': [
  68:                 r'封面标题中\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',     # 同行格式
  69:                 r'封面标题中\s*[:：]\s*[\n\r]+\s*([^\n\r]+)',  # 换行格式
  70:                 r'标题中\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',
  71:                 r'中标题\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)'
  72:             ],
  73:             'title_bottom': [
  74:                 r'封面标题下\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',     # 同行格式
  75:                 r'封面标题下\s*[:：]\s*[\n\r]+\s*([^\n\r]+)',  # 换行格式
  76:                 r'标题下\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)',
  77:                 r'下标题\s*[:：]\s*([^\n\r]+)'
  78:             ]
  79:         }
  80:         
  81:         # 需要过滤的行模式
  82:         self.filter_line_patterns = [
  83:             r'^\s*$',  # 空行
  84:             r'^-+\s*$',  # 分隔线
  85:             r'^=+\s*$',  # 分隔线
  86:             r'^封面标题[上中下]?\s*[:：]\s*$',  # 空的封面标题行
  87:             r'^标题[上中下]?\s*[:：]\s*$'  # 空的标题行
  88:         ]
  89:     
  90:     def process_content(self, raw_content: str) -> UnifiedForumContent:
  91:         """
  92:         统一处理论坛内容
  93:         
  94:         Args:
  95:             raw_content: 原始论坛内容
  96:             
  97:         Returns:
  98:             UnifiedForumContent: 统一的结构化内容对象
  99:         """
 100:         if not raw_content:
 101:             return UnifiedForumContent()
 102:         
 103:         try:
 104:             self.logger.info(f"开始统一处理论坛内容，原始长度: {len(raw_content)}")
 105:             
 106:             result = UnifiedForumContent(
 107:                 raw_content=raw_content,
 108:                 original_length=len(raw_content),
 109:                 system_tags=[],
 110:                 urls=[],
 111:                 bbcode_tags=[]
 112:             )
 113:             
 114:             # 第一步：提取系统标识
 115:             result.system_tags = self._extract_system_tags(raw_content)
 116:             
 117:             # 第二步：提取封面信息（关键：与Stage8保持一致）
 118:             self._extract_cover_info(raw_content, result)
 119:             
 120:             # 第三步：提取链接和BBCode
 121:             result.urls = self._extract_urls(raw_content)
 122:             result.bbcode_tags = self._extract_bbcode_tags(raw_content)
 123:             
 124:             # 第四步：生成核心文本（过滤封面信息）
 125:             result.core_text = self._extract_core_text(raw_content, result)
 126:             result.core_text_length = len(result.core_text)
 127:             
 128:             # 第五步：内容分类
 129:             result.content_type = self._classify_content(result)
 130:             result.has_media_content = self._has_media_content(result)
 131:             

=== domain/video/pre/stage/unified_content_processor.py lines 90-220 ===
  90:     def process_content(self, raw_content: str) -> UnifiedForumContent:
  91:         """
  92:         统一处理论坛内容
  93:         
  94:         Args:
  95:             raw_content: 原始论坛内容
  96:             
  97:         Returns:
  98:             UnifiedForumContent: 统一的结构化内容对象
  99:         """
 100:         if not raw_content:
 101:             return UnifiedForumContent()
 102:         
 103:         try:
 104:             self.logger.info(f"开始统一处理论坛内容，原始长度: {len(raw_content)}")
 105:             
 106:             result = UnifiedForumContent(
 107:                 raw_content=raw_content,
 108:                 original_length=len(raw_content),
 109:                 system_tags=[],
 110:                 urls=[],
 111:                 bbcode_tags=[]
 112:             )
 113:             
 114:             # 第一步：提取系统标识
 115:             result.system_tags = self._extract_system_tags(raw_content)
 116:             
 117:             # 第二步：提取封面信息（关键：与Stage8保持一致）
 118:             self._extract_cover_info(raw_content, result)
 119:             
 120:             # 第三步：提取链接和BBCode
 121:             result.urls = self._extract_urls(raw_content)
 122:             result.bbcode_tags = self._extract_bbcode_tags(raw_content)
 123:             
 124:             # 第四步：生成核心文本（过滤封面信息）
 125:             result.core_text = self._extract_core_text(raw_content, result)
 126:             result.core_text_length = len(result.core_text)
 127:             
 128:             # 第五步：内容分类
 129:             result.content_type = self._classify_content(result)
 130:             result.has_media_content = self._has_media_content(result)
 131:             
 132:             # 统计过滤的元素数量
 133:             result.filtered_elements_count = (
 134:                 len(result.system_tags) +
 135:                 len(result.urls) +
 136:                 len(result.bbcode_tags) +
 137:                 (1 if result.cover_title_up else 0) +
 138:                 (1 if result.cover_title_middle else 0) +
 139:                 (1 if result.cover_title_down else 0)
 140:             )
 141:             
 142:             self.logger.info(f"统一内容处理完成，核心文本长度: {result.core_text_length}")
 143:             return result
 144:             
 145:         except Exception as e:
 146:             self.logger.error(f"统一处理论坛内容失败: {e}")
 147:             return UnifiedForumContent(raw_content=raw_content, original_length=len(raw_content))
 148:     
 149:     def _extract_system_tags(self, content: str) -> List[str]:
 150:         """提取系统标识"""
 151:         system_tags = []
 152:         lines = content.split('\n')
 153:         
 154:         for line in lines:
 155:             line = line.strip()
 156:             for pattern in self.system_patterns:
 157:                 if re.match(pattern, line, re.IGNORECASE):
 158:                     system_tags.append(line)
 159:                     break
 160:         
 161:         return system_tags
 162:     
 163:     def _is_valid_cover_title(self, title: str) -> bool:
 164:         """检查封面标题是否有效（过滤占位符）"""
 165:         if not title or not title.strip():
 166:             return False
 167: 
 168:         # 过滤常见的占位符
 169:         invalid_placeholders = ['-', '—', '无', '空', '无内容', '暂无', 'N/A', 'n/a', '无标题', '空白']
 170:         return title.strip() not in invalid_placeholders
 171: 
 172:     def _extract_cover_info(self, content: str, result: UnifiedForumContent):
 173:         """提取封面信息（与Stage8的get_forum_cover_title保持一致）"""
 174:         # 提取封面标题上
 175:         for pattern in self.cover_patterns['title_top']:
 176:             match = re.search(pattern, content, re.IGNORECASE)
 177:             if match:
 178:                 title_up = match.group(1).strip()
 179:                 if self._is_valid_cover_title(title_up):
 180:                     result.cover_title_up = title_up
 181:                     self.logger.debug(f"提取到封面标题上: {result.cover_title_up}")
 182:                 else:
 183:                     self.logger.debug(f"跳过占位符封面标题上: '{title_up}'，保持为空")
 184:                 break
 185: 
 186:         # 提取封面标题中
 187:         for pattern in self.cover_patterns['title_middle']:
 188:             match = re.search(pattern, content, re.IGNORECASE)
 189:             if match:
 190:                 title_middle = match.group(1).strip()
 191:                 if self._is_valid_cover_title(title_middle):
 192:                     result.cover_title_middle = title_middle
 193:                     self.logger.debug(f"提取到封面标题中: {result.cover_title_middle}")
 194:                 else:
 195:                     self.logger.debug(f"跳过占位符封面标题中: '{title_middle}'，保持为空")
 196:                 break
 197: 
 198:         # 提取封面标题下
 199:         for pattern in self.cover_patterns['title_bottom']:
 200:             match = re.search(pattern, content, re.IGNORECASE)
 201:             if match:
 202:                 title_down = match.group(1).strip()
 203:                 if self._is_valid_cover_title(title_down):
 204:                     result.cover_title_down = title_down
 205:                     self.logger.debug(f"提取到封面标题下: {result.cover_title_down}")
 206:                 else:
 207:                     self.logger.debug(f"跳过占位符封面标题下: '{title_down}'，保持为空")
 208:                 break
 209: 
 210:         # 保存原始封面信息
 211:         cover_lines = []
 212:         if result.cover_title_up:
 213:             cover_lines.append(f"封面标题上: {result.cover_title_up}")
 214:         if result.cover_title_middle:
 215:             cover_lines.append(f"封面标题中: {result.cover_title_middle}")
 216:         if result.cover_title_down:
 217:             cover_lines.append(f"封面标题下: {result.cover_title_down}")
 218: 
 219:         result.cover_info_raw = '\n'.join(cover_lines)
 220:     

=== domain/video/pre/stage/unified_content_processor.py lines 359-457 ===
 359:     def get_forum_post_info_format(self, result: UnifiedForumContent) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 360:         """获取forum_post_info.json格式的数据（用于保存）"""
 361:         return {
 362:             "cover_title_up": result.cover_title_up,
 363:             "cover_title_middle": result.cover_title_middle,
 364:             "cover_title_down": result.cover_title_down,
 365:             "content": result.raw_content,
 366:             "core_text": result.core_text,
 367:             "content_type": result.content_type,
 368:             "has_media_content": result.has_media_content,
 369:             "system_tags": result.system_tags or [],
 370:             "urls": result.urls or [],
 371:             "bbcode_tags": result.bbcode_tags or [],
 372:             "original_length": result.original_length,
 373:             "core_text_length": result.core_text_length,
 374:             "filtered_elements_count": result.filtered_elements_count
 375:         }
 376: 
 377: 
 378: def process_forum_content_unified(raw_content: str) -> UnifiedForumContent:
 379:     """便捷函数：统一处理论坛内容"""
 380:     processor = UnifiedContentProcessor()
 381:     return processor.process_content(raw_content)
 382: 
 383: 
 384: def extract_cover_titles(raw_content: str) -> Tuple[str, str]:
 385:     """便捷函数：只提取封面标题（用于Stage8兼容）"""
 386:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 387:     return result.cover_title_up, result.cover_title_down
 388: 
 389: 
 390: def extract_cover_title_up(raw_content: str) -> str:
 391:     """提取封面标题上"""
 392:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 393:     return result.cover_title_up
 394: 
 395: 
 396: def extract_cover_title_middle(raw_content: str) -> str:
 397:     """提取封面标题中"""
 398:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 399:     return result.cover_title_middle
 400: 
 401: 
 402: def extract_cover_title_down(raw_content: str) -> str:
 403:     """提取封面标题下"""
 404:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 405:     return result.cover_title_down
 406: 
 407: 
 408: def extract_cover_titles_up_down(raw_content: str) -> Tuple[str, str]:
 409:     """提取封面标题上和下（更直观的命名）"""
 410:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 411:     return result.cover_title_up, result.cover_title_down
 412: 
 413: 
 414: def extract_cover_titles_up_middle_down(raw_content: str) -> Tuple[str, str, str]:
 415:     """提取封面标题上、中、下（完整的三元组）"""
 416:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 417:     return result.cover_title_up, result.cover_title_middle, result.cover_title_down
 418: 
 419: 
 420: def extract_core_text_for_hotwords(raw_content: str) -> str:
 421:     """便捷函数：只提取核心文本（用于热词提取）"""
 422:     result = process_forum_content_unified(raw_content)
 423:     return result.core_text
 424: 
 425: 
 426: if __name__ == "__main__":
 427:     # 测试代码
 428:     test_content = """懒人智能剪辑
 429: 封面标题上:
 430: 主播傻
 431: 封面标题中:
 432: 点点滴滴
 433: 封面标题下:
 434: 赚钱多
 435: 
 436: 全网最人傻钱多的主播,你知道是谁吗，又猜辛巴是吗，辛巴人傻吗，猜蛋蛋是吗，你有蛋蛋这样的好师傅吗，太原老葛，你会演戏吗，什么珍姐米姐蕊姐贝姐，你懂货吗，所以说，人傻钱多的主播一定都不是他们。
 437: 
 438: [url=https://example.com/video.mp4]视频链接[/url]
 439: 
 440: 我不吊大家的胃口啊，直接公布答案，是那一帮做同城号的。"""
 441: 
 442:     print("=== 统一内容处理测试 ===")
 443:     result = process_forum_content_unified(test_content)
 444: 
 445:     print(f"封面标题上: '{result.cover_title_up}'")
 446:     print(f"封面标题中: '{result.cover_title_middle}'")
 447:     print(f"封面标题下: '{result.cover_title_down}'")
 448:     print(f"核心文本: '{result.core_text}'")
 449:     print(f"内容类型: {result.content_type}")
 450:     print(f"过滤元素数量: {result.filtered_elements_count}")
 451: 
 452:     print("\n=== 便捷函数测试 ===")
 453:     up, down = extract_cover_titles(test_content)
 454:     print(f"封面标题: '{up}' / '{down}'")
 455: 
 456:     core_text = extract_core_text_for_hotwords(test_content)
 457:     print(f"热词用核心文本: '{core_text}'")

assistant #146 commentary 02:41:47

我现在更确定了：现有代码已经有“论坛上下文归一化”“封面标题结构化”“任务 API”这些对 skill 很有价值的前置件，但字幕、封面、剪辑三块真正的执行层都还深度绑在旧 stage4~9 和 funclip 里，而且夹杂了大量交互式输入、文件约定和副作用。这个状态不太适合直接拿来做“自然语言可反复编辑”的能力底座。

   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: import json
   4: from pathlib import Path
   5: 
   6: from domain.video import VideoPipeline, VideoPipelineConfig
   7: from domain.video.stages.base import StageResult
   8: 
   9: 
  10: def test_internal_pipeline_skeleton_runs(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  11:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  12:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  13: 
  14:     cfg = VideoPipelineConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out"))
  15:     pipeline = VideoPipeline(cfg)
  16:     result = pipeline.run(input_video=str(source), task_id="video-1")
  17: 
  18:     assert result.success
  19:     assert result.output_file is not None
  20:     assert Path(result.output_file).exists()
  21:     assert "stage0_clean" in result.executed_stages
  22:     assert "stage1_transcode" in result.executed_stages
  23:     assert "stage2_silence" in result.executed_stages
  24:     assert "stage3_repair" in result.executed_stages
  25:     assert "stage4_asr" in result.executed_stages
  26:     assert "stage5_ai_text" in result.executed_stages
  27:     assert "stage6_clip" in result.executed_stages
  28:     assert "stage6_5_resub" in result.executed_stages
  29:     assert "stage7_correct" in result.executed_stages
  30:     assert "stage7_subtitle" in result.executed_stages
  31:     assert "stage8_cover" in result.executed_stages
  32:     assert "stage9_organize" in result.executed_stages
  33:     assert result.current_stage == 11
  34:     assert result.failed_stage is None
  35:     srt = tmp_path / "out" / "video-1" / "_stages" / "video-1_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
  36:     manifest = tmp_path / "out" / "video-1" / "_stages" / "video-1_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
  37:     assert srt.exists()
  38:     assert manifest.exists()
  39: 
  40: 
  41: def test_internal_pipeline_failure_exposes_breakpoint(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  42:     cfg = VideoPipelineConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out"))
  43:     pipeline = VideoPipeline(cfg)
  44:     missing = tmp_path / "missing.mp4"
  45: 
  46:     result = pipeline.run(input_video=str(missing), task_id="video-2", start_from_stage=1)
  47:     assert not result.success
  48:     assert result.failed_stage == "stage1_transcode"
  49:     assert result.current_stage == 1
  50: 
  51: 
  52: def test_pipeline_stage4_manifest_contains_forum_context(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  53:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
  54:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  55:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  56:     sidecar = tmp_path / "shared.srt"
  57:     sidecar.write_text(
  58:         "\n".join(
  59:             [
  60:                 "1",
  61:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000",
  62:                 "pipeline context subtitle",
  63:                 "",
  64:             ]
  65:         ),
  66:         encoding="utf-8",
  67:     )
  68:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_SIDECAR_PATH", str(sidecar))
  69: 
  70:     cfg = VideoPipelineConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out"))
  71:     pipeline = VideoPipeline(cfg)
  72:     result = pipeline.run(
  73:         input_video=str(source),
  74:         task_id="video-ctx",
  75:         forum_post_info={"hotwords": ["topic-a", "topic-b"], "speaker": "spk-1"},
  76:     )
  77: 
  78:     assert result.success
  79:     manifest = tmp_path / "out" / "video-ctx" / "_stages" / "video-ctx_stage4_asr_manifest.json"
  80:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  81:     assert payload.get("engine") == "sidecar_srt"
  82:     assert payload.get("hotwords") == ["topic-a", "topic-b"]
  83:     assert payload.get("hotword_count") == 2
  84:     assert payload.get("speaker") == "spk-1"
  85: 
  86: 
  87: def test_pipeline_stage4_receives_explicit_hotwords(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  88:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  89:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  90:     cfg = VideoPipelineConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out"))
  91:     pipeline = VideoPipeline(cfg)
  92:     captured: dict = {}
  93: 
  94:     def fake_stage4(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *, forum_post_info=None, hotwords=None, speaker=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  95:         captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
  96:         captured["hotwords"] = hotwords
  97:         captured["speaker"] = speaker
  98:         return StageResult(success=True, output_file=input_video)

 100:     monkeypatch.setattr("domain.video.pipeline.run_stage4_asr", fake_stage4)
 101:     result = pipeline._stage4(  # type: ignore[attr-defined]

 103:         task_id="video-stage4-ctx",
 104:         stage_name="stage4_asr",
 105:         context={
 106:             "forum_post_info": {
 107:                 "hotwords": ["topic-a", "topic-b", "topic-a"],
 108:                 "speaker": "spk-x",
 109:             }
 110:         },
 111:     )
 112: 
 113:     assert result.success
 114:     assert captured["hotwords"] == ["topic-a", "topic-b"]
 115:     assert captured["speaker"] == "spk-x"
 116: 
 117: 
 118: def test_pipeline_stage8_cover_titles_mapping_from_english_keys(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 119:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"

 126:         captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
 127:         return StageResult(success=True, output_file=input_video)

 129:     monkeypatch.setattr("domain.video.pipeline.run_stage8_cover", fake_stage8)

 152:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"

=== tests/unit/test_gradio_backend.py ===
   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: from pathlib import Path
   4: from types import SimpleNamespace
   5: 
   6: from apps.gradio_ui.backend import GradioBackend, GradioBackendConfig
   7: 
   8: 
   9: def test_gradio_backend_run_asr_clip_subtitle_manual_chain(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  10:     source = tmp_path / "demo.mp4"
  11:     source.write_bytes(b"video")
  12: 
  13:     backend = GradioBackend(GradioBackendConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out")))
  14: 
  15:     calls = {"asr": 0, "clip": 0, "sub": 0}
  16: 
  17:     def fake_stage4(input_video, output_dir, task_id, forum_post_info=None, hotwords=None, speaker=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  18:         calls["asr"] += 1
  19:         assert Path(input_video).exists()
  20:         assert output_dir == str(tmp_path / "out")
  21:         assert isinstance(hotwords, list)
  22:         return SimpleNamespace(success=True, output_file=str(source), error_message=None)
  23: 
  24:     def fake_stage6(input_video, output_dir, task_id):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  25:         calls["clip"] += 1
  26:         return SimpleNamespace(success=True, output_file=str(source), error_message=None)
  27: 
  28:     def fake_stage65(input_video, output_dir, task_id):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  29:         calls["sub"] += 1
  30:         return SimpleNamespace(success=True, output_file=str(source), error_message=None)
  31: 
  32:     monkeypatch.setattr("apps.gradio_ui.backend.run_stage4_asr", fake_stage4)
  33:     monkeypatch.setattr("apps.gradio_ui.backend.run_stage6_clip", fake_stage6)
  34:     monkeypatch.setattr("apps.gradio_ui.backend.run_stage6_5_resub", fake_stage65)
  35: 
  36:     asr = backend.run_asr(str(source), hotwords="热词A,热词B", speaker="spk1")
  37:     assert asr["success"] is True
  38: 
  39:     clip = backend.run_clip(str(source), clip_text="第一句\n第二句", speaker="spk1")
  40:     assert clip["success"] is True
  41: 
  42:     subtitle = backend.run_subtitle(str(source), subtitle_format="ass")
  43:     assert subtitle["success"] is True
  44: 
  45:     chain = backend.run_manual_chain(
  46:         str(source),
  47:         hotwords="热词A,热词B",
  48:         clip_text="第一句",
  49:         speaker="spk1",
  50:         subtitle_format="ass",
  51:     )
  52:     assert chain["success"] is True
  53:     assert calls["asr"] >= 2
  54:     assert calls["clip"] >= 2
  55:     assert calls["sub"] >= 2
  56: 
  57: 
  58: def test_gradio_backend_handles_missing_input_file(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  59:     backend = GradioBackend(GradioBackendConfig(output_dir=str(tmp_path / "out")))
  60: 
  61:     result = backend.run_asr(str(tmp_path / "missing.mp4"))
  62:     assert result["success"] is False
  63:     assert "not found" in str(result.get("error", ""))

=== tests/unit/test_funasr_engine.py ===
   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: from pathlib import Path
   4: 
   5: import pytest
   6: 
   7: from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngine, FunASREngineError
   8: 
   9: 
  10: def _make_source(path: Path) -> Path:
  11:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  12:     path.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  13:     return path
  14: 
  15: 
  16: def test_funasr_engine_extracts_sentence_segments_with_speaker_filter(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  17:     source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  18: 
  19:     class FakeModel:
  20:         def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  21:             return [
  22:                 {
  23:                     "sentence_info": [
  24:                         {"start": 0, "end": 1000, "text": "first", "spk": "A"},
  25:                         {"start": 1000, "end": 2200, "text": "second", "spk": "B"},
  26:                     ]
  27:                 }
  28:             ]
  29: 
  30:     engine = FunASREngine(model=FakeModel())
  31:     segments, detail = engine.transcribe(source, hotwords=["北京", "天气"], speaker="A")
  32: 
  33:     assert len(segments) == 1
  34:     assert segments[0][0] == 0.0
  35:     assert segments[0][1] == 1.0
  36:     assert segments[0][2] == "first"
  37:     assert "hotwords=2" in detail
  38:     assert "speaker=A" in detail
  39: 
  40: 
  41: def test_funasr_engine_fallback_to_text_segment(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  42:     source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  43: 
  44:     class FakeModel:
  45:         def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  46:             return [{"text": "single text output"}]
  47: 
  48:     engine = FunASREngine(model=FakeModel())
  49:     segments, _ = engine.transcribe(source)
  50: 
  51:     assert len(segments) == 1
  52:     assert segments[0][0] == 0.0
  53:     assert segments[0][1] > 0.0
  54:     assert segments[0][2] == "single text output"
  55: 
  56: 
  57: def test_funasr_engine_raises_when_no_usable_segment(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  58:     source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  59: 
  60:     class EmptyModel:
  61:         def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  62:             return [{}]
  63: 
  64:     engine = FunASREngine(model=EmptyModel())
  65:     with pytest.raises(FunASREngineError):
  66:         engine.transcribe(source)

=== tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py ===
   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: import json
   4: from pathlib import Path
   5: 
   6: from domain.video.stages import stage4_asr, stage5_ai_text
   7: 
   8: 
   9: def test_stage4_prefers_sidecar_subtitle(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  10:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
  11:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  12:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  13:     sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"
  14:     sidecar.write_text(
  15:         "\n".join(
  16:             [
  17:                 "1",
  18:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,500",
  19:                 "hello world",
  20:                 "",
  21:                 "2",
  22:                 "00:00:01,500 --> 00:00:03,000",
  23:                 "second line",
  24:                 "",
  25:             ]
  26:         ),
  27:         encoding="utf-8",
  28:     )
  29: 
  30:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  31:     result = stage4_asr.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id="v1")
  32:     assert result.success
  33:     assert result.output_file
  34:     assert Path(str(result.output_file)).exists()
  35: 
  36:     srt = out_dir / "v1" / "_stages" / "v1_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
  37:     transcript = out_dir / "v1" / "_stages" / "v1_stage4_asr_transcript.txt"
  38:     manifest = out_dir / "v1" / "_stages" / "v1_stage4_asr_manifest.json"
  39:     assert srt.exists()
  40:     assert transcript.exists()
  41:     assert manifest.exists()
  42:     assert "hello world" in srt.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
  43:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  44:     assert payload.get("engine") == "sidecar_srt"
  45:     assert payload.get("fallback_used") is False
  46:     attempts = payload.get("attempts") or []
  47:     assert attempts and attempts[0].get("backend") == "sidecar"
  48: 
  49: 
  50: def test_stage4_auto_mode_can_prioritize_sidecar(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  51:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "auto")
  52:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_PREFER_SIDECAR", "true")
  53:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  54:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  55:     sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"
  56:     sidecar.write_text(
  57:         "\n".join(
  58:             [
  59:                 "1",
  60:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000",
  61:                 "auto mode sidecar",
  62:                 "",
  63:             ]
  64:         ),
  65:         encoding="utf-8",
  66:     )
  67: 
  68:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  69:     result = stage4_asr.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id="v_auto")
  70:     assert result.success
  71:     manifest = out_dir / "v_auto" / "_stages" / "v_auto_stage4_asr_manifest.json"
  72:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  73:     attempts = payload.get("attempts") or []
  74:     assert attempts and attempts[0].get("backend") == "sidecar"
  75:     assert payload.get("engine") == "sidecar_srt"
  76: 
  77: 
  78: def test_stage4_can_use_external_sidecar_path(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  79:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  80:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  81:     shared_sidecar = tmp_path / "shared_total.srt"
  82:     shared_sidecar.write_text(
  83:         "\n".join(
  84:             [
  85:                 "1",
  86:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:03,000",
  87:                 "shared line one",
  88:                 "shared line two",
  89:                 "",
  90:             ]
  91:         ),
  92:         encoding="utf-8",
  93:     )
  94:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
  95:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_SIDECAR_PATH", str(shared_sidecar))
  96: 
  97:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  98:     result = stage4_asr.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id="v_sidecar_path")
  99:     assert result.success
 100: 
 101:     srt = out_dir / "v_sidecar_path" / "_stages" / "v_sidecar_path_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
 102:     saved = srt.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 103:     assert "shared line one" in saved
 104:     assert "shared line two" in saved
 105: 
 106:     manifest_path = out_dir / "v_sidecar_path" / "_stages" / "v_sidecar_path_stage4_asr_manifest.json"
 107:     payload = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 108:     assert payload.get("engine") == "sidecar_srt"
 109:

 111: def test_stage4_manifest_tracks_hotwords_and_speaker(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 112:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
 113:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 114:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 115:     sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"

 117:         "\n".join(
 118:             [
 119:                 "1",
 120:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,500",

 122:                 "",

 124:         ),
 125:         encoding="utf-8",
 126:     )
 127: 
 128:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"

 130:         input_video=str(source),
 131:         output_dir=str(out_dir),

 133:         forum_post_info={"hotwords": ["alpha", "beta", "alpha"], "speaker": "spk-A"},
 134:     )
 135:     assert result.success
 136: 
 137:     manifest_path = out_dir / "v_ctx" / "_stages" / "v_ctx_stage4_asr_manifest.json"
 138:     payload = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 139:     assert payload.get("engine") == "sidecar_srt"
 140:     assert payload.get("hotwords") == ["alpha", "beta"]
 141:     assert payload.get("hotword_count") == 2
 142:     assert payload.get("speaker") == "spk-A"

  46: def test_stage7_correct_rule_mode_applies_normalization(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  47:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  48:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  49:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  50:     task_id = "v7c_rule"
  51:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
  52:     source_srt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
  53:     _write_basic_srt(source_srt, "teh  demo ,   line")
  54: 
  55:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_ENABLE", "true")
  56:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_MODE", "rule")
  57:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_REPLACEMENTS", "teh=>the")
  58:     result = stage7_correct.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
  59:     assert result.success
  60: 
  61:     corrected_srt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt"
  62:     content = corrected_srt.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
  63:     assert "the demo, line" in content
  64: 
  65:     manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_manifest.json"
  66:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  67:     assert payload.get("method") == "corrected"
  68:     assert payload.get("engine") == "rule_based"
  69:     assert int(payload.get("changed_line_count", 0)) >= 1
  70: 
  71: 
  72: def test_stage7_correct_llm_mode_strict_rejects_when_unavailable(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  73:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  74:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  75:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  76:     task_id = "v7c_llm_strict"
  77:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
  78:     source_srt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
  79:     _write_basic_srt(source_srt, "subtitle line")
  80: 
  81:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_ENABLE", "true")
  82:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_MODE", "llm")
  83:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "true")
  84:     monkeypatch.delenv("OPENAI_API_KEY", raising=False)
  85:     monkeypatch.delenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_CORRECT_LLM_MODEL", raising=False)
  86: 
  87:     result = stage7_correct.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
  88:     assert result.success is False
  89:     assert "strict equivalence" in str(result.error_message)
  90: 
  91:     manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_manifest.json"
  92:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  93:     assert payload.get("method") == "strict_rejected"
  94:     assert payload.get("engine") == "llm_failed"
  95: 
  96: 
  97: def test_stage7_subtitle_prefers_stage7_correct_output(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  98:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  99:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 100:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
 101:     task_id = "v7c_priority"
 102:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
 103:     stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 104:     _write_basic_srt(stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt", "from stage6_5")
 105:     _write_basic_srt(stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt", "from stage7_correct")
 106: 
 107:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "burn")
 108:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
 109:     captured: dict = {}
 110: 
 111:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 112:         captured["cmd"] = list(args)
 113:         Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
 114:         return True, ""
 115: 
 116:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
 117:     result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
 118:     assert result.success
 119:     vf_expr = captured["cmd"][captured["cmd"].index("-vf") + 1]
 120:     assert "stage7_correct_subtitles.srt" in vf_expr
 121: 

=== tests/unit/test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py ===
   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: import json
   4: from pathlib import Path
   5: 
   6: from domain.video.stages import stage2_silence, stage7_subtitle, stage8_cover, stage9_organize
   7: 
   8: 
   9: def test_stage2_prefers_auto_editor_when_available(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  10:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  11:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  12:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  13:     task_id = "v2"
  14: 
  15:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "auto")
  16:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "_command_exists", lambda name: name == "auto-editor")
  17:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)
  18: 
  19:     captured = {"cmd": []}
  20: 
  21:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  22:         captured["cmd"] = list(args)
  23:         out_idx = args.index("--output") + 1
  24:         Path(args[out_idx]).write_bytes(b"auto-editor-output")
  25:         return True, ""
  26: 
  27:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
  28: 
  29:     result = stage2_silence.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
  30:     assert result.success
  31:     assert result.output_file
  32:     assert Path(str(result.output_file)).exists()
  33:     assert "--margin" in captured["cmd"]
  34: 
  35:     report = out_dir / task_id / "_stages" / f"{task_id}_stage2_silence_report.json"
  36:     payload = json.loads(report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  37:     assert payload.get("method") == "auto_editor"
  38: 
  39: 
  40: def test_stage2_strict_mode_rejects_copy_fallback(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  41:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  42:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  43:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
  44:     task_id = "v2_strict"
  45: 
  46:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "auto")
  47:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "true")
  48:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "_command_exists", lambda _name: False)
  49:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)
  50: 
  51:     result = stage2_silence.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
  52:     assert result.success is False
  53:     assert "strict equivalence" in str(result.error_message)
  54: 
  55:     report = out_dir / task_id / "_stages" / f"{task_id}_stage2_silence_report.json"
  56:     payload = json.loads(report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  57:     assert payload.get("method") == "strict_rejected"
  58:     assert payload.get("fallback_used") is True
  59: 
  60: 
  61: def test_stage2_silenceremove_codec_prefers_stage2_env(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  62:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  63:     target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
  64:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  65:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", "hevc_nvenc")
  66:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "libx264")
  67: 
  68:     captured: list[list[str]] = []
  69: 
  70:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  71:         captured.append(list(args))
  72:         return True, ""
  73: 
  74:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
  75:     ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
  76: 
  77:     assert ok is True
  78:     assert error == ""
  79:     assert len(captured) == 1
  80:     assert captured[0][captured[0].index("-c:v") + 1] == "hevc_nvenc"
  81: 
  82: 
  83: def test_stage2_silenceremove_codec_falls_back_to_global_env(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  84:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
  85:     target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
  86:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  87:     monkeypatch.delenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", raising=False)
  88:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "h264_nvenc")
  89: 
  90:     captured: list[list[str]] = []
  91: 
  92:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  93:         captured.append(list(args))
  94:         return True, ""
  95: 
  96:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
  97:     ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
  98: 
  99:     assert ok is True
 100:     assert error == ""
 101:     assert len(captured) == 1
 102:     assert captured[0][captured[0].index("-c:v") + 1] == "h264_nvenc"
 103: 
 104: 
 105: def test_stage2_silenceremove_gpu_codec_failure_downgrades_to_libx264(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 106:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 107:     target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
 108:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 109:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", "h264_nvenc")
 110: 
 111:     captured: list[list[str]] = []
 112:     calls = {"count": 0}
 113: 
 114:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 115:         captured.append(list(args))
 116:         calls["count"] += 1
 117:         if calls["count"] == 1:
 118:             return False, "No NVENC capable devices found"
 119:         return True, ""
 120: 
 121:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
 122:     ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
 123: 
 124:     assert ok is True
 125:     assert error == ""
 126:     assert len(captured) == 2
 127:     codecs = [cmd[cmd.index("-c:v") + 1] for cmd in captured]
 128:     assert codecs == ["h264_nvenc", "libx264"]
 129: 
 130: 
 131: def test_stage7_uses_burn_mode_before_mux(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 132:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 133:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 134:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
 135:     task_id = "v7"
 136:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
 137:     stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 138:     subtitle = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
 139:     subtitle.write_text(
 140:         "\n".join(
 141:             [
 142:                 "1",
 143:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
 144:                 "hello",
 145:                 "",
 146:             ]
 147:         ),
 148:         encoding="utf-8",
 149:     )
 150: 
 151:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "auto")
 152:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
 153:     captured = {"cmd": []}
 154: 
 155:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 156:         captured["cmd"] = list(args)
 157:         Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
 158:         return True, ""
 159: 
 160:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
 161:     result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
 162:     assert result.success
 163:     assert result.output_file
 164:     assert Path(str(result.output_file)).exists()
 165:     assert "-vf" in captured["cmd"]
 166: 
 167:     manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_subtitle_manifest.json"
 168:     payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 169:     assert payload.get("method") == "burn_subtitle"
 170: 
 171: 
 172: def test_stage7_strict_mode_rejects_copy_fallback(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 173:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 174:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")

 192: def test_stage7_prefers_ass_subtitle_input(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 193:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 194:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 195:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
 196:     task_id = "v7_ass"
 197:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
 198:     stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 199:     srt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
 200:     ass = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass"
 201:     srt.write_text(
 202:         "\n".join(
 203:             [
 204:                 "1",
 205:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
 206:                 "hello srt",
 207:                 "",
 208:             ]
 209:         ),
 210:         encoding="utf-8",
 211:     )
 212:     ass.write_text(
 213:         "\n".join(
 214:             [
 215:                 "[Script Info]",
 216:                 "Title: ass subtitle",
 217:                 "",
 218:                 "[Events]",
 219:                 "Format: Layer, Start, End, Style, Name, MarginL, MarginR, MarginV, Effect, Text",
 220:                 "Dialogue: 0,0:00:00.00,0:00:01.00,Default,,0,0,0,,hello ass",
 221:             ]
 222:         ),
 223:         encoding="utf-8",
 224:     )
 225: 
 226:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "burn")
 227:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
 228:     captured = {"cmd": []}
 229: 
 230:     def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 231:         captured["cmd"] = list(args)
 232:         Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
 233:         return True, ""
 234: 
 235:     monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
 236:     result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
 237:     assert result.success
 238:     vf_expr = captured["cmd"][captured["cmd"].index("-vf") + 1]
 239:     assert vf_expr.startswith("ass=")
 240: 
 241: 
 242: def test_stage7_srt_burn_applies_resolution_adaptive_font_size(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
 243:     source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
 244:     source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
 245:     out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
 246:     task_id = "v7_font"
 247:     stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
 248:     stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 249:     subtitle = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
 250:     subtitle.write_text(
 251:         "\n".join(
 252:             [
 253:                 "1",
 254:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
 255:                 "hello",
 256:                 "",
 257:             ]
 258:         ),
 259:         encoding="utf-8",
 260:     )

=== tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py ===
   1: from __future__ import annotations
   2: 
   3: from pathlib import Path
   4: 
   5: from domain.video.asr.engine_factory import build_asr_engine
   6: from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngineError
   7: 
   8: 
   9: def _make_video(path: Path) -> Path:
  10:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  11:     path.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
  12:     return path
  13: 
  14: 
  15: def test_build_asr_engine_prefers_funasr_in_auto_mode(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  16:     source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  17: 
  18:     class FakeFunASR:
  19:         name = "funasr"
  20: 
  21:         def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  22:             return [(0.0, 1.0, "hello")], "funasr-ok"
  23: 
  24:     result = build_asr_engine(
  25:         source=source,
  26:         duration_seconds=10.0,
  27:         requested_backend="auto",
  28:         funasr_engine=FakeFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
  29:     )
  30: 
  31:     assert result.engine == "funasr"
  32:     assert len(result.segments) == 1
  33:     assert result.attempts[0].backend == "funasr"
  34: 
  35: 
  36: def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_faster_whisper(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  37:     source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  38: 
  39:     class BrokenFunASR:
  40:         name = "funasr"
  41: 
  42:         def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  43:             raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")
  44: 
  45:     result = build_asr_engine(
  46:         source=source,
  47:         duration_seconds=10.0,
  48:         requested_backend="auto",
  49:         funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
  50:         faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([(0.0, 1.0, "fw")], "faster-whisper-ok"),
  51:     )
  52: 
  53:     assert result.engine == "faster_whisper"
  54:     assert len(result.segments) == 1
  55:     assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts[:2]] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper"]
  56: 
  57: 
  58: def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_sidecar(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  59:     source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  60:     sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"
  61:     sidecar.write_text(
  62:         "\n".join(
  63:             [
  64:                 "1",
  65:                 "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000",
  66:                 "sidecar line",
  67:                 "",
  68:             ]
  69:         ),
  70:         encoding="utf-8",
  71:     )
  72: 
  73:     class BrokenFunASR:
  74:         name = "funasr"
  75: 
  76:         def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  77:             raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")
  78: 
  79:     result = build_asr_engine(
  80:         source=source,
  81:         duration_seconds=10.0,
  82:         requested_backend="auto",
  83:         funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
  84:         faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([], "empty fw"),
  85:     )
  86: 
  87:     assert result.engine == "sidecar_srt"
  88:     assert len(result.segments) == 1
  89:     assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar"]
  90: 
  91: 
  92: def test_build_asr_engine_sidecar_only_returns_timeline_fallback_when_missing(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  93:     source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
  94:     result = build_asr_engine(
  95:         source=source,
  96:         duration_seconds=5.0,
  97:         requested_backend="sidecar",
  98:     )
  99:     assert result.engine == "timeline_fallback"
 100:     assert result.segments == []
 101:     assert result.attempts and result.attempts[0].backend == "sidecar"

self = <test_sub_split.TestSubtitleSplitting testMethod=test_config_integration>

    def test_config_integration(self):
        """测试与配置文件的集成。"""
        # 创建一个临时的配置文件
        temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        try:
            # 创建一个模拟的配置模块
            os.makedirs(os.path.join(temp_dir, 'funclip'), exist_ok=True)
            with open(os.path.join(temp_dir, 'funclip', 'config.py'), 'w') as f:
                f.write("# Test config\nSUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS = 4\nENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING = True\n")
    
            # 将临时目录添加到sys.path
            sys.path.insert(0, temp_dir)
    
            # 导入临时配置
            import importlib
            import funclip.config as test_cfg
            importlib.reload(test_cfg)  # 确保重新加载
    
            # 测试配置值是否正确读取
            self.assertEqual(test_cfg.SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS, 4)
            self.assertTrue(test_cfg.ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING)
    
            # 测试使用配置值进行分割
            test_text = '一二三四五六七八'
            sentence = {
                'text': test_text,
                'ts_list': [(c, i*100, (i+1)*100) for i, c in enumerate(test_text)],
                'start': 0, 'end': 800
            }
    
            # 使用配置中的max_chars值(4)
            result = process_sentence_timestamps([sentence], max_chars=test_cfg.SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS)
            self.assertEqual(len(result), 2)
>           self.assertEqual(result[0]['text'], '一二三四')
E           AssertionError: '一二三' != '一二三四'
E           - 一二三
E           + 一二三四
E           ?    +

    def test_default_max_chars(self):
        """测试默认的max_chars值是否为9。"""
        test_text = '一二三四五六七八九十一二'  # 12个字符
        sentence = {
            'text': test_text,
            'ts_list': [(c, i*100, (i+1)*100) for i, c in enumerate(test_text)],
            'start': 0, 'end': 1200
        }
        # 不指定max_chars，应该使用默认值9

    def test_force_split_if_punctuation_segment_too_long(self):
        """测试在标点分割后片段仍然过长时强制分割。"""
        test_text = '一二三四五六七八，九十'
        sentence = {
            'text': test_text,
            'ts_list': [(c, i*100, (i+1)*100) for i, c in enumerate(test_text)],
            'start': 0, 'end': 1100
        }
        # max_chars=7，所以 '一二三四五六七八，' 太长了
        result = process_sentence_timestamps([sentence], max_chars=7)
>       self.assertEqual(len(result), 2)

self = <test_sub_split.TestSubtitleSplitting testMethod=test_mixed_chinese_english>

    def test_mixed_chinese_english(self):
        """测试混合中英文的句子分割。"""
        test_text = '你好hello世界world'  # 混合中英文
        # 为每个字符创建时间戳
        ts_list = []
        start = 0
        for c in test_text:
            end = start + 100
            ts_list.append((c, start, end))
            start = end
    
        sentence = {
            'text': test_text,
            'ts_list': ts_list,
            'start': 0, 'end': len(test_text) * 100
        }
        result = process_sentence_timestamps([sentence], max_chars=5)
>       self.assertEqual(len(result), 3)
E       AssertionError: 1 != 3

self = <test_sub_split.TestSubtitleSplitting testMethod=test_timestamp_generation>

    def test_timestamp_generation(self):
        """测试分割后的时间戳是否正确生成。"""
        test_text = '一二三四五六七八九十一二'
        sentence = {
            'text': test_text,
            'ts_list': [(c, i*100, (i+1)*100) for i, c in enumerate(test_text)],
            'start': 0, 'end': 1200
        }
        result = process_sentence_timestamps([sentence], max_chars=6)
        self.assertEqual(len(result), 2)
        # 检查第一个片段的时间戳
        self.assertEqual(result[0]['timestamp'][0], [0, 100])  # 第一个字的时间戳
        self.assertEqual(result[0]['timestamp'][-1], [500, 600])  # 第六个字的时间戳
        # 检查第二个片段的时间戳
        self.assertEqual(result[1]['timestamp'][0], [600, 700])  # 第七个字的时间戳
>       self.assertEqual(result[1]['timestamp'][-1], [1100, 1200])  # 最后一个字的时间戳
E       AssertionError: Lists differ: [800, 900] != [1100, 1200]
E       
E       First differing element 0:
E       800
E       1100
E       
E       - [800, 900]
E       + [1100, 1200]

________________ TestConfigReading.test_config_does_not_exist _________________

self = <test_config_reading.TestConfigReading testMethod=test_config_does_not_exist>

    def test_config_does_not_exist(self):
        """测试当配置文件不存在时的行为"""
        # 不创建配置文件，确保它不存在
    
        # 导入videoclipper模块
        from funclip.videoclipper import VideoClipper
    
        # 创建一个模拟的音频输入和状态字典
        # 使用NumPy数组而不是Python列表
        mock_audio = (16000, np.zeros(16000, dtype=np.float32))  # 1秒的静音
        mock_state = None
    
        # 创建一个模拟的FunASR模型
        class MockModel:
            def generate(self, *args, **kwargs):
                # 创建一个模拟的句子列表，包含ts_list
                ts_list = []
                for i, c in enumerate('一二三四五六七八九十一二'):
                    ts_list.append((c, i*100, (i+1)*100))
    
                return [{
                    'sentence_info': [
                        {
                            'text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                            'ts_list': ts_list,
                            'start': 0, 'end': 1200
                        }
                    ],
                    'raw_text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                    'text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                    'timestamp': [(0, 1200)]
                }]
    
        # 创建VideoClipper实例
        clipper = VideoClipper(MockModel())
    
        # 调用recog方法，这将触发配置读取
        _, _, state = clipper.recog(mock_audio, state=mock_state)
    
        # 验证结果
        # 由于配置文件不存在，应该使用默认值9
        # 将"一二三四五六七八九十一二"分成两个片段
>       self.assertEqual(len(state['sentences']), 2)
E       AssertionError: 1 != 2

        def test_config_exists_with_custom_values(self):
            """测试当配置文件存在且包含自定义值时的行为"""
            # 创建一个自定义配置文件
            self.create_config_file("""
    # 测试配置文件
    ENABLE_SUBTITLE_SPLITTING = True
    SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS = 5
    """)
    
            # 导入videoclipper模块
            from funclip.videoclipper import VideoClipper
    
            # 创建一个模拟的音频输入和状态字典
            # 使用NumPy数组而不是Python列表
            mock_audio = (16000, np.zeros(16000, dtype=np.float32))  # 1秒的静音
            mock_state = None
    
            # 创建一个模拟的FunASR模型
            class MockModel:
                def generate(self, *args, **kwargs):
                    # 创建一个模拟的句子列表，包含ts_list
                    ts_list = []
                    for i, c in enumerate('一二三四五六七八九十'):
                        ts_list.append((c, i*100, (i+1)*100))
    
                    return [{
                        'sentence_info': [
                            {
                                'text': '一二三四五六七八九十',
                                'ts_list': ts_list,
                                'start': 0, 'end': 1000
                            }
                        ],
                        'raw_text': '一二三四五六七八九十',
                        'text': '一二三四五六七八九十',
                        'timestamp': [(0, 1000)]
                    }]
    
            # 创建VideoClipper实例
            clipper = VideoClipper(MockModel())
    
            # 调用recog方法，这将触发配置读取
            _, _, state = clipper.recog(mock_audio, state=mock_state)
    
            # 验证结果
            # 由于max_chars=5，应该将"一二三四五六七八九十"分成两个片段

self = <test_config_reading.TestConfigReading testMethod=test_config_exists_with_default_values>

        def test_config_exists_with_default_values(self):
            """测试当配置文件存在但使用默认值时的行为"""
            # 创建一个使用默认值的配置文件
            self.create_config_file("""
    # 测试配置文件
    # 使用默认值
    """)
    
            # 导入videoclipper模块
            from funclip.videoclipper import VideoClipper
    
            # 创建一个模拟的音频输入和状态字典
            # 使用NumPy数组而不是Python列表
            mock_audio = (16000, np.zeros(16000, dtype=np.float32))  # 1秒的静音
            mock_state = None
    
            # 创建一个模拟的FunASR模型
            class MockModel:
                def generate(self, *args, **kwargs):
                    # 创建一个模拟的句子列表，包含ts_list
                    ts_list = []
                    for i, c in enumerate('一二三四五六七八九十一二'):
                        ts_list.append((c, i*100, (i+1)*100))
    
                    return [{
                        'sentence_info': [
                            {
                                'text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                                'ts_list': ts_list,
                                'start': 0, 'end': 1200
                            }
                        ],
                        'raw_text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                        'text': '一二三四五六七八九十一二',
                        'timestamp': [(0, 1200)]
                    }]
    
            # 创建VideoClipper实例
            clipper = VideoClipper(MockModel())
    
            # 调用recog方法，这将触发配置读取
            _, _, state = clipper.recog(mock_audio, state=mock_state)
    
            # 验证结果
            # 由于没有指定max_chars，应该使用默认值9
            # 将"一二三四五六七八九十一二"分成两个片段
>           self.assertEqual(len(state['sentences']), 2)

我补跑了两类检查：
1. domain.video.pipeline 在当前工作树里已经无法导入，直接报 ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'domain.video.stages'。
2. funclip 的旧测试在 .venv-t13 里仍然复现 9 failed, 6 passed，问题集中在字幕切分和 state['sentences'] 契约上。

这两点放在一起的含义很直接：新架构壳子还没接上，旧内核也还没稳，所以现在就去做“自然语言可编辑的剪辑 skill”，风险会非常高。

 717:     def _download_source_video(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> str:
 718:         source_url = str(task.source_url or "").strip()
 719:         if not source_url:
 720:             raise ValueError("missing source_url for video download")
 721: 
 722:         task_input_dir = Path(self.config.input_dir) / task.task_id
 723:         task_input_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 724:         filename = self._resolve_download_filename(task, source_url)
 725:         target = task_input_dir / filename
 726:         temp_path = task_input_dir / f"{filename}.part"
 727: 
 728:         parsed = urlparse(source_url)
 729:         if parsed.scheme == "file":
 730:             local_source = self._parse_file_uri(source_url)
 731:             if not local_source.exists():
 732:                 raise FileNotFoundError(f"source file not found: {local_source}")
 733:             shutil.copy2(local_source, temp_path)
 734:             temp_path.replace(target)
 735:             return str(target)
 736: 
 737:         if parsed.scheme == "" and Path(source_url).exists():
 738:             shutil.copy2(Path(source_url), temp_path)
 739:             temp_path.replace(target)
 740:             return str(target)
 741: 
 742:         if self._looks_like_windows_path(source_url) and Path(source_url).exists():
 743:             shutil.copy2(Path(source_url), temp_path)
 744:             temp_path.replace(target)
 745:             return str(target)
 746: 
 747:         if parsed.scheme not in {"http", "https"}:
 748:             raise ValueError(f"unsupported source_url scheme: {parsed.scheme}")
 749: 
 750:         try:
 751:             with requests.get(
 752:                 source_url,
 753:                 stream=True,
 754:                 timeout=(10, self.download_timeout_seconds),
 755:             ) as response:
 756:                 response.raise_for_status()
 757:                 with temp_path.open("wb") as f:
 758:                     for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=self.download_chunk_size):
 759:                         if not chunk:
 760:                             continue
 761:                         if self.stop_event.is_set():
 762:                             raise RuntimeError("download interrupted: worker stopping")
 763:                         f.write(chunk)
 764:             temp_path.replace(target)
 765:             return str(target)
 766:         except Exception:
 767:             try:
 768:                 temp_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
 769:             except Exception:
 770:                 pass
 771:             raise
 772: 
 773:     def _prepare_video_download_context(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
 774:         if task.task_type != TaskType.VIDEO:
 775:             return
 776:         metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
 777:         payload = dict(task.payload or {})
 778:         forum_info: Dict[str, Any] = {}
 779:         if isinstance(metadata.get("forum_post_info"), dict):
 780:             forum_info.update(metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
 781:         if isinstance(payload.get("forum_post_info"), dict):
 782:             forum_info.update(payload.get("forum_post_info") or {})
 783: 
 784:         post_url = self._pick_first_text(
 785:             forum_info.get("post_url"),
 786:             payload.get("post_url"),
 787:             metadata.get("post_url"),
 788:         )
 789:         source_url = str(task.source_url or "").strip()
 790:         if not post_url and self._looks_like_forum_post_url(source_url):
 791:             post_url = source_url
 792:         if post_url:
 793:             forum_info["post_url"] = post_url
 794: 
 795:         should_parse_post = bool(post_url) and (
 796:             not source_url or self._looks_like_forum_post_url(source_url)
 797:         )
 798:         if should_parse_post:
 799:             parsed_info = self._resolve_forum_post_download_info(post_url)
 800:             forum_info.update(parsed_info)
 801:             parsed_video_url = str(parsed_info.get("video_url") or "").strip()
 802:             if parsed_video_url:
 803:                 task.source_url = parsed_video_url
 804: 
 805:         if forum_info:
 806:             metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
 807:             payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
 808: 
 809:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
 810:             forum_post_info=forum_info,
 811:             payload=payload,
 812:             metadata=metadata,
 813:             source_url=str(task.source_url or ""),
 814:         )
 815:         if original_filename:
 816:             metadata["original_filename"] = original_filename
 817:             payload["original_filename"] = original_filename
 818:             if forum_info:
 819:                 forum_info["original_filename"] = original_filename
 820:                 metadata["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
 821:                 payload["forum_post_info"] = forum_info
 822: 
 823:         task.metadata = metadata
 824:         task.payload = payload
 825: 
 826:     def _resolve_forum_post_download_info(self, post_url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 827:         normalized_post_url = str(post_url or "").strip()
 828:         if not normalized_post_url:
 829:             return {}
 830:         base_url = self._resolve_forum_base_url(normalized_post_url)
 831:         forum_cfg = self._resolve_forum_upload_config()
 832:         client = ForumHttpClient(
 833:             base_url=base_url,
 834:             username=forum_cfg.get("username", ""),
 835:             password=forum_cfg.get("password", ""),
 836:             logger=self.logger,
 837:         )
 838:         crawler = ForumCrawler(http_client=client, logger=self.logger)
 839:         detail = crawler.fetch_thread_detail(normalized_post_url)
 840:         if detail is None:
 841:             raise RuntimeError(f"failed to parse forum post detail: {normalized_post_url}")
 842: 
 843:         detail_dict = detail.to_dict()
 844:         processor = ForumContentProcessor(logger=self.logger)
 845:         parsed_info = processor.build_forum_post_info(detail_dict)
 846: 
 847:         video_urls: List[str] = []
 848:         for item in detail.video_urls:
 849:             text = str(item or "").strip()
 850:             if text:
 851:                 video_urls.append(text)
 852:         for item in parsed_info.get("video_urls", []) if isinstance(parsed_info, dict) else []:
 853:             text = str(item or "").strip()
 854:             if text:
 855:                 video_urls.append(text)
 856:         dedup_video_urls: List[str] = []
 857:         seen_urls: set[str] = set()
 858:         for item in video_urls:
 859:             if item in seen_urls:
 860:                 continue
 861:             seen_urls.add(item)
 862:             dedup_video_urls.append(item)
 863:         if not dedup_video_urls:
 864:             raise RuntimeError(f"no downloadable video url found in post: {normalized_post_url}")
 865:         video_url = dedup_video_urls[0]
 866: 
 867:         thread_id = self._pick_first_text(
 868:             parsed_info.get("thread_id"),
 869:             detail.thread_id,
 870:             self._parse_thread_id_from_post_url(normalized_post_url),
 871:         )
 872:         post_id = self._pick_first_text(
 873:             parsed_info.get("post_id"),
 874:             detail.post_id,
 875:             thread_id,
 876:         )
 877:         original_filename = self._pick_first_text(
 878:             parsed_info.get("original_filename"),
 879:             detail.original_filename,
 880:             self._guess_download_filename(video_url),
 881:         )
 882:         hotwords = self._normalize_text_list(parsed_info.get("hotwords"))
 883:         result: Dict[str, Any] = {
 884:             "post_url": normalized_post_url,
 885:             "thread_id": thread_id,
 886:             "post_id": post_id,
 887:             "title": self._pick_first_text(parsed_info.get("title"), detail.title),

=== apps/worker/service.py lines 1683-1853 ===
1683:     def _resolve_video_source_url(
1684:         self,
1685:         task_type: TaskType,
1686:         source_url: str,
1687:         payload: Dict[str, Any],
1688:         metadata: Dict[str, Any],
1689:     ) -> str:
1690:         if task_type != TaskType.VIDEO:
1691:             return source_url
1692: 
1693:         fallback_video_url = self._pick_first_video_url(payload=payload, metadata=metadata)
1694:         if not source_url:
1695:             return fallback_video_url
1696:         return source_url
1697: 
1698:     def _pick_first_video_url(self, payload: Dict[str, Any], metadata: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1699:         candidates: List[str] = []
1700:         for bucket in (
1701:             payload.get("video_urls"),
1702:             metadata.get("video_urls"),
1703:             (payload.get("forum_post_info") or {}).get("video_urls")
1704:             if isinstance(payload.get("forum_post_info"), dict)
1705:             else [],
1706:             (metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {}).get("video_urls")
1707:             if isinstance(metadata.get("forum_post_info"), dict)
1708:             else [],
1709:         ):
1710:             if not isinstance(bucket, list):
1711:                 continue
1712:             for item in bucket:
1713:                 text = str(item or "").strip()
1714:                 if text:
1715:                     candidates.append(text)
1716:         return candidates[0] if candidates else ""
1717: 
1718:     def _looks_like_forum_post_url(self, value: str) -> bool:
1719:         text = str(value or "").strip().lower()
1720:         if not text:
1721:             return False
1722:         if "thread-" in text and ".html" in text:
1723:             return True
1724:         if "forum.php" in text and "tid=" in text:
1725:             return True
1726:         return bool(re.search(r"[?&]tid=\d+", text))
1727: 
1728:     def _resolve_original_filename(
1729:         self,
1730:         forum_post_info: Any,
1731:         payload: Dict[str, Any],
1732:         metadata: Dict[str, Any],
1733:         source_url: str,
1734:     ) -> str:
1735:         info = forum_post_info if isinstance(forum_post_info, dict) else {}
1736:         candidates = [
1737:             info.get("original_filename"),
1738:             payload.get("original_filename"),
1739:             metadata.get("original_filename"),
1740:         ]
1741:         for candidate in candidates:
1742:             text = self._sanitize_filename(str(candidate or ""))
1743:             if text:
1744:                 return text
1745: 
1746:         if source_url and not self._looks_like_forum_post_url(source_url):
1747:             guessed = self._sanitize_filename(self._guess_download_filename(source_url))
1748:             if guessed:
1749:                 return guessed
1750:         return ""
1751: 
1752:     def _normalize_forum_post_info(
1753:         self,
1754:         payload: Dict[str, Any],
1755:         metadata: Dict[str, Any],
1756:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1757:         merged: Dict[str, Any] = {}
1758:         payload_info = payload.get("forum_post_info")
1759:         if isinstance(payload_info, dict):
1760:             merged.update(payload_info)
1761:         metadata_info = metadata.get("forum_post_info")
1762:         if isinstance(metadata_info, dict):
1763:             merged.update(metadata_info)
1764: 
1765:         if not merged and not payload.get("hotwords") and not payload.get("original_filename"):
1766:             return {}
1767: 
1768:         hotwords = self._normalize_text_list(
1769:             merged.get("hotwords"),
1770:             payload.get("hotwords"),
1771:             metadata.get("hotwords"),
1772:             merged.get("keywords"),
1773:             payload.get("keywords"),
1774:             metadata.get("keywords"),
1775:         )
1776:         if hotwords:
1777:             merged["hotwords"] = hotwords
1778: 
1779:         cover_up = self._pick_first_text(
1780:             merged.get("cover_title_up"),
1781:             merged.get("封面标题上"),
1782:             payload.get("cover_title_up"),
1783:             payload.get("封面标题上"),
1784:             metadata.get("cover_title_up"),
1785:             metadata.get("封面标题上"),
1786:         )
1787:         cover_middle = self._pick_first_text(
1788:             merged.get("cover_title_middle"),
1789:             merged.get("封面标题中"),
1790:             payload.get("cover_title_middle"),
1791:             payload.get("封面标题中"),
1792:             metadata.get("cover_title_middle"),
1793:             metadata.get("封面标题中"),
1794:         )
1795:         cover_down = self._pick_first_text(
1796:             merged.get("cover_title_down"),
1797:             merged.get("封面标题下"),
1798:             payload.get("cover_title_down"),
1799:             payload.get("封面标题下"),
1800:             metadata.get("cover_title_down"),
1801:             metadata.get("封面标题下"),
1802:         )
1803: 
1804:         cover_titles = self._normalize_text_list(merged.get("cover_titles"))
1805:         if not cover_up and len(cover_titles) >= 1:
1806:             cover_up = cover_titles[0]
1807:         if not cover_middle and len(cover_titles) >= 2:
1808:             cover_middle = cover_titles[1]
1809:         if not cover_down and len(cover_titles) >= 3:
1810:             cover_down = cover_titles[2]
1811: 
1812:         compact_titles = [text for text in (cover_up, cover_middle, cover_down) if text]
1813:         if compact_titles:
1814:             merged["cover_titles"] = compact_titles
1815:             merged["cover_title_up"] = cover_up
1816:             merged["cover_title_middle"] = cover_middle
1817:             merged["cover_title_down"] = cover_down
1818:             merged["封面标题上"] = cover_up
1819:             merged["封面标题中"] = cover_middle
1820:             merged["封面标题下"] = cover_down
1821: 
1822:         speaker = self._pick_first_text(
1823:             merged.get("speaker"),
1824:             merged.get("speaker_id"),
1825:             merged.get("spk"),
1826:             merged.get("target_speaker"),
1827:         )
1828:         if speaker:
1829:             merged["speaker"] = speaker
1830: 
1831:         original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
1832:             forum_post_info=merged,
1833:             payload=payload,
1834:             metadata=metadata,
1835:             source_url="",
1836:         )
1837:         if original_filename:
1838:             merged["original_filename"] = original_filename
1839:         return merged
1840: 
1841:     def _normalize_text_list(self, *values: Any) -> List[str]:
1842:         output: List[str] = []
1843:         seen: set[str] = set()
1844:         for value in values:
1845:             items: List[str] = []
1846:             if isinstance(value, list):
1847:                 items = [str(item or "").strip() for item in value]
1848:             elif isinstance(value, str):
1849:                 items = [item.strip() for item in value.replace("\uFF0C", ",").split(",")]
1850:             for item in items:
1851:                 normalized = " ".join(item.split())
1852:                 if not normalized:
1853:                     continue
